108        lprint("AssetService 初始化完成")  # 返回值 (第108行) None

106        self._progress_lock = Lock()  # 💡 self._progress_lock=<unlocked _thread.lock object at 0x000001CDECFBEE40> (lock)
107        lprint("[分类服务]", ("状态", "初始化完成"))  # 返回值 (第107行) None

# >>深度4 路径1-1-2-5 #83 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1005 in _resolve_asset_cache_category_path() ← :1136 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[49.5359s]

1005    def _resolve_asset_cache_category_path(self) -> List[str]:
1006        if self.muse_category_path:
1007            return [p.strip() for p in self.muse_category_path.split('/') if p.strip()]
1008        if self.config_common_category_root:
1009            return list(self.config_common_category_root)  # 返回值 (第1009行) ['动作资源']
1010        return [str(p).strip() for p in (self.category_root or []) if str(p).strip()]
1011

# >>深度3 路径1-1-3 #84 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:411 in _init_report_files() ← :406 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[49.5103s]

411    def _init_report_files(self) -> None:
412        if not self.save_sync_report:
413            return
414        os.makedirs(self.cache_dir, exist_ok=True)
415        org_id = self._get_org_id_str()  # → 调用 _get_org_id_str()  # 💡 org_id='h42' (str)
416        # sync_report 不再使用 jsonl 增量文件；上传/验证线程只收集内存结果，
417        # run_parallel 返回后由主线程统一写入下面这个 json 快照。
418        self._report_file = ''
419        self._sync_report_json = os.path.join(self.cache_dir, f'{org_id}_sync_report.json')  # 💡 self._sync_report_json='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache\\h42_sync_report.json' (str)
420        self._scan_report_file = os.path.join(self.cache_dir, f'{org_id}_scan_progress.jsonl')  # 💡 self._scan_report_file='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache\\h42_scan_progress.jsonl' (str)
421        self._scan_manifest_file = os.path.join(self.cache_dir, f'{org_id}_scan_manifest.jsonl')  # 💡 self._scan_manifest_file='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache\\h42_scan_manifest.jsonl' (str)
422        lprint(
423            "[report][初始化报告文件]",
424            ("muse_lib", org_id),
425            ("sync_report_json", self._sync_report_json),
426            ("scan_report", self._scan_report_file),
427            ("scan_manifest", self._scan_manifest_file),
428        )
429        self._sanitize_scan_progress_file()  # → 调用 _sanitize_scan_progress_file()
430

# >>深度4 路径1-1-3-1 #85 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1285 in _get_org_id_str() ← :415 ⏱️[998.97μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[7.21ms]

1285    def _get_org_id_str(self) -> str:
1286        org_id = str(self.muse_lib or '').strip()  # 💡 org_id='h42' (str)
1287        if not org_id or org_id == 'unknown':
1288            raise ValueError(
1289                'muse_lib is required and must be resolved before reading/writing report files'
1290            )
1291        return org_id  # 返回值 (第1291行) 'h42'
1292

# >>深度4 路径1-1-3-2 #86 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:3036 in _sanitize_scan_progress_file() ← :429 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

3036    def _sanitize_scan_progress_file(self) -> None:
3037        """无效 JSON、缺 directory、重复行等时自动重写为仅含有效完成行的 jsonl。"""
3038        path = self._scan_report_file  # 💡 path='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache\\h42_scan_progress.jsonl' (str)
3039        if not path or not os.path.exists(path):
3040            return
3041        try:
3042            with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
3043                raw = f.read()
3044        except OSError as e:
3045            lprint(f'[扫描进度] 读取 scan_progress 失败，无法自动修复: {e}')
3046            return
3047        except UnicodeDecodeError as e:
3048            lprint(f'[扫描进度] scan_progress 编码损坏，将清空: {path} ({e})')
3049            try:
3050                with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
3051                    f.write('')
3052            except OSError as w:
3053                lprint(f'[扫描进度] 清空失败: {w}')
3054            return
3055        lines = raw.splitlines()  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254984500912_4472:变量·lines·list·8705字符·['{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "d…·点击展开]]

"D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角/入梦展示动画", "max_count": 30, "ts": 1776871921.5523734}']
3056        kept_entries: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []  # 💡 kept_entries=[] (list)
3057        seen: set[str] = set()  # 💡 seen=set() (set)
3058        dirty = False  # 💡 dirty=False (bool)
3059        for line in lines:
3060            if not line.strip():
3061                dirty = True
3062                continue
3063            # 只保留新格式：scan_dir_done + status=done + max_count
3064            trimmed = line.strip()  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254989153536_4490:变量·trimmed·str·155字符·'{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "di…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 trimmed=str (trimmed), 155 字符
'{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "directory": "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑", "max_count": 2934, "ts": 1776838443.7246847}'
3065            try:
3066                entry = json.loads(trimmed)
3067            except Exception:
3068                dirty = True
3069                continue
3070            if not isinstance(entry, dict):
3071                dirty = True
3072                continue
3073            d = self._parse_scan_progress_completed_directory(trimmed)  # → 调用 _parse_scan_progress_completed_directory()  # 💡 d='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
3074            if d is None:
3075                dirty = True
3076                continue
3077            if d in seen:
3078                dirty = True
3079                continue
3080            # 规范化 directory
3081            entry['directory'] = d
3082            seen.add(d)
3083            kept_entries.append(entry)
3084        if not dirty:
3085            return
3086        new_body = '\n'.join(json.dumps(e, ensure_ascii=False) for e in kept_entries)
3087        if new_body:
3088            new_body += '\n'
3089        try:
3090            with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
3091                f.write(new_body)
3092            lprint(
3093                f'[扫描进度] 已自动修复并重写: {path} '
3094                f'保留有效目录 {len(kept_entries)} 条'
3095            )
3096        except OSError as e:
3097            lprint(f'[扫描进度] 重写 scan_progress 失败: {e}')
3098

# >>深度5 路径1-1-3-2-1 #87 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:2997 in _parse_scan_progress_completed_directory() ← :3073 ⏱️[1.00ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[7.02ms]

2997    def _parse_scan_progress_completed_directory(self, line: str) -> Optional[str]:  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254988602352_4531:变量·line·line='{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done"…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 line='{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "directory": "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑", "max_count": 2934, "ts": 1776838443.7246847}'
line='{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "directory": "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑", "max_count": 2934, "ts": 1776838443.7246847}'
2998        """解析一行 scan_progress（仅支持新格式）。
2999
3000        新格式示例：
3001          {"action":"scan_dir_done","status":"done","directory":"//hangzhou/...","max_count":123,"ts":1713.0}
3002        """
3003        trimmed = line.strip()  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254989152816_4540:变量·trimmed·str·155字符·'{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "di…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 trimmed=str (trimmed), 155 字符
'{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "directory": "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑", "max_count": 2934, "ts": 1776838443.7246847}'
3004        if not trimmed:
3005            return None
3006        try:
3007            entry = json.loads(trimmed)
3008        except json.JSONDecodeError:
3009            return None
3010        if not isinstance(entry, dict):
3011            return None
3012        action = entry.get('action')  # 💡 action='scan_dir_done' (str)
3013        if action in self._SCAN_PROGRESS_NOISE_ACTIONS:
3014            return None
3015        # 不兼容旧格式：必须显式 action=scan_dir_done
3016        if action != 'scan_dir_done':
3017            return None
3018        st = entry.get('status')  # 💡 st='done' (str)
3019        # 不兼容旧格式：必须显式 status=done
3020        if st != 'done':
3021            return None
3022        directory = entry.get('directory')  # 💡 directory='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
3023        if not isinstance(directory, str) or not directory:
3024            return None
3025        # 不兼容旧格式：必须有 max_count
3026        if 'max_count' not in entry:
3027            return None
3028        mc = entry.get('max_count')  # 💡 mc=2934 (int)
3029        if not isinstance(mc, int):
3030            try:
3031                int(mc)
3032            except Exception:
3033                return None
3034        return directory.replace('\\', '/')  # 返回值 (第3034行) 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'

3025        # 不兼容旧格式：必须有 max_count
3026        if 'max_count' not in entry:
3027            return None
3028        mc = entry.get('max_count')  # 💡 mc=574 (int)
3029        if not isinstance(mc, int):
3030            try:
3031                int(mc)
3032            except Exception:
3033                return None
3034        return directory.replace('\\', '/')  # 返回值 (第3034行) 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/道具-最终整理'
3035

# >>深度6 路径1-1-3-2-5-4 #95 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:2997 in _parse_scan_progress_completed_directory() ← :3073 ⏱️[999.69μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[6.99ms]

2997    def _parse_scan_progress_completed_directory(self, line: str) -> Optional[str]:  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254988602352_4972:变量·line·line='{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done"…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 line='{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "directory": "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/场景动画", "max_count": 115, "ts": 1776870610.2841663}'
line='{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "directory": "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/场景动画", "max_count": 115, "ts": 1776870610.2841663}'
2998        """解析一行 scan_progress（仅支持新格式）。
2999
3000        新格式示例：
3001          {"action":"scan_dir_done","status":"done","directory":"//hangzhou/...","max_count":123,"ts":1713.0}
3002        """
3003        trimmed = line.strip()  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254989152816_4981:变量·trimmed·str·153字符·'{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "di…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 trimmed=str (trimmed), 153 字符
'{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "directory": "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/场景动画", "max_count": 115, "ts": 1776870610.2841663}'
3004        if not trimmed:
3005            return None
3006        try:
3007            entry = json.loads(trimmed)
3008        except json.JSONDecodeError:
3009            return None
3010        if not isinstance(entry, dict):
3011            return None
3012        action = entry.get('action')  # 💡 action='scan_dir_done' (str)
3013        if action in self._SCAN_PROGRESS_NOISE_ACTIONS:
3014            return None
3015        # 不兼容旧格式：必须显式 action=scan_dir_done
3016        if action != 'scan_dir_done':
3017            return None
3018        st = entry.get('status')  # 💡 st='done' (str)
3019        # 不兼容旧格式：必须显式 status=done
3020        if st != 'done':
3021            return None
3022        directory = entry.get('directory')  # 💡 directory='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/场景动画' (str)
3023        if not isinstance(directory, str) or not directory:
3024            return None
3025        # 不兼容旧格式：必须有 max_count
3026        if 'max_count' not in entry:
3027            return None
3028        mc = entry.get('max_count')  # 💡 mc=115 (int)
3029        if not isinstance(mc, int):
3030            try:
3031                int(mc)
3032            except Exception:
3033                return None
3034        return directory.replace('\\', '/')  # 返回值 (第3034行) 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/场景动画'
3035

# >>深度6 路径1-1-3-2-5-5 #96 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:2997 in _parse_scan_progress_completed_directory() ← :3073 ⏱️[1.00ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

2997    def _parse_scan_progress_completed_directory(self, line: str) -> Optional[str]:  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254982608864_5028:变量·line·line='{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done"…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 line='{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "directory": "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角/common公用/common主角表情动画", "max_count": 62, "ts": 1776870670.0044317}'

2998        """解析一行 scan_progress（仅支持新格式）。
2999
3000        新格式示例：
3001          {"action":"scan_dir_done","status":"done","directory":"//hangzhou/...","max_count":123,"ts":1713.0}
3002        """
3003        trimmed = line.strip()  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254989154832_5037:变量·trimmed·str·172字符·'{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "di…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 trimmed=str (trimmed), 172 字符
'{"action": "scan_dir_done", "status": "done", "directory": "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角/common公用/common主角表情动画", "max_count": 62, "ts": 1776870670.0044317}'
3004        if not trimmed:
3005            return None
3006        try:
3007            entry = json.loads(trimmed)
3008        except json.JSONDecodeError:
3009            return None
3010        if not isinstance(entry, dict):
3011            return None
3012        action = entry.get('action')  # 💡 action='scan_dir_done' (str)
3013        if action in self._SCAN_PROGRESS_NOISE_ACTIONS:
3014            return None
3015        # 不兼容旧格式：必须显式 action=scan_dir_done
3016        if action != 'scan_dir_done':
3017            return None
3018        st = entry.get('status')  # 💡 st='done' (str)
3019        # 不兼容旧格式：必须显式 status=done
3020        if st != 'done':
3021            return None
3022        directory = entry.get('directory')  # 💡 directory='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角/common公用/common主角表情动画' (str)
3023        if not isinstance(directory, str) or not directory:
3024            return None
3025        # 不兼容旧格式：必须有 max_count
3026        if 'max_count' not in entry:
3027            return None
3028        mc = entry.get('max_count')  # 💡 mc=62 (int)
3029        if not isinstance(mc, int):
3030            try:
3031                int(mc)
3032            except Exception:
3033                return None
3034        return directory.replace('\\', '/')  # 返回值 (第3034行) 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角/common公用/common主角表情动画'

# >>深度6 路径1-1-3-2-5-6 #97 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:70 in _wrapped() ← upload_test.py:284 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[6.51ms]

70    @_p4_track_run_parallel_call  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254971507200_5084:变量·self·self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.p4_to_muse_new.p4_to_m…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.p4_to_muse_new.p4_to_muse_new.P4ToMuse object at 0x000001CDEC812E90>, self.args_data={'upload_dir': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', 'batch_index': 1, 'batch_total': 55, 'force_update': False, 'ignore_upload_record': False, 'max_concurrent': 10, 'muse_timeout': None, 'skip_p4v': True, 'limit': 1, 'dry_run': False, 'precreate_only': False, 'verify_sync_report': True, 'update_tags_only': False, 'muse_category_path': None, 'days': 1, 'last_days': 0, 'user_mail': 'wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', 'sync_ext': '.max', 'category_cache_mode': 'file', 'config_path': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\H42\\h42_p4_to_muse.yaml', 'cache_dir': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', 'precreate_state_path': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache\\pre_create_dir.json', 'save_sync_report': True, 'save_index_cache': True, 'save_raw_cache': True}, self.cache_dir='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', self.ignore_upload_record=False, self.save_sync_report=True, self.save_index_cache=True, self.save_raw_cache=True, self.user_mail='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', self.upload_dir='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', self.days=1, self.last_days=0, self.context=None, self.skip_p4v=True, self.limit=1, self.dry_run=False
self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.p4_to_muse_new.p4_to_muse_new.P4ToMuse object at 0x000001CDEC812E90>, self.args_data={'upload_dir': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', 'batch_index': 1, 'batch_total': 55, 'force_update': False, 'ignore_upload_record': False, 'max_concurrent': 10, 'muse_timeout': None, 'skip_p4v': True, 'limit': 1, 'dry_run': False, 'precreate_only': False, 'verify_sync_report': True, 'update_tags_only': False, 'muse_category_path': None, 'days': 1, 'last_days': 0, 'user_mail': 'wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', 'sync_ext': '.max', 'category_cache_mode': 'file', 'config_path': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\H42\\h42_p4_to_muse.yaml', 'cache_dir': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', 'precreate_state_path': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache\\pre_create_dir.json', 'save_sync_report': True, 'save_index_cache': True, 'save_raw_cache': True}, self.cache_dir='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', self.ignore_upload_record=False, self.save_sync_report=True, self.save_index_cache=True, self.save_raw_cache=True, self.user_mail='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', self.upload_dir='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', self.days=1, self.last_days=0, self.context=None, self.skip_p4v=True, self.limit=1, self.dry_run=False
71    def run_parallel(self, max_concurrent=10):
72        """使用 BatchUploader 并行上传文件"""
73        if getattr(self, "verify_sync_report", False) and not getattr(self, "precreate_only", False):  # → 调用 run_parallel()
74            return self._run_verify_sync_report_against_muse(max_concurrent=max_concurrent)
75
76        # precreate-only: scan local subdirs and create Muse dirs (with resume state)
77        if getattr(self, "precreate_only", False):
78            pre = self._precreate_dirs_from_source_root_with_resume()
79            self._last_precreate_summary = dict(pre or {})
80            return RunSummary(
81                mode="precreate",
82                failed=int((pre or {}).get("failed_count", 0) or 0),
83                extra={
84                    "precreate_only": True,
85                    "precreate_summary": dict(pre or {}),
86                },
87            ).to_dict()
88        self.load_upload_log()
89        lprint(
90            f'[run_parallel] 续传已加载 {len(self.upload_file_list)} 条成功路径，'
91            f'继续构建扫描/清单任务（若长时间无输出，多为正在读取大 manifest）'
92        )
93        upload_file_set = set(self.upload_file_list)
94        
95        # 收集成功上传的路径（由 on_progress 填充，主线程统一写入）
96        uploaded_paths = []
97
98        # 如果 skip_p4v，直接扫描本地文件而不调用 update_p4v
99        local_file_map = {}  # 本地路径到P4路径的映射
100        
101        if self.skip_p4v:
102            file_list = []
103            local_dir = self.upload_dir.replace('\\', '/')
104            if local_dir.startswith('//'):
105                local_dir = local_dir.replace('//hangzhou/', 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/')
106
107            if not os.path.exists(local_dir):
108                self.log.error(f'本地目录不存在: {local_dir}')
109                return RunSummary(
110                    mode="upload",
111                    ok=False,
112                    reason="local_dir_missing",
113                    failed=1,
114                ).to_dict()
115
116            scan_count = [0]
117            skip_count = [0]
118            start_time = time.time()
119            limit = self.limit
120            reached_limit = [False]
121
122            def _scan_log(msg: str) -> None:
123                """与进度条同屏时用 tqdm.write，避免 print/lprint 打断单行刷新。"""
124                tqdm.write(msg, file=sys.stderr)
125
126            current_scan_dir = ['']
127            current_scan_depot_key = ['']  # 当前扫描根的 depot 路径，用于 manifest directory 字段
128            # [当前根在 upload.txt 中的全局序号 1..N, 根总数 N]；全树扫描为 [1,1]
129            scan_root_pos = [0, 0]
130            scan_main_pid = os.getpid()
131            current_scan_worker_pid = [0]
132            local_prefix = 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/'
133            p4_prefix = '//hangzhou/'
134            sync_ext_lower = ''
135            if self.sync_ext:
136                sync_ext_lower = self.sync_ext.lower()
137                if not sync_ext_lower.startswith('.'):
138                    sync_ext_lower = f'.{sync_ext_lower}'
139
140            # 先算 root_tasks，再决定是否创建 tqdm/worker（无根任务时不创建进度条，避免卡住且无后续输出）
141            root_tasks: List[dict] = []
142            scan_root_pos[1] = 1
143            depot_key_single = self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(local_dir)
144            # 检查 scan_progress，支持断点续扫
145            if getattr(self, "ignore_upload_record", False):
146                # ignore_upload_record：同时禁用 scan_progress 续扫，否则会把目录误判为“已完成扫描”，
147                # 导致不扫描、manifest 也无记录，最终 file_list 为空（看起来像没去 Muse 检查）。
148                completed_scan_dirs_single = set()
149                _scan_log('[扫描续扫] ignore_upload_record=1：忽略 scan_progress 续扫标记，强制重新扫描本地目录')
150            else:
151                completed_scan_dirs_single = self._load_completed_scan_dirs(log_fn=_scan_log)
152            if self._upload_root_in_completed_set(local_dir, depot_key_single, completed_scan_dirs_single):
153                _scan_log(f'[扫描续扫] 目录已完成，跳过扫描: {depot_key_single}')
154            elif os.path.exists(local_dir):
155                root_tasks.append({
156                    'root_index': 1,
157                    'root_dir': local_dir,
158                    'depot_key': depot_key_single,
159                })
160
161            if (
162                not root_tasks
163                and self._scan_manifest_file
164                and os.path.exists(self._scan_manifest_file)
165            ):
166                # 按当前 upload_dir 的本地路径过滤 manifest
167                _filter_dirs: List[str] = [str(local_dir).replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')]
168                restored, lm = self._restore_upload_queue_from_scan_manifest(
169                    filter_directories=_filter_dirs
170                )
171                if restored:
172                    file_list = restored
173                    local_file_map.update(lm)
174                    lprint(
175                        f'[扫描续扫] 无待扫描根目录，已从 scan_manifest 恢复 {len(file_list)} 条路径，进入过滤与上传'
176                    )
177                else:
178                    lprint(
179                        f'[扫描续扫] 无待扫描根目录，且 scan_manifest 未解析出路径: {self._scan_manifest_file}'
180                    )
181            elif root_tasks:
182                scan_pbar = tqdm(
183                    desc='扫描',
184                    unit='项',
185                    ncols=self._SCAN_PBAR_NCOLS,
186                    dynamic_ncols=False,
187                    mininterval=0.4,
188                    miniters=128,
189                    position=0,
190                    leave=True,
191                    file=sys.stderr,
192                )
193
194                try:
195                    scan_session_roots_total = len(root_tasks)
196                    scan_roots_done = [0]
197                    worker_count = max(1, min(max_concurrent, len(root_tasks)))
198                    _scan_log(
199                        f'[扫描] 本批根任务数={scan_session_roots_total} workers={worker_count}'
200                    )
201                    # max_concurrent==1 时不要使用多进程（Windows spawn 成本高且易导致“limit=1 仍卡很久”的错觉）
202                    # 这里改为：worker_count==1 走单线程 worker；>1 才启用 multiprocessing。
203                    if worker_count <= 1:
204                        task_queue = queue.Queue()
205                        result_queue = queue.Queue()
206                        stop_event = threading.Event()
207                    else:
208                        ctx = mp.get_context('spawn')
209                        task_queue = ctx.Queue()
210                        result_queue = ctx.Queue()
211                        stop_event = ctx.Event()
212
213                    for task in root_tasks:
214                        task_queue.put(task)
215                    for _ in range(worker_count):
216                        task_queue.put(None)
217
218                    workers: List = []
219                    if worker_count <= 1:
220                        t = threading.Thread(
221                            target=_scan_worker_loop,
222                            args=(
223                                task_queue,
224                                result_queue,
225                                stop_event,
226                                sync_ext_lower,
227                                upload_file_set,
228                                local_prefix,
229                                p4_prefix,
230                            ),
231                            daemon=True,
232                        )
233                        t.start()
234                        workers.append(t)
235                    else:
236                        for _ in range(worker_count):
237                            proc = ctx.Process(
238                                target=_scan_worker_loop,
239                                args=(
240                                    task_queue,
241                                    result_queue,
242                                    stop_event,
243                                    sync_ext_lower,
244                                    upload_file_set,
245                                    local_prefix,
246                                    p4_prefix,
247                                ),
248                            )
249                            proc.daemon = True
250                            proc.start()
251                            workers.append(proc)
252
253                    roots_inflight = [0]
254                    worker_pulse_buf: Dict[int, Dict[str, Any]] = {}
255
256                    def _pulse_summary() -> str:
257                        return self._scan_worker_pulse_summary(worker_pulse_buf)
258
259                    def _scan_workers_alive() -> int:
260                        return sum(1 for p in workers if p.is_alive())
261
262                    worker_exit_count = 0
263                    last_ui_refresh_ts = time.time()
264
265                    def _scan_pbar_refresh_postfix(now: float) -> None:
266                        """与队列空闲时兜底刷新共用：更新 postfix 中的 t= 与 proc/ifl/r 等。"""
267                        scan_pbar.set_postfix_str(
268                            self._scan_pbar_postfix_str(
269                                scan_root_pos[0] if scan_root_pos[0] > 0 else 1,
270                                scan_root_pos[1] if scan_root_pos[1] > 0 else 1,
271                                now - start_time,
272                                current_scan_dir[0],
273                                scan_main_pid,
274                                current_scan_worker_pid[0] or None,
275                                workers_alive=_scan_workers_alive(),
276                                workers_total=worker_count,
277                                roots_inflight=roots_inflight[0],
278                                roots_done_session=scan_roots_done[0],
279                                roots_total_session=scan_session_roots_total,
280                                pulse_summary=_pulse_summary(),
281                            )
282                        )
283                        scan_pbar.refresh()
284
285                    while worker_exit_count < worker_count:
286                        try:
287                            msg = result_queue.get(timeout=0.25)
288                        except queue.Empty:
289                            # windterm 下队列阻塞等待时，tqdm 可能长时间不重绘；主动刷新兜底
290                            now = time.time()
291                            if now - last_ui_refresh_ts >= 0.5:
292                                last_ui_refresh_ts = now
293                                _scan_pbar_refresh_postfix(now)
294                            continue
295                        kind = msg.get('kind')
296                        if kind == 'worker_exit':
297                            worker_exit_count += 1
298                            continue
299                        if kind == 'worker_pulse':
300                            wp = msg.get('worker_pid')
301                            if wp is not None:
302                                pid = int(wp)
303                                worker_pulse_buf[pid] = {
304                                    'root_index': int(msg.get('root_index', 0)),
305                                    'current_dir': str(msg.get('current_dir', '')),
306                                    'visited': int(msg.get('visited', 0)),
307                                    'hit': int(msg.get('hit', 0)),
308                                    'stack': int(msg.get('stack', 0)),
309                                }
310                            now = time.time()
311                            last_ui_refresh_ts = now
312                            _scan_pbar_refresh_postfix(now)
313                            continue
314                        if kind == 'tick':
315                            scan_pbar.update(int(msg.get('n', 0)))
316                            # tick 密集时主循环不会进入 queue.Empty，postfix 的 t= 会停在旧值；节流刷新
317                            now = time.time()
318                            if now - last_ui_refresh_ts >= 0.5:
319                                last_ui_refresh_ts = now
320                                _scan_pbar_refresh_postfix(now)
321                            continue
322                        if kind == 'root_start':
323                            scan_root_pos[0] = int(msg.get('root_index', 1))
324                            current_scan_dir[0] = str(msg.get('root_dir', ''))
325                            current_scan_depot_key[0] = str(msg.get('depot_key', ''))
326                            wp = msg.get('worker_pid')
327                            current_scan_worker_pid[0] = int(wp) if wp is not None else 0
328                            roots_inflight[0] += 1
329                            scan_pbar.set_postfix_str(
330                                self._scan_pbar_postfix_str(
331                                    scan_root_pos[0],
332                                    scan_root_pos[1] if scan_root_pos[1] > 0 else 1,
333                                    time.time() - start_time,
334                                    current_scan_dir[0],
335                                    scan_main_pid,
336                                    current_scan_worker_pid[0] or None,
337                                    workers_alive=_scan_workers_alive(),
338                                    workers_total=worker_count,
339                                    roots_inflight=roots_inflight[0],
340                                    roots_done_session=scan_roots_done[0],
341                                    roots_total_session=scan_session_roots_total,
342                                    pulse_summary=_pulse_summary(),
343                                )
344                            )
345                            continue
346                        if kind == 'files':
347                            items = msg.get('items') or []
348                            for item in items:
349                                if reached_limit[0]:
350                                    break
351                                p4_path = str(item['p4_path'])
352                                local_path = str(item['local_path'])
353                                file_list.append(p4_path)
354                                self.p4v_file_list[local_path] = p4_path
355                                local_file_map[p4_path] = local_path
356                                self._append_scan_manifest(p4_path, local_path, directory=current_scan_dir[0])
357                                scan_count[0] += 1
358                                if limit and scan_count[0] >= limit:
359                                    reached_limit[0] = True
360                                    stop_event.set()
361                                    _scan_log(f'[扫描] 已达到 limit={limit}，提前终止')
362                                    break
363
364                            continue
365                        if kind == 'root_done':
366                            wpid = msg.get('worker_pid')
367                            if wpid is not None:
368                                worker_pulse_buf.pop(int(wpid), None)
369                            roots_inflight[0] = max(0, roots_inflight[0] - 1)
370                            scan_roots_done[0] += 1
371                            skip_count[0] += int(msg.get('skip_count', 0))
372                            if not reached_limit[0]:
373                                self._flush_scan_manifest_buffer()
374                                self._append_scan_dir_completed(
375                                    # 写本地根目录
376                                    str(msg.get('root_dir', '') or ''),
377                                    # 写“目录内总 max 数”（不受 upload_file_set 去重/跳过影响）
378                                    max_count=int(msg.get('total_hit_count', 0) or 0),
379                                )
380                            now = time.time()
381                            scan_pbar.set_postfix_str(
382                                self._scan_pbar_postfix_str(
383                                    int(msg.get('root_index', scan_root_pos[0] or 1)),
384                                    scan_root_pos[1] if scan_root_pos[1] > 0 else 1,
385                                    now - start_time,
386                                    current_scan_dir[0],
387                                    scan_main_pid,
388                                    current_scan_worker_pid[0] or None,
389                                    workers_alive=_scan_workers_alive(),
390                                    workers_total=worker_count,
391                                    roots_inflight=roots_inflight[0],
392                                    roots_done_session=scan_roots_done[0],
393                                    roots_total_session=scan_session_roots_total,
394                                    pulse_summary=_pulse_summary(),
395                                )
396                            )
397
398                    for proc in workers:
399                        proc.join(timeout=2.0)
400                finally:
401                    # 扫描阶段结束前，兜底刷盘，确保缓冲记录落地
402                    self._flush_scan_manifest_buffer()
403                    scan_pbar.close()
404                _scan_log(
405                    f'[扫描完成] 收集: {scan_count[0]}, 跳过: {skip_count[0]}, '  # → 调用 init_muse()
406                    f'耗时: {time.time() - start_time:.1f}秒'  # → 调用 _init_report_files()
407                )
408                if (
409                    not file_list
410                    and self._scan_manifest_file
411                    and os.path.exists(self._scan_manifest_file)
412                ):
413                    _filter_dirs2: List[str] = [str(local_dir).replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')]
414                    restored, lm = self._restore_upload_queue_from_scan_manifest(
415                        filter_directories=_filter_dirs2  # → 调用 _get_org_id_str()
416                    )
417                    if restored:
418                        file_list = restored
419                        local_file_map.update(lm)
420                        lprint(
421                            f'[扫描续扫] 扫描结果为空，已从 scan_manifest 补全 {len(file_list)} 条路径'
422                        )
423            else:
424                # 非 upload_list 且 root_tasks 为空：理论上本地根目录不存在时已 return
425                if not root_tasks:
426                    lprint('[扫描] 无根目录可扫描（请检查 upload_dir / upload_list）')
427        else:
428            file_list = self.update_p4v()
429  # → 调用 _sanitize_scan_progress_file()
430        self.clear_files = []
431        
432        # 过滤需要上传的文件
433        files_to_upload = []
434        ignored_count = 0
435        uploaded_count = 0
436        ext_filtered_count = 0
437        
438        lprint(f'过滤文件: 总计 {len(file_list)}, 历史记录 {len(self.upload_file_list)}')
439        
440        for file_path in file_list:
441            if self.is_ignore_file(file_path):
442                ignored_count += 1
443                continue
444            if file_path in upload_file_set:
445                uploaded_count += 1
446                self.log.debug(f'已上传过，跳过: {file_path}')
447                continue
448            if self.sync_ext and not file_path.endswith(self.sync_ext):
449                ext_filtered_count += 1
450                continue
451            files_to_upload.append(file_path)
452
453        # sync_report 中 action=failed 的路径：合并进待上传，避免仅依赖 manifest 时漏掉重试
454        retry_merged = 0
455        failed_depot = getattr(self, "_sync_report_failed_depot_paths", None) or set()
456        if failed_depot:
457            ul = self.upload_dir.replace("\\", "/").rstrip("/")
458            if ul.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
459                root_local = ul.replace("//hangzhou/", "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/")
460                root_depot = ul
461            else:  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
462                root_local = ul
463                root_depot = (
464                    self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(ul)
465                    if ul.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/")
466                    else ""
467                )
468            ft_seen: Set[str] = set(files_to_upload)
469            for dep in failed_depot:
470                if not dep.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
471                    continue
472                if not P4ToMuse._sync_report_depot_under_upload_dir(dep, root_local, root_depot):
473                    continue
474                if self.is_ignore_file(dep):
475                    continue
476                if self.sync_ext and not dep.endswith(self.sync_ext):
477                    continue
478                # 显式失败项优先重试：不因历史成功集合跳过（避免误标成功导致 Muse 实际缺失仍漏传）
479                if dep in ft_seen:
480                    continue
481                ft_seen.add(dep)
482                files_to_upload.append(dep)
483                retry_merged += 1
484            if retry_merged:
485                lprint(
486                    "[sync_report]",
487                    ("合并失败重试路径", retry_merged),
488                    ("说明", "来自 sync_report 快照中 action=failed，且位于当前 upload_dir"),
489                )
490
491        lprint(
492            f'过滤结果: 忽略 {ignored_count}, 已上传 {uploaded_count}, '
493            f'扩展名不匹配 {ext_filtered_count}, 待上传 {len(files_to_upload)}'
494            + (f'（含 sync_report 失败重试 {retry_merged} 条）' if retry_merged else '')
495        )
496
497        # 可选：忽略本地上传记录时，改为通过 Muse 查询判断“已存在则跳过”。
498        # 约束：
499        # - force_update=true 时不跳过（强制重传）
500        # - update_tags_only=true 时不跳过（仍允许只更新标签）
501        if (
502            getattr(self, "ignore_upload_record", False)
503            and (not getattr(self, "force_update", False))
504            and (not getattr(self, "update_tags_only", False))
505            and files_to_upload
506        ):
507            muse_skipped = 0
508            muse_checked = 0
509            kept: List[str] = []
510
511            # 尽量复用后续 upload 阶段会用到的同名资产缓存（若 muse_category_path 已给定）
512            try:
513                self._cached_assets_map = {}
514                target_category_path = self._resolve_asset_cache_category_path()
515                if target_category_path:
516                    category_ref_chain = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
517                        target_category_path, recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True
518                    )
519                    if category_ref_chain:
520                        category_id = category_ref_chain[-1].id
521                        self._cached_assets_map = self._load_or_rebuild_name_path_cache(category_id)
522                    else:
523                        lprint(
524                            "[Muse查重][预热缓存失败]",
525                            ("target_category_path", target_category_path),
526                            ("error", "未找到目标分类节点"),
527                            level="CRITICAL",
528                        )
529                        raise RuntimeError("Muse dedupe target category node not found")
530            except Exception as e:
531                traceback.print_exc()
532                lprint(
533                    "[Muse查重][预热缓存失败]",
534                    ("target_category_path", target_category_path if 'target_category_path' in locals() else []),
535                    ("error", str(e)),
536                    level="CRITICAL",
537                )
538                raise
539
540            # 异步并发查重：使用 BaseService.run_batch_async（线程池+Semaphore 限流）
541            # 说明：
542            # - 这里只做“存在则跳过”的判定；查重失败直接视为致命错误退出。
543            # - 预热：查重阶段不创建目录，但需要频繁解析分类路径 → ID 链。
544            #   为避免每个线程各自触发拉树，这里先从 API 拉一次分类树并写入**内存缓存**（不落盘）。
545            category_service = self.muse_helper.category_service
546            max_workers_for_check = int(max(1, min(int(max_concurrent or 5), 10)))
547
548            try:
549                check_pbar = tqdm(
550                    total=len(files_to_upload),
551                    desc="Muse查重",
552                    unit="file",
553                    dynamic_ncols=False,
554                    mininterval=0.2,
555                    file=sys.stderr,
556                    leave=True,
557                )
558            except Exception:
559                check_pbar = None  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
560  # → 调用 _dedupe_sync_report_entries_last_wins()
561            def _check_one(fp: str) -> dict:
562                try:
563                    asset_name, category_list = self.get_name_category(fp)
564                    existed_assets = self.find_muse_assets(asset_name, category_list)
565                    exists = bool(existed_assets)
566                    return {"success": True, "file_path": fp, "exists": exists}
567                except Exception as e:
568                    traceback.print_exc()
569                    lprint(
570                        "[Muse查重][单条检查失败]",
571                        ("file_path", fp),
572                        ("error", str(e)),  # → 调用 _sync_report_entries_to_snapshot_map()
573                        level="CRITICAL",
574                    )
575                    raise
576
577            def _on_check_progress(completed: int, total: int, result: dict) -> None:
578                nonlocal muse_checked, muse_skipped
579                try:
580                    muse_checked = completed
581                    if isinstance(result, dict) and result.get("success") and result.get("exists"):
582                        muse_skipped += 1
583                    if check_pbar is not None:
584                        fp = str(result.get("file_path") or "")
585                        tail = fp.replace("\\", "/")
586                        if len(tail) > 60:
587                            tail = "..." + tail[-57:]
588                        state = "skip" if result.get("exists") else "keep"
589                        if result.get("success") is not True:
590                            state = "err"  # → 调用 materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot()
591                        check_pbar.set_postfix_str(
592                            f"{state} {tail}",
593                            refresh=False,
594                        )
595                        check_pbar.update(1)
596                except Exception:
597                    pass
598
599            # 预热分类树；若启用文件缓存，则优先复用/写入目录树文件缓存。
600            _orig_mem_cache = bool(getattr(category_service, "enable_memory_cache", True))
601            try:
602                if not _orig_mem_cache:
603                    category_service.enable_memory_cache = True
604                try:
605                    use_category_file_cache = bool(getattr(category_service, "enable_file_cache", False))
606                    category_service.get_category_tree_cache(
607                        use_cache=use_category_file_cache,
608                        use_file_cache=use_category_file_cache,
609                        save_to_file=use_category_file_cache,
610                        muse_base_path_segments=None,
611                        show_progress=False,
612                    )
613                except Exception as e:
614                    traceback.print_exc()
615                    lprint(
616                        "[Muse查重][分类树预热失败]",
617                        ("error", str(e)),
618                        ("policy", "已禁止继续逐个解析/继续上传"),
619                        level="CRITICAL",
620                    )
621                    raise
622
623                check_results = category_service.run_batch_async(
624                    items=list(files_to_upload),
625                    process_func=_check_one,
626                    on_progress=_on_check_progress,
627                    max_workers=max_workers_for_check,
628                )
629            finally:
630                try:
631                    category_service.enable_memory_cache = _orig_mem_cache
632                except Exception:
633                    pass
634                if check_pbar is not None:
635                    try:
636                        check_pbar.close()
637                    except Exception:
638                        pass
639
640            # 汇总过滤：exists=True 的跳过；success=False 已在上游视为致命错误退出。
641            for row in check_results or []:
642                fp = str(getattr(row, "get", lambda _k, _d=None: _d)("file_path", "") or "")
643                if not fp:
644                    continue
645                ok = bool(row.get("success"))
646                exists = bool(row.get("exists"))
647                if (not ok) and row.get("error"):
648                    lprint(
649                        "[Muse查重][异常结果残留]",
650                        ("file_path", fp),
651                        ("error", row.get("error")),
652                        level="CRITICAL",
653                    )
654                    raise RuntimeError("Muse dedupe returned unexpected failed result row")
655                if exists:
656                    continue
657                kept.append(fp)
658
659            files_to_upload = kept
660            lprint(
661                f'[Muse查重] ignore_upload_record=1：已检查 {muse_checked} 个文件，'
662                f'发现已存在并跳过 {muse_skipped} 个，最终待上传 {len(files_to_upload)} 个'
663            )
664
665        # limit 不再裁剪候选列表；改为“成功上传 N 个文件后退出”。
666        limit_target = None
667        if self.limit is not None:
668            try:
669                limit_target = max(0, int(self.limit))
670            except Exception:
671                limit_target = None
672        if limit_target == 0:
673            lprint('[limit] limit=0，本次不执行上传')
674            return RunSummary(mode="upload", reason="limit_zero").to_dict()
675        if limit_target:
676            lprint(
677                f'[limit] 已启用成功上传上限：达到 {limit_target} 个成功上传后退出；'
678                f'跳过/失败不计入 limit'
679            )
680
681        if not files_to_upload:
682            lprint('没有需要上传的文件')
683            self.clear_disk_files()
684            return RunSummary(mode="upload", reason="no_files").to_dict()
685
686        # dry_run：与服务器对比标签，不实际上传
687        if self.dry_run:
688            dry_run_files = list(files_to_upload)
689            if limit_target:
690                dry_run_files = dry_run_files[:limit_target]
691                lprint(
692                    "[DRY_RUN][LIMIT]",
693                    ("limit", limit_target),
694                    ("preview_count", len(dry_run_files)),
695                    ("candidate_count", len(files_to_upload)),
696                )
697            lprint(
698                f'[dry_run] 以下 {len(dry_run_files)} 个文件将被上传'
699                f'（dry_run 模式，不实际执行）, 标签规则共 {len(self.tag_rules)} 条'
700            )
701
702            # 预先缓存分类树，避免在循环中重复调用API
703            lprint(f'[缓存] 正在获取分类树...')
704            self._cached_organization_dir = self.muse_client.get_organization_dir()
705            lprint(f'[缓存] 分类树已缓存')
706            
707            # 递归收集所有子分类ID
708            all_category_ids = []
709            if self.muse_category_path:
710                target_category_path = [p.strip() for p in self.muse_category_path.split('/')]
711                lprint(f'[查询根路径] {" / ".join(target_category_path)}')
712                category_ref_chain = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
713                    target_category_path, recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True
714                )
715                if category_ref_chain:
716                    all_category_ids = [category_ref_chain[-1].id]
717                    lprint(f'[分类收集] 目标分类: {" / ".join(target_category_path)} (ID: {all_category_ids[0]})')
718                else:
719                    lprint(f'[分类收集] 未找到目标分类节点: {target_category_path}')
720            else:
721                lprint(f'[错误] 未设置 muse_category_path 参数，无法进行 dry-run 查询')
722            
723            # 批量获取所有分类的资产数据
724            category_assets_map = {}
725            if all_category_ids:
726                try:
727                    lprint(f'\n[批量查询] 正在获取 {len(all_category_ids)} 个分类的资产数据...')
728                    category_assets_map = self._fetch_category_assets_map(all_category_ids)
729                    total_assets = sum(len(assets) for assets in category_assets_map.values())
730                    lprint(f'[批量查询] 完成，共获取 {total_assets} 个资产')
731                except Exception as e:
732                    lprint(f'[批量查询] 失败: {e}')
733                    traceback.print_exc()
734            
735            # 收集所有文件信息并计算新标签
736            lprint(f'\n[解析] 正在解析 {len(dry_run_files)} 个文件...')
737            asset_info_list = []
738            for fp in dry_run_files:
739                try:
740                    asset_name, category_list = self.get_name_category(fp)
741                    path_parts = category_list[len(self.category_root or []):]
742                    new_tags, tag_key = get_tags_for_path(self.tag_rules, path_parts)
743                    asset_info_list.append({
744                        'file_path': fp,
745                        'asset_name': asset_name,
746                        'category_list': category_list,
747                        'path_parts': path_parts,
748                        'new_tags': new_tags,
749                        'tag_key': tag_key
750                    })
751                except Exception as e:
752                    lprint(f'  {fp}  (解析失败: {e})')
753            lprint(f'[解析] 完成，共解析 {len(asset_info_list)} 个文件')
754            
755            # 匹配并输出结果
756            lprint(f'\n{"="*80}')
757            processed_count = 0
758            
759            # 构建分类ID→名称映射
760            category_id_to_name = {}
761            def _collect_id_name(nodes):
762                for node in nodes:
763                    nid = str(node.get('id', ''))
764                    name = node.get('name_multil', {}).get('zh_CN', '')
765                    if nid:
766                        category_id_to_name[nid] = name
767                    _collect_id_name(node.get('children', []))
768            _collect_id_name(self._cached_organization_dir.get(self.muse_lib, []))
769            
770            for info in asset_info_list:
771                old_tags = None
772                asset_id = None
773                local_category_str = ' > '.join(info['category_list']).lower()  # → 调用 _local_to_depot_hangzhou()
774                for category_key, assets_list in category_assets_map.items():
775                    for asset in assets_list:
776                        if asset.asset_name == info['asset_name']:
777                            if asset.category_names:
778                                if isinstance(asset.category_names, list):
779                                    if all(str(cn).isdigit() for cn in asset.category_names):
780                                        names = [category_id_to_name.get(str(cn), str(cn)) for cn in asset.category_names]
781                                        server_category_str = ' > '.join(names).lower()
782                                    else:
783                                        server_category_str = ' > '.join(asset.category_names).lower()
784                                else:
785                                    server_category_str = str(asset.category_names).lower()
786                                if local_category_str == server_category_str or \
787                                   local_category_str.endswith(server_category_str) or \
788                                   server_category_str.endswith(local_category_str):
789                                    old_tags = asset.tags
790                                    asset_id = asset.asset_id
791                                    break
792                            else:
793                                old_tags = asset.tags
794                                asset_id = asset.asset_id
795                                break
796                    if old_tags is not None:
797                        break
798                
799                file_info = f'\n  {info["file_path"]}\n    分类: {" / ".join(info["category_list"])}\n    资产名: {info["asset_name"]}'
800                needs_update = False
801                if old_tags is not None:
802                    old_set = set(old_tags) if old_tags else set()
803                    new_set = set(info['new_tags']) if info['new_tags'] else set()
804                    needs_update = old_set != new_set
805                    tag_info = f'    ⚠️ 服务器旧标签: {old_tags} (asset_id={asset_id}) [需要更新]' if needs_update else f'    服务器旧标签: {old_tags} (asset_id={asset_id}) [标签一致]'
806                else:
807                    tag_info = '    服务器旧标签: [资产不存在]'
808                if info['tag_key']:
809                    update_mark = ' ⚠️' if needs_update else ''
810                    local_tag_info = f'    本地新标签: key="{info["tag_key"]}" -> {info["new_tags"]}{update_mark}'
811                else:
812                    local_tag_info = f'    本地新标签: 未命中规则 path_parts={info["path_parts"]}'
813                has_career_skill = any("职业技能" in cat for cat in info["category_list"])
814                if has_career_skill:
815                    lprint(file_info + '\n' + tag_info + '\n' + local_tag_info)
816                elif needs_update or old_tags is None:
817                    lprint(file_info + '\n' + tag_info + '\n' + local_tag_info, max_prints_per_line=10)
818                else:
819                    lprint(file_info + '\n' + tag_info + '\n' + local_tag_info, max_prints_per_line=2)
820                processed_count += 1
821            
822            lprint(f'\n{"="*80}\n[统计] 总共处理了 {processed_count} 个资产\n{"="*80}')
823            return RunSummary(
824                mode="dry_run",
825                queued=len(dry_run_files),
826                attempted=len(dry_run_files),
827                success=processed_count,
828                processed=len(dry_run_files),
829                limit_consumed=len(dry_run_files),
830                extra={"dry_run": True},
831            ).to_dict()
832
833        lprint(f'发现 {len(files_to_upload)} 个文件待上传，使用{max_concurrent}并发')
834
835        # 上传前：统一批量创建/确认 Muse 目录（避免每个文件重复创建与上传时才报错）
836        files_to_upload = self._precreate_muse_directories_for_files(
837            files_to_upload=files_to_upload,
838            local_file_map=local_file_map if self.skip_p4v else None,
839            show_progress=True,
840        )
841        if not files_to_upload:
842            lprint("目录预创建后，无可上传文件（全部被跳过/失败）", level="WARNING")
843            if self.precreate_only:
844                precreate_summary = dict(getattr(self, "_last_precreate_summary", {}) or {})
845                return RunSummary(
846                    mode="precreate",
847                    failed=len(precreate_summary.get("failed_paths", []) or []),
848                    extra={
849                        "precreate_only": True,
850                        "precreate_summary": precreate_summary,
851                    },
852                ).to_dict()
853            return RunSummary(mode="upload", reason="no_files_after_precreate").to_dict()
854        if self.precreate_only:
855            precreate_summary = dict(getattr(self, "_last_precreate_summary", {}) or {})
856            failed_paths = precreate_summary.get("failed_paths", []) or []
857            return RunSummary(
858                mode="precreate",
859                failed=len(failed_paths),
860                extra={
861                    "precreate_only": True,
862                    "precreate_summary": precreate_summary,
863                },
864            ).to_dict()
865        self._warm_category_tree_after_precreate()
866        
867        # 批量预查询所有资产（避免每个文件都调用API）
868        lprint(f'\n[批量查询] 正在预查询目标分类的所有资产...')
869        self._debug_log('H_PREQUERY', 'prequery start', {
870            'files_to_upload': len(files_to_upload),
871            'muse_category_path': self.muse_category_path,
872            'muse_lib': str(self.muse_lib),
873        })
874        self._cached_assets_map = {}
875        target_category_path = self._resolve_asset_cache_category_path()
876        if target_category_path:
877            try:
878                category_ref_chain = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
879                    target_category_path, recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True
880                )
881                if category_ref_chain:
882                    category_id = category_ref_chain[-1].id
883                    lprint(f'[批量查询] 目标分类: {" / ".join(target_category_path)} (ID: {category_id})')
884                    self._debug_log('H_PREQUERY', 'target category resolved', {
885                        'target_category_path': target_category_path,
886                        'category_id': category_id,
887                    })
888                    self._cached_assets_map = self._load_or_rebuild_name_path_cache(category_id)
889                else:
890                    lprint(f'[批量查询] 警告: 未找到目标分类节点')
891                    self._debug_log('H_PREQUERY', 'target category node not found', {'target_category_path': target_category_path})
892            except Exception as e:
893                traceback.print_exc()
894                lprint(f'[批量查询] 失败: {e}，将回退到逐个查询模式')
895                self._debug_log('H_PREQUERY', 'prequery exception', {'error': str(e)})
896        else:
897            lprint(f'[批量查询] 警告: 未设置 muse_category_path，将回退到逐个查询模式')
898        
899        # 创建上传任务列表
900        tasks = []  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
901        for fp in files_to_upload:
902            local_file = local_file_map.get(fp) if self.skip_p4v else None
903            tasks.append(UploadTask(
904                file_path=fp,
905                asset_name=os.path.basename(fp),
906                category_list=[],
907                metadata={'p4_path': fp, 'local_file': local_file}
908            ))
909
910        # 上传日志中统一使用的 Muse 路径（批次维度；用于强制打印）
911        muse_path_for_logs = target_category_path or (self.muse_category_path or [])
912        muse_path_str_for_logs = " / ".join(muse_path_for_logs) if muse_path_for_logs else ""
913        
914        # 创建上传函数
915        def upload_func(task: UploadTask) -> UploadResult:
916            """单个文件上传函数"""
917            try:
918                metadata = task.metadata or {}
919                p4_path = metadata['p4_path']
920                local_file = metadata.get('local_file')
921                lprint(
922                    "[p4_to_muse][上传开始]",
923                    ("progress_hint", "see on_progress"),
924                    ("p4_path", p4_path),
925                    ("local_file", local_file),
926                    ("muse_path", muse_path_str_for_logs),
927                    level="WARNING",
928                    force_print=True,
929                    max_prints_per_line=999,
930                )
931                result = self.sync_file(p4_path, local_file)
932                
933                # sync_file 返回 'created'/'updated'/'skipped'/'failed'
934                if result == UploadResultStatus.FAILED.value:
935                    return UploadResult(
936                        task=task,
937                        status=UploadStatus.FAILED,
938                        error_message='failed'
939                    )
940                elif result == UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value:
941                    return UploadResult(
942                        task=task,
943                        status=UploadStatus.SKIPPED,
944                        error_message='skipped'
945                    )
946                else:  # → 调用 _resolve_local_config_relative_path()
947                    # created / updated / recreated 都算 SUCCESS，用 error_message 保存细分状态
948                    return UploadResult(
949                        task=task,
950                        status=UploadStatus.SUCCESS,
951                        error_message=result or 'created'
952                    )
953            except Exception as e:
954                error_trace = traceback.format_exc()  # → 调用 load_tag_rules_from_file()
955                error_msg = f"{type(e).__name__}: {str(e)}"
956                lprint(
957                    "[p4_to_muse][上传失败]",
958                    ("file_path", task.file_path),
959                    ("error", error_msg),
960                    level="WARNING",
961                    force_print=True,
962                    max_prints_per_line=999,
963                )
964                self._append_report_entry({  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
965                    'action': 'failed',
966                    'file_path': task.file_path,
967                    'error': error_msg,
968                    'traceback': error_trace,
969                })
970                return UploadResult(
971                    task=task,  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
972                    status=UploadStatus.FAILED,
973                    error_message=error_msg
974                )
975        
976        # 使用 tqdm 创建进度条
977        start_time = time.time()
978        success_count = 0
979        uploaded_success_count = 0
980        failed_count = 0
981        detail_counts = {
982            UploadResultStatus.CREATED.value: 0,
983            UploadResultStatus.UPDATED.value: 0,
984            UploadResultStatus.RECREATED.value: 0,
985            UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value: 0,
986            UploadResultStatus.FAILED.value: 0,
987        }
988        
989        # 创建 tqdm 进度条
990        pbar = tqdm(total=len(tasks), desc="上传进度", unit="文件")
991        
992        # 进度回调
993        def on_progress(completed: int, total: int, result: UploadResult):
994            """进度回调"""
995            nonlocal success_count, uploaded_success_count, failed_count
996            
997            detail_status = result.error_message or result.status.value
998            if detail_status in detail_counts:
999                detail_counts[detail_status] += 1
1000  # → 调用 _split_category_root_segments()
1001            if result.status in (UploadStatus.SUCCESS, UploadStatus.SKIPPED):
1002                success_count += 1
1003                if result.task.metadata and 'p4_path' in result.task.metadata:  # → 调用 _common_category_root()
1004                    uploaded_paths.append(result.task.metadata['p4_path'])
1005            if result.status == UploadStatus.SUCCESS:
1006                uploaded_success_count += 1
1007            else:
1008                if result.status != UploadStatus.SKIPPED:
1009                    failed_count += 1
1010            
1011            # 更新 tqdm 进度条
1012            pbar.set_postfix({
1013                'ok': uploaded_success_count,
1014                'skip': detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value],
1015                'fail': failed_count,
1016                'pid': os.getpid(),
1017            })
1018            pbar.update(1)
1019
1020            # 用户诉求：上传时强制 lprint 打印进度 + 本地/上传路径 + muse 路径
1021            try:
1022                md = result.task.metadata or {}
1023                lprint(
1024                    "[p4_to_muse][上传进度]",
1025                    ("progress", f"{completed}/{total}"),
1026                    ("status", detail_status),  # → 调用 _load_local_config()
1027                    ("p4_path", md.get("p4_path") or result.task.file_path),
1028                    ("local_file", md.get("local_file")),
1029                    ("muse_path", muse_path_str_for_logs),
1030                    level="WARNING",
1031                    force_print=True,
1032                    max_prints_per_line=999,
1033                )
1034            except Exception:
1035                pass
1036            
1037            if result.status not in (UploadStatus.SUCCESS, UploadStatus.SKIPPED):  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1038                pbar.write(f'[{completed}/{total}] ✗ {result.task.file_path}: {result.error_message}')
1039        
1040        # 上传并发仅在此传入：CLI --max_concurrent → max_workers → UploadService.run_batch_async → Semaphore
1041        results = []
1042        attempted_task_count = 0
1043        if limit_target:
1044            for task in tasks:
1045                if uploaded_success_count >= limit_target:
1046                    lprint(f'[limit] 已达到成功上传上限 {limit_target}，停止后续上传')
1047                    break
1048                batch_results = self.muse_helper.batch_upload(
1049                    tasks=[task],
1050                    upload_func=upload_func,
1051                    on_progress=on_progress,
1052                    max_workers=1,
1053                )
1054                attempted_task_count += 1
1055                results.extend(batch_results)  # → 调用 _init_tag_rules_from_local_config()
1056        else:
1057            results = self.muse_helper.batch_upload(
1058                tasks=tasks,  # → 调用 _infer_config_common_category_root()
1059                upload_func=upload_func,
1060                on_progress=on_progress,
1061                max_workers=max_concurrent,
1062            )
1063            attempted_task_count = len(tasks)
1064        
1065        # 关闭进度条
1066        pbar.close()
1067        
1068        # 统计结果（results 已经是 UploadResult 列表）
1069        stats = BatchUploadStats(results)
1070        total_time = time.time() - start_time
1071        avg_speed = attempted_task_count / total_time if total_time > 0 else 0
1072        
1073        # 打印总结信息
1074        report = (
1075            f'\n{"="*80}\n上传完成！\n{"="*80}\n'
1076            f'尝试文件: {attempted_task_count} / {len(tasks)} 个\n'
1077            f'  ✦ 成功上传: {uploaded_success_count} 个\n'
1078            f'  ✦ 新建资产: {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.CREATED.value]} 个\n'
1079            f'  ✦ 更新标签: {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.UPDATED.value]} 个\n'
1080            f'  ✦ 删除重建: {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.RECREATED.value]} 个\n'
1081            f'  ✦ 标签匹配跳过: {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value]} 个\n'
1082            f'  ✗ 失败: {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.FAILED.value]} 个\n'
1083            f'总耗时: {total_time:.1f} 秒\n'
1084            f'平均速度: {avg_speed:.2f} 文件/秒\n'
1085            f'{"="*80}'
1086        )
1087        lprint(report)
1088        
1089        lprint(f'上传完成: 成功上传 {uploaded_success_count}, 新建 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.CREATED.value]}, 更新标签 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.UPDATED.value]}, 删除重建 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.RECREATED.value]}, 跳过 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value]}, 失败 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.FAILED.value]}, 耗时 {total_time:.1f}秒')
1090        
1091        # 收集上传记录（禁用文件写入，避免文件锁超时）
1092        if uploaded_paths:
1093            for p4_path in uploaded_paths:
1094                if p4_path not in self.upload_file_list:
1095                    self.upload_file_list.append(p4_path)
1096            # 禁用文件写入
1097            # self.log_file.save({'history': self.upload_file_list})
1098            lprint(f'[记录收集] 共收集 {len(uploaded_paths)} 条上传路径（未写入文件）')
1099
1100        # 不删除本地文件，仅记录日志
1101        # self.clear_disk_files()
1102        lprint(f'已处理 {success_count} 个文件，其中成功上传 {uploaded_success_count} 个（新建 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.CREATED.value]}, 更新标签 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.UPDATED.value]}, 删除重建 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.RECREATED.value]}），本地文件已保留')
1103
1104        # 增量明细先保存在内存；run_parallel 结束时由主线程去重写入 sync_report.json（见装饰器 finally）
1105        lprint(
1106            '[报告]',
1107            ('sync_report_json', getattr(self, '_sync_report_json', '')),
1108            ('本次内存明细数', len(getattr(self, '_sync_report', []) or [])),
1109        )
1110        lprint(
1111            f'[报告] 上传/验证线程不再写 jsonl；json 为去重快照供下次启动加载；'
1112            f'本次约 skipped={detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value]} 条、'
1113            f'updated={detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.UPDATED.value]} 条、'
1114            f'created={detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.CREATED.value]} 条、'
1115            f'recreated={detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.RECREATED.value]} 条。'
1116            f'查看标签更新请在文件中搜索 "action": "updated"（或仅搜 updated）。'
1117        )
1118
1119        # 返回本次批次摘要，供外层（upload_test.py）做全局 limit 控制
1120        skipped_count = detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value]
1121        return RunSummary(
1122            mode="upload",
1123            queued=len(tasks),
1124            attempted=attempted_task_count,
1125            success=success_count,
1126            uploaded=uploaded_success_count,
1127            processed=attempted_task_count,
1128            failed=failed_count,
1129            skipped=skipped_count,
1130            limit_consumed=uploaded_success_count,
1131            detail_counts=dict(detail_counts),
1132        ).to_dict()
1133

# >>深度7 路径1-1-3-2-5-6-1 #98 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:3648 in run_parallel() ← :73 ⏱️[14.7900s] 🔥 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

3648    @_p4_track_run_parallel_call  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254971524368_6152:变量·self·self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.p4_to_muse_new.p4_to_m…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.p4_to_muse_new.p4_to_muse_new.P4ToMuse object at 0x000001CDEC812E90>, max_concurrent=10, self.args_data={'upload_dir': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', 'batch_index': 1, 'batch_total': 55, 'force_update': False, 'ignore_upload_record': False, 'max_concurrent': 10, 'muse_timeout': None, 'skip_p4v': True, 'limit': 1, 'dry_run': False, 'precreate_only': False, 'verify_sync_report': True, 'update_tags_only': False, 'muse_category_path': None, 'days': 1, 'last_days': 0, 'user_mail': 'wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', 'sync_ext': '.max', 'category_cache_mode': 'file', 'config_path': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\H42\\h42_p4_to_muse.yaml', 'cache_dir': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', 'precreate_state_path': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache\\pre_create_dir.json', 'save_sync_report': True, 'save_index_cache': True, 'save_raw_cache': True}, self.cache_dir='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', self.ignore_upload_record=False, self.save_sync_report=True, self.save_index_cache=True, self.save_raw_cache=True, self.user_mail='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', self.upload_dir='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', self.days=1, self.last_days=0, self.context=None, self.skip_p4v=True, self.limit=1
self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.p4_to_muse_new.p4_to_muse_new.P4ToMuse object at 0x000001CDEC812E90>, max_concurrent=10, self.args_data={'upload_dir': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', 'batch_index': 1, 'batch_total': 55, 'force_update': False, 'ignore_upload_record': False, 'max_concurrent': 10, 'muse_timeout': None, 'skip_p4v': True, 'limit': 1, 'dry_run': False, 'precreate_only': False, 'verify_sync_report': True, 'update_tags_only': False, 'muse_category_path': None, 'days': 1, 'last_days': 0, 'user_mail': 'wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', 'sync_ext': '.max', 'category_cache_mode': 'file', 'config_path': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\H42\\h42_p4_to_muse.yaml', 'cache_dir': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', 'precreate_state_path': 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache\\pre_create_dir.json', 'save_sync_report': True, 'save_index_cache': True, 'save_raw_cache': True}, self.cache_dir='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', self.ignore_upload_record=False, self.save_sync_report=True, self.save_index_cache=True, self.save_raw_cache=True, self.user_mail='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', self.upload_dir='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', self.days=1, self.last_days=0, self.context=None, self.skip_p4v=True, self.limit=1
3649    def run_parallel(self, max_concurrent=10):
3650        """使用 BatchUploader 并行上传文件"""
3651        if getattr(self, "verify_sync_report", False) and not getattr(self, "precreate_only", False):
3652            return self._run_verify_sync_report_against_muse(max_concurrent=max_concurrent)  # → 调用 _run_verify_sync_report_against_muse()
3653
3654        # precreate-only: scan local subdirs and create Muse dirs (with resume state)
3655        if getattr(self, "precreate_only", False):
3656            pre = self._precreate_dirs_from_source_root_with_resume()
3657            self._last_precreate_summary = dict(pre or {})
3658            return RunSummary(
3659                mode="precreate",
3660                failed=int((pre or {}).get("failed_count", 0) or 0),
3661                extra={
3662                    "precreate_only": True,
3663                    "precreate_summary": dict(pre or {}),
3664                },
3665            ).to_dict()
3666        self.load_upload_log()
3667        lprint(
3668            f'[run_parallel] 续传已加载 {len(self.upload_file_list)} 条成功路径，'
3669            f'继续构建扫描/清单任务（若长时间无输出，多为正在读取大 manifest）'
3670        )
3671        upload_file_set = set(self.upload_file_list)
3672        
3673        # 收集成功上传的路径（由 on_progress 填充，主线程统一写入）
3674        uploaded_paths = []
3675
3676        # 如果 skip_p4v，直接扫描本地文件而不调用 update_p4v
3677        local_file_map = {}  # 本地路径到P4路径的映射
3678        
3679        if self.skip_p4v:
3680            file_list = []
3681            local_dir = self.upload_dir.replace('\\', '/')
3682            if local_dir.startswith('//'):
3683                local_dir = local_dir.replace('//hangzhou/', 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/')
3684
3685            if not os.path.exists(local_dir):
3686                self.log.error(f'本地目录不存在: {local_dir}')
3687                return RunSummary(
3688                    mode="upload",
3689                    ok=False,
3690                    reason="local_dir_missing",
3691                    failed=1,
3692                ).to_dict()
3693
3694            scan_count = [0]
3695            skip_count = [0]
3696            start_time = time.time()
3697            limit = self.limit
3698            reached_limit = [False]
3699
3700            def _scan_log(msg: str) -> None:
3701                """与进度条同屏时用 tqdm.write，避免 print/lprint 打断单行刷新。"""
3702                tqdm.write(msg, file=sys.stderr)
3703
3704            current_scan_dir = ['']
3705            current_scan_depot_key = ['']  # 当前扫描根的 depot 路径，用于 manifest directory 字段
3706            # [当前根在 upload.txt 中的全局序号 1..N, 根总数 N]；全树扫描为 [1,1]
3707            scan_root_pos = [0, 0]
3708            scan_main_pid = os.getpid()
3709            current_scan_worker_pid = [0]
3710            local_prefix = 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/'
3711            p4_prefix = '//hangzhou/'
3712            sync_ext_lower = ''
3713            if self.sync_ext:
3714                sync_ext_lower = self.sync_ext.lower()
3715                if not sync_ext_lower.startswith('.'):
3716                    sync_ext_lower = f'.{sync_ext_lower}'
3717
3718            # 先算 root_tasks，再决定是否创建 tqdm/worker（无根任务时不创建进度条，避免卡住且无后续输出）
3719            root_tasks: List[dict] = []
3720            scan_root_pos[1] = 1
3721            depot_key_single = self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(local_dir)
3722            # 检查 scan_progress，支持断点续扫
3723            if getattr(self, "ignore_upload_record", False):
3724                # ignore_upload_record：同时禁用 scan_progress 续扫，否则会把目录误判为“已完成扫描”，
3725                # 导致不扫描、manifest 也无记录，最终 file_list 为空（看起来像没去 Muse 检查）。
3726                completed_scan_dirs_single = set()
3727                _scan_log('[扫描续扫] ignore_upload_record=1：忽略 scan_progress 续扫标记，强制重新扫描本地目录')
3728            else:
3729                completed_scan_dirs_single = self._load_completed_scan_dirs(log_fn=_scan_log)
3730            if self._upload_root_in_completed_set(local_dir, depot_key_single, completed_scan_dirs_single):
3731                _scan_log(f'[扫描续扫] 目录已完成，跳过扫描: {depot_key_single}')
3732            elif os.path.exists(local_dir):
3733                root_tasks.append({
3734                    'root_index': 1,
3735                    'root_dir': local_dir,
3736                    'depot_key': depot_key_single,
3737                })
3738
3739            if (
3740                not root_tasks
3741                and self._scan_manifest_file
3742                and os.path.exists(self._scan_manifest_file)
3743            ):
3744                # 按当前 upload_dir 的本地路径过滤 manifest
3745                _filter_dirs: List[str] = [str(local_dir).replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')]
3746                restored, lm = self._restore_upload_queue_from_scan_manifest(
3747                    filter_directories=_filter_dirs
3748                )
3749                if restored:
3750                    file_list = restored
3751                    local_file_map.update(lm)
3752                    lprint(
3753                        f'[扫描续扫] 无待扫描根目录，已从 scan_manifest 恢复 {len(file_list)} 条路径，进入过滤与上传'
3754                    )
3755                else:
3756                    lprint(
3757                        f'[扫描续扫] 无待扫描根目录，且 scan_manifest 未解析出路径: {self._scan_manifest_file}'
3758                    )
3759            elif root_tasks:
3760                scan_pbar = tqdm(
3761                    desc='扫描',
3762                    unit='项',
3763                    ncols=self._SCAN_PBAR_NCOLS,
3764                    dynamic_ncols=False,
3765                    mininterval=0.4,
3766                    miniters=128,
3767                    position=0,
3768                    leave=True,
3769                    file=sys.stderr,
3770                )
3771
3772                try:
3773                    scan_session_roots_total = len(root_tasks)
3774                    scan_roots_done = [0]
3775                    worker_count = max(1, min(max_concurrent, len(root_tasks)))
3776                    _scan_log(
