3777                        f'[扫描] 本批根任务数={scan_session_roots_total} workers={worker_count}'
3778                    )
3779                    # max_concurrent==1 时不要使用多进程（Windows spawn 成本高且易导致“limit=1 仍卡很久”的错觉）
3780                    # 这里改为：worker_count==1 走单线程 worker；>1 才启用 multiprocessing。
3781                    if worker_count <= 1:
3782                        task_queue = queue.Queue()
3783                        result_queue = queue.Queue()
3784                        stop_event = threading.Event()
3785                    else:
3786                        ctx = mp.get_context('spawn')
3787                        task_queue = ctx.Queue()
3788                        result_queue = ctx.Queue()
3789                        stop_event = ctx.Event()
3790
3791                    for task in root_tasks:
3792                        task_queue.put(task)
3793                    for _ in range(worker_count):
3794                        task_queue.put(None)
3795
3796                    workers: List = []
3797                    if worker_count <= 1:
3798                        t = threading.Thread(
3799                            target=_scan_worker_loop,
3800                            args=(
3801                                task_queue,
3802                                result_queue,
3803                                stop_event,
3804                                sync_ext_lower,
3805                                upload_file_set,
3806                                local_prefix,
3807                                p4_prefix,
3808                            ),
3809                            daemon=True,
3810                        )
3811                        t.start()
3812                        workers.append(t)
3813                    else:
3814                        for _ in range(worker_count):
3815                            proc = ctx.Process(
3816                                target=_scan_worker_loop,
3817                                args=(
3818                                    task_queue,
3819                                    result_queue,
3820                                    stop_event,
3821                                    sync_ext_lower,
3822                                    upload_file_set,
3823                                    local_prefix,
3824                                    p4_prefix,
3825                                ),
3826                            )
3827                            proc.daemon = True
3828                            proc.start()
3829                            workers.append(proc)
3830
3831                    roots_inflight = [0]
3832                    worker_pulse_buf: Dict[int, Dict[str, Any]] = {}
3833
3834                    def _pulse_summary() -> str:
3835                        return self._scan_worker_pulse_summary(worker_pulse_buf)
3836
3837                    def _scan_workers_alive() -> int:
3838                        return sum(1 for p in workers if p.is_alive())
3839
3840                    worker_exit_count = 0
3841                    last_ui_refresh_ts = time.time()
3842
3843                    def _scan_pbar_refresh_postfix(now: float) -> None:
3844                        """与队列空闲时兜底刷新共用：更新 postfix 中的 t= 与 proc/ifl/r 等。"""
3845                        scan_pbar.set_postfix_str(
3846                            self._scan_pbar_postfix_str(
3847                                scan_root_pos[0] if scan_root_pos[0] > 0 else 1,
3848                                scan_root_pos[1] if scan_root_pos[1] > 0 else 1,
3849                                now - start_time,
3850                                current_scan_dir[0],
3851                                scan_main_pid,
3852                                current_scan_worker_pid[0] or None,
3853                                workers_alive=_scan_workers_alive(),
3854                                workers_total=worker_count,
3855                                roots_inflight=roots_inflight[0],
3856                                roots_done_session=scan_roots_done[0],
3857                                roots_total_session=scan_session_roots_total,
3858                                pulse_summary=_pulse_summary(),
3859                            )
3860                        )
3861                        scan_pbar.refresh()
3862
3863                    while worker_exit_count < worker_count:
3864                        try:
3865                            msg = result_queue.get(timeout=0.25)
3866                        except queue.Empty:
3867                            # windterm 下队列阻塞等待时，tqdm 可能长时间不重绘；主动刷新兜底
3868                            now = time.time()
3869                            if now - last_ui_refresh_ts >= 0.5:
3870                                last_ui_refresh_ts = now
3871                                _scan_pbar_refresh_postfix(now)
3872                            continue
3873                        kind = msg.get('kind')
3874                        if kind == 'worker_exit':
3875                            worker_exit_count += 1
3876                            continue
3877                        if kind == 'worker_pulse':
3878                            wp = msg.get('worker_pid')
3879                            if wp is not None:
3880                                pid = int(wp)
3881                                worker_pulse_buf[pid] = {
3882                                    'root_index': int(msg.get('root_index', 0)),
3883                                    'current_dir': str(msg.get('current_dir', '')),
3884                                    'visited': int(msg.get('visited', 0)),
3885                                    'hit': int(msg.get('hit', 0)),
3886                                    'stack': int(msg.get('stack', 0)),
3887                                }
3888                            now = time.time()
3889                            last_ui_refresh_ts = now
3890                            _scan_pbar_refresh_postfix(now)
3891                            continue
3892                        if kind == 'tick':
3893                            scan_pbar.update(int(msg.get('n', 0)))
3894                            # tick 密集时主循环不会进入 queue.Empty，postfix 的 t= 会停在旧值；节流刷新
3895                            now = time.time()
3896                            if now - last_ui_refresh_ts >= 0.5:
3897                                last_ui_refresh_ts = now
3898                                _scan_pbar_refresh_postfix(now)
3899                            continue
3900                        if kind == 'root_start':
3901                            scan_root_pos[0] = int(msg.get('root_index', 1))
3902                            current_scan_dir[0] = str(msg.get('root_dir', ''))
3903                            current_scan_depot_key[0] = str(msg.get('depot_key', ''))
3904                            wp = msg.get('worker_pid')
3905                            current_scan_worker_pid[0] = int(wp) if wp is not None else 0
3906                            roots_inflight[0] += 1
3907                            scan_pbar.set_postfix_str(
3908                                self._scan_pbar_postfix_str(
3909                                    scan_root_pos[0],
3910                                    scan_root_pos[1] if scan_root_pos[1] > 0 else 1,
3911                                    time.time() - start_time,
3912                                    current_scan_dir[0],
3913                                    scan_main_pid,
3914                                    current_scan_worker_pid[0] or None,
3915                                    workers_alive=_scan_workers_alive(),
3916                                    workers_total=worker_count,
3917                                    roots_inflight=roots_inflight[0],
3918                                    roots_done_session=scan_roots_done[0],
3919                                    roots_total_session=scan_session_roots_total,
3920                                    pulse_summary=_pulse_summary(),
3921                                )
3922                            )
3923                            continue
3924                        if kind == 'files':
3925                            items = msg.get('items') or []
3926                            for item in items:
3927                                if reached_limit[0]:
3928                                    break
3929                                p4_path = str(item['p4_path'])
3930                                local_path = str(item['local_path'])
3931                                file_list.append(p4_path)
3932                                self.p4v_file_list[local_path] = p4_path
3933                                local_file_map[p4_path] = local_path
3934                                self._append_scan_manifest(p4_path, local_path, directory=current_scan_dir[0])
3935                                scan_count[0] += 1
3936                                if limit and scan_count[0] >= limit:
3937                                    reached_limit[0] = True
3938                                    stop_event.set()
3939                                    _scan_log(f'[扫描] 已达到 limit={limit}，提前终止')
3940                                    break
3941
3942                            continue
3943                        if kind == 'root_done':
3944                            wpid = msg.get('worker_pid')
3945                            if wpid is not None:
3946                                worker_pulse_buf.pop(int(wpid), None)
3947                            roots_inflight[0] = max(0, roots_inflight[0] - 1)
3948                            scan_roots_done[0] += 1
3949                            skip_count[0] += int(msg.get('skip_count', 0))
3950                            if not reached_limit[0]:
3951                                self._flush_scan_manifest_buffer()
3952                                self._append_scan_dir_completed(
3953                                    # 写本地根目录
3954                                    str(msg.get('root_dir', '') or ''),
3955                                    # 写“目录内总 max 数”（不受 upload_file_set 去重/跳过影响）
3956                                    max_count=int(msg.get('total_hit_count', 0) or 0),
3957                                )
3958                            now = time.time()
3959                            scan_pbar.set_postfix_str(
3960                                self._scan_pbar_postfix_str(
3961                                    int(msg.get('root_index', scan_root_pos[0] or 1)),
3962                                    scan_root_pos[1] if scan_root_pos[1] > 0 else 1,
3963                                    now - start_time,
3964                                    current_scan_dir[0],
3965                                    scan_main_pid,
3966                                    current_scan_worker_pid[0] or None,
3967                                    workers_alive=_scan_workers_alive(),
3968                                    workers_total=worker_count,
3969                                    roots_inflight=roots_inflight[0],
3970                                    roots_done_session=scan_roots_done[0],
3971                                    roots_total_session=scan_session_roots_total,
3972                                    pulse_summary=_pulse_summary(),
3973                                )
3974                            )
3975
3976                    for proc in workers:
3977                        proc.join(timeout=2.0)
3978                finally:
3979                    # 扫描阶段结束前，兜底刷盘，确保缓冲记录落地
3980                    self._flush_scan_manifest_buffer()
3981                    scan_pbar.close()
3982                _scan_log(
3983                    f'[扫描完成] 收集: {scan_count[0]}, 跳过: {skip_count[0]}, '
3984                    f'耗时: {time.time() - start_time:.1f}秒'
3985                )
3986                if (
3987                    not file_list
3988                    and self._scan_manifest_file
3989                    and os.path.exists(self._scan_manifest_file)
3990                ):
3991                    _filter_dirs2: List[str] = [str(local_dir).replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')]
3992                    restored, lm = self._restore_upload_queue_from_scan_manifest(
3993                        filter_directories=_filter_dirs2
3994                    )
3995                    if restored:
3996                        file_list = restored
3997                        local_file_map.update(lm)
3998                        lprint(
3999                            f'[扫描续扫] 扫描结果为空，已从 scan_manifest 补全 {len(file_list)} 条路径'
4000                        )
4001            else:
4002                # 非 upload_list 且 root_tasks 为空：理论上本地根目录不存在时已 return
4003                if not root_tasks:
4004                    lprint('[扫描] 无根目录可扫描（请检查 upload_dir / upload_list）')
4005        else:
4006            file_list = self.update_p4v()
4007        
4008        self.clear_files = []
4009        
4010        # 过滤需要上传的文件
4011        files_to_upload = []
4012        ignored_count = 0
4013        uploaded_count = 0
4014        ext_filtered_count = 0
4015        
4016        lprint(f'过滤文件: 总计 {len(file_list)}, 历史记录 {len(self.upload_file_list)}')
4017        
4018        for file_path in file_list:
4019            if self.is_ignore_file(file_path):
4020                ignored_count += 1
4021                continue
4022            if file_path in upload_file_set:
4023                uploaded_count += 1
4024                self.log.debug(f'已上传过，跳过: {file_path}')
4025                continue
4026            if self.sync_ext and not file_path.endswith(self.sync_ext):
4027                ext_filtered_count += 1
4028                continue
4029            files_to_upload.append(file_path)
4030
4031        # sync_report 中 action=failed 的路径：合并进待上传，避免仅依赖 manifest 时漏掉重试
4032        retry_merged = 0
4033        failed_depot = getattr(self, "_sync_report_failed_depot_paths", None) or set()
4034        if failed_depot:
4035            ul = self.upload_dir.replace("\\", "/").rstrip("/")
4036            if ul.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
4037                root_local = ul.replace("//hangzhou/", "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/")
4038                root_depot = ul
4039            else:
4040                root_local = ul
4041                root_depot = (
4042                    self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(ul)
4043                    if ul.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/")
4044                    else ""
4045                )
4046            ft_seen: Set[str] = set(files_to_upload)
4047            for dep in failed_depot:
4048                if not dep.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
4049                    continue
4050                if not P4ToMuse._sync_report_depot_under_upload_dir(dep, root_local, root_depot):
4051                    continue
4052                if self.is_ignore_file(dep):
4053                    continue
4054                if self.sync_ext and not dep.endswith(self.sync_ext):
4055                    continue
4056                # 显式失败项优先重试：不因历史成功集合跳过（避免误标成功导致 Muse 实际缺失仍漏传）
4057                if dep in ft_seen:
4058                    continue
4059                ft_seen.add(dep)
4060                files_to_upload.append(dep)
4061                retry_merged += 1
4062            if retry_merged:
4063                lprint(
4064                    "[sync_report]",
4065                    ("合并失败重试路径", retry_merged),
4066                    ("说明", "来自 sync_report 快照中 action=failed，且位于当前 upload_dir"),
4067                )
4068
4069        lprint(
4070            f'过滤结果: 忽略 {ignored_count}, 已上传 {uploaded_count}, '
4071            f'扩展名不匹配 {ext_filtered_count}, 待上传 {len(files_to_upload)}'
4072            + (f'（含 sync_report 失败重试 {retry_merged} 条）' if retry_merged else '')
4073        )
4074
4075        # 可选：忽略本地上传记录时，改为通过 Muse 查询判断“已存在则跳过”。
4076        # 约束：
4077        # - force_update=true 时不跳过（强制重传）
4078        # - update_tags_only=true 时不跳过（仍允许只更新标签）
4079        if (
4080            getattr(self, "ignore_upload_record", False)
4081            and (not getattr(self, "force_update", False))
4082            and (not getattr(self, "update_tags_only", False))
4083            and files_to_upload
4084        ):
4085            muse_skipped = 0
4086            muse_checked = 0
4087            kept: List[str] = []
4088
4089            # 尽量复用后续 upload 阶段会用到的同名资产缓存（若 muse_category_path 已给定）
4090            try:
4091                self._cached_assets_map = {}
4092                target_category_path = self._resolve_asset_cache_category_path()
4093                if target_category_path:
4094                    category_ref_chain = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
4095                        target_category_path, recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True
4096                    )
4097                    if category_ref_chain:
4098                        category_id = category_ref_chain[-1].id
4099                        self._cached_assets_map = self._load_or_rebuild_name_path_cache(category_id)
4100                    else:
4101                        lprint(
4102                            "[Muse查重][预热缓存失败]",
4103                            ("target_category_path", target_category_path),
4104                            ("error", "未找到目标分类节点"),
4105                            level="CRITICAL",
4106                        )
4107                        raise RuntimeError("Muse dedupe target category node not found")
4108            except Exception as e:
4109                traceback.print_exc()
4110                lprint(
4111                    "[Muse查重][预热缓存失败]",
4112                    ("target_category_path", target_category_path if 'target_category_path' in locals() else []),
4113                    ("error", str(e)),
4114                    level="CRITICAL",
4115                )
4116                raise
4117
4118            # 异步并发查重：使用 BaseService.run_batch_async（线程池+Semaphore 限流）
4119            # 说明：
4120            # - 这里只做“存在则跳过”的判定；查重失败直接视为致命错误退出。
4121            # - 预热：查重阶段不创建目录，但需要频繁解析分类路径 → ID 链。
4122            #   为避免每个线程各自触发拉树，这里先从 API 拉一次分类树并写入**内存缓存**（不落盘）。
4123            category_service = self.muse_helper.category_service
4124            max_workers_for_check = int(max(1, min(int(max_concurrent or 5), 10)))
4125
4126            try:
4127                check_pbar = tqdm(
4128                    total=len(files_to_upload),
4129                    desc="Muse查重",
4130                    unit="file",
4131                    dynamic_ncols=False,
4132                    mininterval=0.2,
4133                    file=sys.stderr,
4134                    leave=True,
4135                )
4136            except Exception:
4137                check_pbar = None
4138
4139            def _check_one(fp: str) -> dict:
4140                try:
4141                    asset_name, category_list = self.get_name_category(fp)
4142                    existed_assets = self.find_muse_assets(asset_name, category_list)
4143                    exists = bool(existed_assets)
4144                    return {"success": True, "file_path": fp, "exists": exists}
4145                except Exception as e:
4146                    traceback.print_exc()
4147                    lprint(
4148                        "[Muse查重][单条检查失败]",
4149                        ("file_path", fp),
4150                        ("error", str(e)),
4151                        level="CRITICAL",
4152                    )
4153                    raise
4154
4155            def _on_check_progress(completed: int, total: int, result: dict) -> None:
4156                nonlocal muse_checked, muse_skipped
4157                try:
4158                    muse_checked = completed
4159                    if isinstance(result, dict) and result.get("success") and result.get("exists"):
4160                        muse_skipped += 1
4161                    if check_pbar is not None:
4162                        fp = str(result.get("file_path") or "")
4163                        tail = fp.replace("\\", "/")
4164                        if len(tail) > 60:
4165                            tail = "..." + tail[-57:]
4166                        state = "skip" if result.get("exists") else "keep"
4167                        if result.get("success") is not True:
4168                            state = "err"
4169                        check_pbar.set_postfix_str(
4170                            f"{state} {tail}",
4171                            refresh=False,
4172                        )
4173                        check_pbar.update(1)
4174                except Exception:
4175                    pass
4176
4177            # 预热分类树；若启用文件缓存，则优先复用/写入目录树文件缓存。
4178            _orig_mem_cache = bool(getattr(category_service, "enable_memory_cache", True))
4179            try:
4180                if not _orig_mem_cache:
4181                    category_service.enable_memory_cache = True
4182                try:
4183                    use_category_file_cache = bool(getattr(category_service, "enable_file_cache", False))
4184                    category_service.get_category_tree_cache(
4185                        use_cache=use_category_file_cache,
4186                        use_file_cache=use_category_file_cache,
4187                        save_to_file=use_category_file_cache,
4188                        muse_base_path_segments=None,
4189                        show_progress=False,
4190                    )
4191                except Exception as e:
4192                    traceback.print_exc()
4193                    lprint(
4194                        "[Muse查重][分类树预热失败]",
4195                        ("error", str(e)),
4196                        ("policy", "已禁止继续逐个解析/继续上传"),
4197                        level="CRITICAL",
4198                    )
4199                    raise
4200
4201                check_results = category_service.run_batch_async(
4202                    items=list(files_to_upload),
4203                    process_func=_check_one,
4204                    on_progress=_on_check_progress,
4205                    max_workers=max_workers_for_check,
4206                )
4207            finally:
4208                try:
4209                    category_service.enable_memory_cache = _orig_mem_cache
4210                except Exception:
4211                    pass
4212                if check_pbar is not None:
4213                    try:
4214                        check_pbar.close()
4215                    except Exception:
4216                        pass
4217
4218            # 汇总过滤：exists=True 的跳过；success=False 已在上游视为致命错误退出。
4219            for row in check_results or []:
4220                fp = str(getattr(row, "get", lambda _k, _d=None: _d)("file_path", "") or "")
4221                if not fp:
4222                    continue
4223                ok = bool(row.get("success"))
4224                exists = bool(row.get("exists"))
4225                if (not ok) and row.get("error"):
4226                    lprint(
4227                        "[Muse查重][异常结果残留]",
4228                        ("file_path", fp),
4229                        ("error", row.get("error")),
4230                        level="CRITICAL",
4231                    )
4232                    raise RuntimeError("Muse dedupe returned unexpected failed result row")
4233                if exists:
4234                    continue
4235                kept.append(fp)
4236
4237            files_to_upload = kept
4238            lprint(
4239                f'[Muse查重] ignore_upload_record=1：已检查 {muse_checked} 个文件，'
4240                f'发现已存在并跳过 {muse_skipped} 个，最终待上传 {len(files_to_upload)} 个'
4241            )
4242
4243        # limit 不再裁剪候选列表；改为“成功上传 N 个文件后退出”。
4244        limit_target = None
4245        if self.limit is not None:
4246            try:
4247                limit_target = max(0, int(self.limit))
4248            except Exception:
4249                limit_target = None
4250        if limit_target == 0:
4251            lprint('[limit] limit=0，本次不执行上传')
4252            return RunSummary(mode="upload", reason="limit_zero").to_dict()
4253        if limit_target:
4254            lprint(
4255                f'[limit] 已启用成功上传上限：达到 {limit_target} 个成功上传后退出；'
4256                f'跳过/失败不计入 limit'
4257            )
4258
4259        if not files_to_upload:
4260            lprint('没有需要上传的文件')
4261            self.clear_disk_files()
4262            return RunSummary(mode="upload", reason="no_files").to_dict()
4263
4264        # dry_run：与服务器对比标签，不实际上传
4265        if self.dry_run:
4266            dry_run_files = list(files_to_upload)
4267            if limit_target:
4268                dry_run_files = dry_run_files[:limit_target]
4269                lprint(
4270                    "[DRY_RUN][LIMIT]",
4271                    ("limit", limit_target),
4272                    ("preview_count", len(dry_run_files)),
4273                    ("candidate_count", len(files_to_upload)),
4274                )
4275            lprint(
4276                f'[dry_run] 以下 {len(dry_run_files)} 个文件将被上传'
4277                f'（dry_run 模式，不实际执行）, 标签规则共 {len(self.tag_rules)} 条'
4278            )
4279
4280            # 预先缓存分类树，避免在循环中重复调用API
4281            lprint(f'[缓存] 正在获取分类树...')
4282            self._cached_organization_dir = self.muse_client.get_organization_dir()
4283            lprint(f'[缓存] 分类树已缓存')
4284            
4285            # 递归收集所有子分类ID
4286            all_category_ids = []
4287            if self.muse_category_path:
4288                target_category_path = [p.strip() for p in self.muse_category_path.split('/')]
4289                lprint(f'[查询根路径] {" / ".join(target_category_path)}')
4290                category_ref_chain = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
4291                    target_category_path, recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True
4292                )
4293                if category_ref_chain:
4294                    all_category_ids = [category_ref_chain[-1].id]
4295                    lprint(f'[分类收集] 目标分类: {" / ".join(target_category_path)} (ID: {all_category_ids[0]})')
4296                else:
4297                    lprint(f'[分类收集] 未找到目标分类节点: {target_category_path}')
4298            else:
4299                lprint(f'[错误] 未设置 muse_category_path 参数，无法进行 dry-run 查询')
4300            
4301            # 批量获取所有分类的资产数据
4302            category_assets_map = {}
4303            if all_category_ids:
4304                try:
4305                    lprint(f'\n[批量查询] 正在获取 {len(all_category_ids)} 个分类的资产数据...')
4306                    category_assets_map = self._fetch_category_assets_map(all_category_ids)
4307                    total_assets = sum(len(assets) for assets in category_assets_map.values())
4308                    lprint(f'[批量查询] 完成，共获取 {total_assets} 个资产')
4309                except Exception as e:
4310                    lprint(f'[批量查询] 失败: {e}')
4311                    traceback.print_exc()
4312            
4313            # 收集所有文件信息并计算新标签
4314            lprint(f'\n[解析] 正在解析 {len(dry_run_files)} 个文件...')
4315            asset_info_list = []
4316            for fp in dry_run_files:
4317                try:
4318                    asset_name, category_list = self.get_name_category(fp)
4319                    path_parts = category_list[len(self.category_root or []):]
4320                    new_tags, tag_key = get_tags_for_path(self.tag_rules, path_parts)
4321                    asset_info_list.append({
4322                        'file_path': fp,
4323                        'asset_name': asset_name,
4324                        'category_list': category_list,
4325                        'path_parts': path_parts,
4326                        'new_tags': new_tags,
4327                        'tag_key': tag_key
4328                    })
4329                except Exception as e:
4330                    lprint(f'  {fp}  (解析失败: {e})')
4331            lprint(f'[解析] 完成，共解析 {len(asset_info_list)} 个文件')
4332            
4333            # 匹配并输出结果
4334            lprint(f'\n{"="*80}')
4335            processed_count = 0
4336            
4337            # 构建分类ID→名称映射
4338            category_id_to_name = {}
4339            def _collect_id_name(nodes):
4340                for node in nodes:
4341                    nid = str(node.get('id', ''))
4342                    name = node.get('name_multil', {}).get('zh_CN', '')
4343                    if nid:
4344                        category_id_to_name[nid] = name
4345                    _collect_id_name(node.get('children', []))
4346            _collect_id_name(self._cached_organization_dir.get(self.muse_lib, []))
4347            
4348            for info in asset_info_list:
4349                old_tags = None
4350                asset_id = None
4351                local_category_str = ' > '.join(info['category_list']).lower()
4352                for category_key, assets_list in category_assets_map.items():
4353                    for asset in assets_list:
4354                        if asset.asset_name == info['asset_name']:
4355                            if asset.category_names:
4356                                if isinstance(asset.category_names, list):
4357                                    if all(str(cn).isdigit() for cn in asset.category_names):
4358                                        names = [category_id_to_name.get(str(cn), str(cn)) for cn in asset.category_names]
4359                                        server_category_str = ' > '.join(names).lower()
4360                                    else:
4361                                        server_category_str = ' > '.join(asset.category_names).lower()
4362                                else:
4363                                    server_category_str = str(asset.category_names).lower()
4364                                if local_category_str == server_category_str or \
4365                                   local_category_str.endswith(server_category_str) or \
4366                                   server_category_str.endswith(local_category_str):
4367                                    old_tags = asset.tags
4368                                    asset_id = asset.asset_id
4369                                    break
4370                            else:
4371                                old_tags = asset.tags
4372                                asset_id = asset.asset_id
4373                                break
4374                    if old_tags is not None:
4375                        break
4376                
4377                file_info = f'\n  {info["file_path"]}\n    分类: {" / ".join(info["category_list"])}\n    资产名: {info["asset_name"]}'
4378                needs_update = False
4379                if old_tags is not None:
4380                    old_set = set(old_tags) if old_tags else set()
4381                    new_set = set(info['new_tags']) if info['new_tags'] else set()
4382                    needs_update = old_set != new_set
4383                    tag_info = f'    ⚠️ 服务器旧标签: {old_tags} (asset_id={asset_id}) [需要更新]' if needs_update else f'    服务器旧标签: {old_tags} (asset_id={asset_id}) [标签一致]'
4384                else:
4385                    tag_info = '    服务器旧标签: [资产不存在]'
4386                if info['tag_key']:
4387                    update_mark = ' ⚠️' if needs_update else ''
4388                    local_tag_info = f'    本地新标签: key="{info["tag_key"]}" -> {info["new_tags"]}{update_mark}'
4389                else:
4390                    local_tag_info = f'    本地新标签: 未命中规则 path_parts={info["path_parts"]}'
4391                has_career_skill = any("职业技能" in cat for cat in info["category_list"])
4392                if has_career_skill:
4393                    lprint(file_info + '\n' + tag_info + '\n' + local_tag_info)
4394                elif needs_update or old_tags is None:
4395                    lprint(file_info + '\n' + tag_info + '\n' + local_tag_info, max_prints_per_line=10)
4396                else:
4397                    lprint(file_info + '\n' + tag_info + '\n' + local_tag_info, max_prints_per_line=2)
4398                processed_count += 1
4399            
4400            lprint(f'\n{"="*80}\n[统计] 总共处理了 {processed_count} 个资产\n{"="*80}')
4401            return RunSummary(
4402                mode="dry_run",
4403                queued=len(dry_run_files),
4404                attempted=len(dry_run_files),
4405                success=processed_count,
4406                processed=len(dry_run_files),
4407                limit_consumed=len(dry_run_files),
4408                extra={"dry_run": True},
4409            ).to_dict()
4410
4411        lprint(f'发现 {len(files_to_upload)} 个文件待上传，使用{max_concurrent}并发')
4412
4413        # 上传前：统一批量创建/确认 Muse 目录（避免每个文件重复创建与上传时才报错）
4414        files_to_upload = self._precreate_muse_directories_for_files(
4415            files_to_upload=files_to_upload,
4416            local_file_map=local_file_map if self.skip_p4v else None,
4417            show_progress=True,
4418        )
4419        if not files_to_upload:
4420            lprint("目录预创建后，无可上传文件（全部被跳过/失败）", level="WARNING")
4421            if self.precreate_only:
4422                precreate_summary = dict(getattr(self, "_last_precreate_summary", {}) or {})
4423                return RunSummary(
4424                    mode="precreate",
4425                    failed=len(precreate_summary.get("failed_paths", []) or []),
4426                    extra={
4427                        "precreate_only": True,
4428                        "precreate_summary": precreate_summary,
4429                    },
4430                ).to_dict()
4431            return RunSummary(mode="upload", reason="no_files_after_precreate").to_dict()
4432        if self.precreate_only:
4433            precreate_summary = dict(getattr(self, "_last_precreate_summary", {}) or {})
4434            failed_paths = precreate_summary.get("failed_paths", []) or []
4435            return RunSummary(
4436                mode="precreate",
4437                failed=len(failed_paths),
4438                extra={
4439                    "precreate_only": True,
4440                    "precreate_summary": precreate_summary,
4441                },
4442            ).to_dict()
4443        self._warm_category_tree_after_precreate()
4444        
4445        # 批量预查询所有资产（避免每个文件都调用API）
4446        lprint(f'\n[批量查询] 正在预查询目标分类的所有资产...')
4447        self._debug_log('H_PREQUERY', 'prequery start', {
4448            'files_to_upload': len(files_to_upload),
4449            'muse_category_path': self.muse_category_path,
4450            'muse_lib': str(self.muse_lib),
4451        })
4452        self._cached_assets_map = {}
4453        target_category_path = self._resolve_asset_cache_category_path()
4454        if target_category_path:
4455            try:
4456                category_ref_chain = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
4457                    target_category_path, recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True
4458                )
4459                if category_ref_chain:
4460                    category_id = category_ref_chain[-1].id
4461                    lprint(f'[批量查询] 目标分类: {" / ".join(target_category_path)} (ID: {category_id})')
4462                    self._debug_log('H_PREQUERY', 'target category resolved', {
4463                        'target_category_path': target_category_path,
4464                        'category_id': category_id,
4465                    })
4466                    self._cached_assets_map = self._load_or_rebuild_name_path_cache(category_id)
4467                else:
4468                    lprint(f'[批量查询] 警告: 未找到目标分类节点')
4469                    self._debug_log('H_PREQUERY', 'target category node not found', {'target_category_path': target_category_path})
4470            except Exception as e:
4471                traceback.print_exc()
4472                lprint(f'[批量查询] 失败: {e}，将回退到逐个查询模式')
4473                self._debug_log('H_PREQUERY', 'prequery exception', {'error': str(e)})
4474        else:
4475            lprint(f'[批量查询] 警告: 未设置 muse_category_path，将回退到逐个查询模式')
4476        
4477        # 创建上传任务列表
4478        tasks = []
4479        for fp in files_to_upload:
4480            local_file = local_file_map.get(fp) if self.skip_p4v else None
4481            tasks.append(UploadTask(
4482                file_path=fp,
4483                asset_name=os.path.basename(fp),
4484                category_list=[],
4485                metadata={'p4_path': fp, 'local_file': local_file}
4486            ))
4487
4488        # 上传日志中统一使用的 Muse 路径（批次维度；用于强制打印）
4489        muse_path_for_logs = target_category_path or (self.muse_category_path or [])
4490        muse_path_str_for_logs = " / ".join(muse_path_for_logs) if muse_path_for_logs else ""
4491        
4492        # 创建上传函数
4493        def upload_func(task: UploadTask) -> UploadResult:
4494            """单个文件上传函数"""
4495            try:
4496                metadata = task.metadata or {}
4497                p4_path = metadata['p4_path']
4498                local_file = metadata.get('local_file')
4499                lprint(
4500                    "[p4_to_muse][上传开始]",
4501                    ("progress_hint", "see on_progress"),
4502                    ("p4_path", p4_path),
4503                    ("local_file", local_file),
4504                    ("muse_path", muse_path_str_for_logs),
4505                    level="WARNING",
4506                    force_print=True,
4507                    max_prints_per_line=999,
4508                )
4509                result = self.sync_file(p4_path, local_file)
4510                
4511                # sync_file 返回 'created'/'updated'/'skipped'/'failed'
4512                if result == UploadResultStatus.FAILED.value:
4513                    return UploadResult(
4514                        task=task,
4515                        status=UploadStatus.FAILED,
4516                        error_message='failed'
4517                    )
4518                elif result == UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value:
4519                    return UploadResult(
4520                        task=task,
4521                        status=UploadStatus.SKIPPED,
4522                        error_message='skipped'
4523                    )
4524                else:
4525                    # created / updated / recreated 都算 SUCCESS，用 error_message 保存细分状态
4526                    return UploadResult(
4527                        task=task,
4528                        status=UploadStatus.SUCCESS,
4529                        error_message=result or 'created'
4530                    )
4531            except Exception as e:
4532                error_trace = traceback.format_exc()
4533                error_msg = f"{type(e).__name__}: {str(e)}"
4534                lprint(
4535                    "[p4_to_muse][上传失败]",
4536                    ("file_path", task.file_path),
4537                    ("error", error_msg),
4538                    level="WARNING",
4539                    force_print=True,
4540                    max_prints_per_line=999,
4541                )
4542                self._append_report_entry({
4543                    'action': 'failed',
4544                    'file_path': task.file_path,
4545                    'error': error_msg,
4546                    'traceback': error_trace,
4547                })
4548                return UploadResult(
4549                    task=task,
4550                    status=UploadStatus.FAILED,
4551                    error_message=error_msg
4552                )
4553        
4554        # 使用 tqdm 创建进度条
4555        start_time = time.time()
4556        success_count = 0
4557        uploaded_success_count = 0
4558        failed_count = 0
4559        detail_counts = {
4560            UploadResultStatus.CREATED.value: 0,
4561            UploadResultStatus.UPDATED.value: 0,
4562            UploadResultStatus.RECREATED.value: 0,
4563            UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value: 0,
4564            UploadResultStatus.FAILED.value: 0,
4565        }
4566        
4567        # 创建 tqdm 进度条
4568        pbar = tqdm(total=len(tasks), desc="上传进度", unit="文件")
4569        
4570        # 进度回调
4571        def on_progress(completed: int, total: int, result: UploadResult):
4572            """进度回调"""
4573            nonlocal success_count, uploaded_success_count, failed_count
4574            
4575            detail_status = result.error_message or result.status.value
4576            if detail_status in detail_counts:
4577                detail_counts[detail_status] += 1
4578            
4579            if result.status in (UploadStatus.SUCCESS, UploadStatus.SKIPPED):
4580                success_count += 1
4581                if result.task.metadata and 'p4_path' in result.task.metadata:
4582                    uploaded_paths.append(result.task.metadata['p4_path'])
4583            if result.status == UploadStatus.SUCCESS:
4584                uploaded_success_count += 1
4585            else:
4586                if result.status != UploadStatus.SKIPPED:
4587                    failed_count += 1
4588            
4589            # 更新 tqdm 进度条
4590            pbar.set_postfix({
4591                'ok': uploaded_success_count,
4592                'skip': detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value],
4593                'fail': failed_count,
4594                'pid': os.getpid(),
4595            })
4596            pbar.update(1)
4597
4598            # 用户诉求：上传时强制 lprint 打印进度 + 本地/上传路径 + muse 路径
4599            try:
4600                md = result.task.metadata or {}
4601                lprint(
4602                    "[p4_to_muse][上传进度]",
4603                    ("progress", f"{completed}/{total}"),
4604                    ("status", detail_status),
4605                    ("p4_path", md.get("p4_path") or result.task.file_path),
4606                    ("local_file", md.get("local_file")),
4607                    ("muse_path", muse_path_str_for_logs),
4608                    level="WARNING",
4609                    force_print=True,
4610                    max_prints_per_line=999,
4611                )
4612            except Exception:
4613                pass
4614            
4615            if result.status not in (UploadStatus.SUCCESS, UploadStatus.SKIPPED):
4616                pbar.write(f'[{completed}/{total}] ✗ {result.task.file_path}: {result.error_message}')
4617        
4618        # 上传并发仅在此传入：CLI --max_concurrent → max_workers → UploadService.run_batch_async → Semaphore
4619        results = []
4620        attempted_task_count = 0
4621        if limit_target:
4622            for task in tasks:
4623                if uploaded_success_count >= limit_target:
4624                    lprint(f'[limit] 已达到成功上传上限 {limit_target}，停止后续上传')
4625                    break
4626                batch_results = self.muse_helper.batch_upload(
4627                    tasks=[task],
4628                    upload_func=upload_func,
4629                    on_progress=on_progress,
4630                    max_workers=1,
4631                )
4632                attempted_task_count += 1
4633                results.extend(batch_results)
4634        else:
4635            results = self.muse_helper.batch_upload(
4636                tasks=tasks,
4637                upload_func=upload_func,
4638                on_progress=on_progress,
4639                max_workers=max_concurrent,
4640            )
4641            attempted_task_count = len(tasks)
4642        
4643        # 关闭进度条
4644        pbar.close()
4645        
4646        # 统计结果（results 已经是 UploadResult 列表）
4647        stats = BatchUploadStats(results)
4648        total_time = time.time() - start_time
4649        avg_speed = attempted_task_count / total_time if total_time > 0 else 0
4650        
4651        # 打印总结信息
4652        report = (
4653            f'\n{"="*80}\n上传完成！\n{"="*80}\n'
4654            f'尝试文件: {attempted_task_count} / {len(tasks)} 个\n'
4655            f'  ✦ 成功上传: {uploaded_success_count} 个\n'
4656            f'  ✦ 新建资产: {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.CREATED.value]} 个\n'
4657            f'  ✦ 更新标签: {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.UPDATED.value]} 个\n'
4658            f'  ✦ 删除重建: {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.RECREATED.value]} 个\n'
4659            f'  ✦ 标签匹配跳过: {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value]} 个\n'
4660            f'  ✗ 失败: {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.FAILED.value]} 个\n'
4661            f'总耗时: {total_time:.1f} 秒\n'
4662            f'平均速度: {avg_speed:.2f} 文件/秒\n'
4663            f'{"="*80}'
4664        )
4665        lprint(report)
4666        
4667        lprint(f'上传完成: 成功上传 {uploaded_success_count}, 新建 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.CREATED.value]}, 更新标签 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.UPDATED.value]}, 删除重建 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.RECREATED.value]}, 跳过 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value]}, 失败 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.FAILED.value]}, 耗时 {total_time:.1f}秒')
4668        
4669        # 收集上传记录（禁用文件写入，避免文件锁超时）
4670        if uploaded_paths:
4671            for p4_path in uploaded_paths:
4672                if p4_path not in self.upload_file_list:
4673                    self.upload_file_list.append(p4_path)
4674            # 禁用文件写入
4675            # self.log_file.save({'history': self.upload_file_list})
4676            lprint(f'[记录收集] 共收集 {len(uploaded_paths)} 条上传路径（未写入文件）')
4677
4678        # 不删除本地文件，仅记录日志
4679        # self.clear_disk_files()
4680        lprint(f'已处理 {success_count} 个文件，其中成功上传 {uploaded_success_count} 个（新建 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.CREATED.value]}, 更新标签 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.UPDATED.value]}, 删除重建 {detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.RECREATED.value]}），本地文件已保留')
4681
4682        # 增量明细先保存在内存；run_parallel 结束时由主线程去重写入 sync_report.json（见装饰器 finally）
4683        lprint(
4684            '[报告]',
4685            ('sync_report_json', getattr(self, '_sync_report_json', '')),
4686            ('本次内存明细数', len(getattr(self, '_sync_report', []) or [])),
4687        )
4688        lprint(
4689            f'[报告] 上传/验证线程不再写 jsonl；json 为去重快照供下次启动加载；'
4690            f'本次约 skipped={detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value]} 条、'
4691            f'updated={detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.UPDATED.value]} 条、'
4692            f'created={detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.CREATED.value]} 条、'
4693            f'recreated={detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.RECREATED.value]} 条。'
4694            f'查看标签更新请在文件中搜索 "action": "updated"（或仅搜 updated）。'
4695        )
4696
4697        # 返回本次批次摘要，供外层（upload_test.py）做全局 limit 控制
4698        skipped_count = detail_counts[UploadResultStatus.SKIPPED.value]
4699        return RunSummary(
4700            mode="upload",
4701            queued=len(tasks),
4702            attempted=attempted_task_count,
4703            success=success_count,
4704            uploaded=uploaded_success_count,
4705            processed=attempted_task_count,
4706            failed=failed_count,
4707            skipped=skipped_count,
4708            limit_consumed=uploaded_success_count,
4709            detail_counts=dict(detail_counts),
4710        ).to_dict()
4711

# >>深度6 路径1-1-3-2-5-7 #99 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:3262 in _run_verify_sync_report_against_muse() ← :3652 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[7.51ms]

3262    def _run_verify_sync_report_against_muse(self, *, max_concurrent: int) -> Dict[str, Any]:
3263        """读取 sync_report.json，对当前 upload_dir 范围内条目调用 Muse 核实并重写 json。"""
3264        if not getattr(self, "save_sync_report", False):
3265            lprint('[Muse验证] save_sync_report=False，无法写入报告', level='WARNING')
3266            return RunSummary(mode="verify", ok=False, reason="save_sync_report_off").to_dict()
3267        json_path = getattr(self, "_sync_report_json", "") or ""  # 💡 json_path='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache\\h42_sync_report.json' (str)
3268        if not json_path:
3269            lprint('[Muse验证] 未初始化 sync_report json', level='WARNING')
3270            return RunSummary(mode="verify", ok=False, reason="no_report_file").to_dict()
3271
3272        entries = self._snapshot_json_entries()
3273        if not entries:
3274            lprint('[Muse验证] 无条目可验证（json 空或解析失败）')
3275            return RunSummary(
3276                mode="verify",
3277                reason="empty_report",
3278                extra={"scoped": 0, "appended": 0},
3279            ).to_dict()
3280        snapshot_file_samples: List[str] = []
3281        for entry in entries:
3282            depot, local = self._sync_report_entry_depot_local(entry)  # → 调用 _sync_report_entry_depot_local()  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254984558640_7242:变量·depot·depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-落水carry_child_fall.max' (str), local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-落水carry_child_fall.max' (str)
depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-落水carry_child_fall.max' (str), local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-落水carry_child_fall.max' (str)
3283            sample_path = depot or local  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254966201136_7245:变量·depot·depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max' (str), local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max' (str), sample_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max' (str)
depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max' (str), local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max' (str), sample_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max' (str)
3284            if sample_path:
3285                snapshot_file_samples.append(sample_path)
3286            if len(snapshot_file_samples) >= 10:
3287                break
3288
3289        ul = self.upload_dir.replace("\\", "/").rstrip("/")
3290        if ul.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
3291            root_local = ul.replace("//hangzhou/", "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/")
3292            root_depot = ul
3293        else:
3294            root_local = ul
3295            root_depot = (
3296                self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(ul) if ul.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/") else ""
3297            )
3298
3299        # 验证模式下 --limit N 限制“核对条数”。必须在扫描 sync_report 前解析，
3300        # 这样冒烟验证（例如 limit=1）命中足够条目后可以立即停止，避免 trace 全量记录 5 万条过滤过程。
3301        try:
3302            limit_n = self.limit
3303            if limit_n is not None:
3304                limit_n = int(limit_n)
3305        except Exception:
3306            limit_n = None
3307        if limit_n is not None and limit_n <= 0:
3308            lprint(f'[Muse验证][limit] limit={limit_n}，本次不执行核对')
3309            return RunSummary(
3310                mode="verify",
3311                reason="limit_zero",
3312                extra={
3313                    "scoped": 0,
3314                    "appended": 0,
3315                    "exists": 0,
3316                    "missing": 0,
3317                    "errors": 0,
3318                },
3319            ).to_dict()
3320
3321        # 可选：只验证某个 mapping_preset（source | category_root）
3322        verify_preset = str(self.args_data.get("verify_mapping_preset") or "").strip()
3323        work: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
3324        scanned_entry_count = 0
3325        limit_stopped_scan = False
3326        for entry in entries:
3327            scanned_entry_count += 1
3328            preset_key = str(entry.get("mapping_preset") or "").strip()
3329            if verify_preset and preset_key != verify_preset:
3330                continue
3331            depot, local = self._sync_report_entry_depot_local(entry)
3332            if not depot.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
3333                continue
3334            if not P4ToMuse._sync_report_depot_under_upload_dir(depot, root_local, root_depot):  # → 调用 _sync_report_depot_under_upload_dir()
3335                continue
3336            if self.sync_ext and not depot.endswith(self.sync_ext):
3337                continue
3338            if self.is_ignore_file(depot):  # → 调用 is_ignore_file()
3339                continue
3340            work.append({
3341                "depot_fp": depot,
3342                "local_fp": local or "",
3343                "prev_action": entry.get("action"),
3344                "mapping_preset": preset_key,
3345                "muse_path": entry.get("muse_path") or "",
3346                "category": entry.get("category") or "",
3347            })
3348            if limit_n is not None and len(work) >= limit_n:
3349                limit_stopped_scan = True
3350                break
3351
3352        lprint(
3353            '[Muse验证]',
3354            ('快照条目数', len(entries)),
3355            ('已扫描快照条目数', scanned_entry_count),
3356            ('本次收集待核', len(work)),
3357            ('limit', limit_n),
3358            ('limit提前停止扫描', limit_stopped_scan),
3359            ('verify_mapping_preset', verify_preset or None),
3360            ('json', json_path),
3361        )
3362        scoped_work_count = len(work)
3363        scoped_file_samples = [  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
3364            str(item.get("depot_fp") or item.get("local_fp") or "")
3365            for item in work[:10]
3366        ]
3367        if limit_n is not None:
3368            lprint(
3369                "[Muse验证][limit]",
3370                ("limit", limit_n),
3371                ("本次收集待核", len(work)),
3372                ("已扫描快照条目数", scanned_entry_count),
3373                ("提前停止扫描", limit_stopped_scan),
3374            )
3375
3376        self._cached_assets_map = {}
3377        target_category_path = self._resolve_asset_cache_category_path()  # → 调用 _resolve_asset_cache_category_path()  # 💡 target_category_path=['动作资源'] (list)
3378        if target_category_path:
3379            try:
3380                _t0 = time.perf_counter()
3381                category_ref_chain = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
3382                    target_category_path, recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True
3383                )
3384                if category_ref_chain:
3385                    category_id = category_ref_chain[-1].id
3386                    self._cached_assets_map = self._load_or_rebuild_name_path_cache(category_id)  # → 调用 _load_or_rebuild_name_path_cache()
3387                    _t1 = time.perf_counter()
3388                    lprint(
3389                        "[Muse验证][耗时]",
3390                        ("phase", "preheat_cache"),
3391                        ("elapsed_s", round(_t1 - _t0, 3)),
3392                        ("target_category_path", target_category_path),
3393                        ("category_id", category_id),
3394                        ("cached_assets_map_size", len(self._cached_assets_map or {})),
3395                    )
3396                else:
3397                    lprint(
3398                        "[Muse验证][预热缓存失败]",
3399                        ("target_category_path", target_category_path),
3400                        ("error", "未找到目标分类节点"),
3401                        level="CRITICAL",
3402                    )
3403                    raise RuntimeError("Muse verify target category node not found")
3404            except Exception as e:
3405                traceback.print_exc()
3406                lprint(
3407                    "[Muse验证][预热缓存失败]",
3408                    ("target_category_path", target_category_path),
3409                    ("error", str(e)),
3410                    level=lprint.critical,
3411                )
3412                raise
3413
3414        category_service = self.muse_helper.category_service
3415        max_workers = int(max(1, int(max_concurrent or 5)))
3416        exists_n = 0
3417        missing_n = 0
3418        err_n = 0
3419        appended = 0
3420
3421        def _verify_one(item: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
3422            fp = str(item.get("depot_fp") or "")
3423            try:
3424                asset_name, category_list = self.get_name_category(fp)  # → 调用 get_name_category()
3425                hint_lists = P4ToMuse._parse_sync_report_hint_category_lists(  # → 调用 _parse_sync_report_hint_category_lists()
3426                    muse_path=item.get("muse_path"),
3427                    category=item.get("category"),
3428                )
3429                existed = self.find_muse_assets(  # → 调用 find_muse_assets()
3430                    asset_name,
3431                    category_list,
3432                    hint_category_lists=hint_lists,
3433                )
3434                exists = bool(existed)
3435                aid: Any = None
3436                if existed:
3437                    rec = existed[0]
3438                    if isinstance(rec, dict):
3439                        # 缓存/服务返回的 dict 多数使用 "id"；兼容旧字段 "asset_id"
3440                        aid = rec.get("asset_id") or rec.get("id")
3441                    else:
3442                        aid = getattr(rec, "asset_id", None)
3443                return {
3444                    "ok": True,
3445                    "depot_fp": fp,
3446                    "local_fp": item.get("local_fp"),
3447                    "exists": exists,
3448                    "asset_id": aid,
3449                    "prev_action": item.get("prev_action"),
3450                    "mapping_preset": item.get("mapping_preset"),
3451                    "muse_path": item.get("muse_path"),
3452                    "category": item.get("category"),
3453                }
3454            except Exception as e:
3455                traceback.print_exc()
3456                lprint(
3457                    "[Muse验证][单条校验失败]",
3458                    ("depot_fp", fp),
3459                    ("local_fp", item.get("local_fp")),
3460                    ("prev_action", item.get("prev_action")),
3461                    ("mapping_preset", item.get("mapping_preset")),
3462                    ("muse_path", item.get("muse_path")),
3463                    ("category", item.get("category")),
3464                    ("error", str(e)),
3465                    level="CRITICAL",
3466                )
3467                raise
3468
3469        verify_pbar = None
3470        try:
3471            verify_pbar = tqdm(
3472                total=len(work),
3473                desc="Muse验证",
3474                unit="条",
3475                dynamic_ncols=False,
3476                mininterval=0.3,
3477                file=sys.stderr,
3478                leave=True,
3479            )
3480        except Exception:
3481            verify_pbar = None
3482
3483        def _on_vprog(_completed: int, _total: int, _result: dict) -> None:
3484            if verify_pbar is not None:
3485                try:
3486                    verify_pbar.update(1)
3487                except Exception:
3488                    pass
3489
3490        results: List[Any] = []
3491        if work:
3492            _t0 = time.perf_counter()
3493            results = category_service.run_batch_async(  # → 调用 run_batch_async()  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254989153248_7460:变量·results·list·443字符·[{'ok': True, 'depot_fp': '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 results=list (results), 443 字符
[{'ok': True, 'depot_fp': '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'local_fp': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'exists': True, 'asset_id': '69e879c1ac658e1b48b0fd99', 'prev_action': 'rebuilt', 'mapping_preset': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑 | 动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑', 'muse_path': '动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男', 'category': '动作资源 / 坐骑 / 主角_坐骑 / 晴雪仙气坐骑 / 成男'}]
3494                items=work,
3495                process_func=_verify_one,
3496                on_progress=_on_vprog,
3497                max_workers=max_workers,
3498            ) or []
3499            _t1 = time.perf_counter()
3500            lprint(
3501                "[Muse验证][耗时]",
3502                ("phase", "run_batch_async_verify"),
3503                ("elapsed_s", round(_t1 - _t0, 3)),
3504                ("work_n", len(work)),
3505                ("max_workers", max_workers),
3506                ("results_n", len(results)),
3507            )
3508
3509        if verify_pbar is not None:
3510            try:
3511                verify_pbar.close()
3512            except Exception:
3513                pass
3514
3515        _ts = time.time()
3516        for row in results:
3517            if not isinstance(row, dict):
3518                continue
3519            if row.get("success") is False and "item" in row:
3520                it = row.get("item") or {}
3521                err_n += 1
3522                fp = str(it.get("depot_fp") or "")
3523                loc = str(it.get("local_fp") or "")
3524                self._append_report_entry({
3525                    "action": "failed",
3526                    "file_path": fp,
3527                    "local_file": loc or None,
3528                    "error": "muse_verify: {}".format(row.get("error") or "batch_failed"),
3529                    "prev_report_action": it.get("prev_action"),
3530                    "source": "muse_verify",
3531                    "ts": _ts,
3532                })
3533                appended += 1
3534                continue
3535            fp = str(row.get("depot_fp") or "")
3536            loc = str(row.get("local_fp") or "")
3537            prev = row.get("prev_action")
3538            if not row.get("ok"):
3539                err_n += 1
3540                self._append_report_entry({
3541                    "action": "failed",
3542                    "file_path": fp,
3543                    "local_file": loc or None,
3544                    "error": "muse_verify: {}".format(row.get("error") or "unknown"),
3545                    "prev_report_action": prev,
3546                    "source": "muse_verify",
3547                    "ts": _ts,
3548                })
3549                appended += 1
3550                continue
3551            if row.get("exists"):
3552                exists_n += 1
3553                self._append_report_entry({  # → 调用 _append_report_entry()
3554                    # 需求：发现已上传/已存在也按 created 记入 sync_report（便于视作“已完成”）
3555                    "action": "created",
3556                    "file_path": fp,
3557                    "local_file": loc or None,
3558                    "reason": "muse_verified_exists",
3559                    "asset_id": row.get("asset_id"),
3560                    "prev_report_action": prev,
3561                    "source": "muse_verify",
3562                    "ts": _ts,
3563                })
3564                appended += 1
3565            else:
3566                missing_n += 1
3567                self._append_report_entry({
3568                    "action": "failed",
3569                    "file_path": fp,
3570                    "local_file": loc or None,
3571                    "error": "muse_verify: asset not found in Muse",
3572                    "prev_report_action": prev,
3573                    "source": "muse_verify",
3574                    "ts": _ts,
3575                })
3576                appended += 1
3577
3578        try:
3579            self._maybe_materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot(force=True)  # → 调用 _maybe_materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot()
3580        except Exception:
3581            traceback.print_exc()
3582
3583        checked_file_samples = [  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
3584            str(item.get("depot_fp") or item.get("local_fp") or "")
3585            for item in work[:10]
3586        ]
3587        if len(work) == 0:
3588            overall_result = "未执行"
3589        elif err_n or missing_n:
3590            overall_result = "有问题"
3591        else:
3592            overall_result = "通过"
3593        lprint(
3594            "[Muse验证][检查汇总]",
3595            ("整体结果", overall_result),
3596            ("本次收集候选文件数", scoped_work_count),
3597            ("本次实际检查文件数", len(work)),
3598            ("返回结果数", len(results)),
3599            ("Muse存在", exists_n),
3600            ("Muse不存在", missing_n),
3601            ("异常", err_n),
3602            ("写入json修正数", appended),
3603            ("已扫描快照条目数", scanned_entry_count),
3604            ("limit提前停止扫描", limit_stopped_scan),
3605            ("快照文件样本", snapshot_file_samples),
3606            ("本次收集候选文件样本", scoped_file_samples),
3607            ("实际检查文件样本", checked_file_samples),
3608            ("样本说明", "实际检查受 limit 限制；开启 limit 时不会全量扫描 sync_report"),
3609        )
3610        summary = (
3611            "Muse验证完成：本次收集 {} 条，检查 {} 条，扫描快照 {} 条，写入 json {} 条修正"
3612            "（Muse存在 {}，不存在 {}，异常 {}，整体结果 {}，limit提前停止扫描 {}）".format(
3613                scoped_work_count,
3614                len(work),
3615                scanned_entry_count,
3616                appended,
3617                exists_n,
3618                missing_n,
3619                err_n,
3620                overall_result,
3621                limit_stopped_scan,
3622            )
3623        )
3624        lprint("[Muse验证]", summary)
3625        checked_count = len(work)
3626        return RunSummary(
3627            mode="verify",
3628            ok=overall_result == "通过",
3629            checked=checked_count,
3630            processed=checked_count,
3631            failed=err_n + missing_n,
3632            limit_consumed=checked_count,
3633            extra={
3634                "scoped": scoped_work_count,
3635                "appended": appended,
3636                "exists": exists_n,
3637                "missing": missing_n,
3638                "errors": err_n,
3639                "overall_result": overall_result,
3640                "checked_file_samples": checked_file_samples,
3641                "scoped_file_samples": scoped_file_samples,
3642                "snapshot_file_samples": snapshot_file_samples,
3643                "scanned_entry_count": scanned_entry_count,
3644                "limit_stopped_scan": limit_stopped_scan,
3645            },
3646        ).to_dict()  # → 调用 to_dict()

778                    depot = n2
779            elif n2.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/"):
780                if not local:
781                    local = n2
782                if not depot:

784            elif not local:
785                local = n2

787            local = "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/" + depot[len("//hangzhou/") :]
788        elif local.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/") and not depot:
789            depot = self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(local)
790        return depot or "", local or ""  # [[EXPAND:ret_expand_9ab8d0fa851c_7665:返回值·('//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/…·共188字符·点击展开]]

# >>深度8 路径1-1-3-2-5-7-1-1 #101 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:2887 in _local_to_depot_hangzhou() ← :773 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[6.50ms]

2887    def _local_to_depot_hangzhou(self, local_path: str) -> str:  # 💡 local_path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max'
2888        """D:/PTrack/hangzhou/... → //hangzhou/...，供无 upload_list 时 scan_progress 与 upload.txt 风格一致。"""
2889        norm = local_path.replace('\\', '/')  # 💡 norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max' (str)
2890        prefix = 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/'  # 💡 prefix='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/' (str)
2891        if norm.startswith(prefix):
2892            return '//hangzhou/' + norm[len(prefix):]  # 返回值 (第2892行) '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max'
2893        return norm
2894

2887    def _local_to_depot_hangzhou(self, local_path: str) -> str:  # 💡 local_path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背着正太待机carry_child_idle.max'
2888        """D:/PTrack/hangzhou/... → //hangzhou/...，供无 upload_list 时 scan_progress 与 upload.txt 风格一致。"""
2889        norm = local_path.replace('\\', '/')  # 💡 norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背着正太待机carry_child_idle.max' (str)
2890        prefix = 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/'  # 💡 prefix='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/' (str)
2891        if norm.startswith(prefix):
2892            return '//hangzhou/' + norm[len(prefix):]  # 返回值 (第2892行) '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背着正太待机carry_child_idle.max'
2893        return norm

entry={'action': 'rebuilt', 'asset_name': '正太背正太-放下carry_child_down', 'category': '动作资源 / 主角通用 / 玩法动作 / 主角_活动 / 2025江湖四季 / 江湖四季冬季玩法 / 正太', 'file_path': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-放下carry_child_down.max', 'asset_id': None, 'new_tags': [], 'muse_path': '动作资源/主角通用/玩法动作/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太', 'mapping_preset': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动 | 动作资源/主角通用/玩法动作/主角_活动'}
759        self,
760        entry: Mapping[str, Any],
761    ) -> Tuple[str, str]:
762        """从报告条目解析 (depot_path, local_path)，尽量与扫描/续传路径风格一致。"""
763        fp = entry.get("file_path")  # 💡 fp='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-放下carry_child_down.max' (str)
764        lf = entry.get("local_file")  # 💡 lf=None (NoneType)
765        depot = ""  # 💡 depot='' (str)
766        local = ""  # 💡 local='' (str)
767        if isinstance(fp, str) and fp.strip():
768            n = fp.strip().replace("\\", "/")  # 💡 n='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-放下carry_child_down.max' (str)
769            if n.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
770                depot = n
771            elif n.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/"):
772                local = n  # 💡 local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-放下carry_child_down.max' (str)
773                depot = self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(n)  # → 调用 _local_to_depot_hangzhou()  # 💡 depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-放下carry_child_down.max' (str)
774        if isinstance(lf, str) and lf.strip():
775            n2 = lf.strip().replace("\\", "/")
776            if n2.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
777                if not depot:
778                    depot = n2
779            elif n2.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/"):
780                if not local:
781                    local = n2
782                if not depot:
783                    depot = self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(n2)
784            elif not local:
785                local = n2
786        if depot.startswith("//hangzhou/") and not local:
787            local = "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/" + depot[len("//hangzhou/") :]
788        elif local.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/") and not depot:
789            depot = self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(local)
790        return depot or "", local or ""  # [[EXPAND:ret_expand_05997ff0b016_7887:返回值·('//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/…·共192字符·点击展开]]

763        fp = entry.get("file_path")  # 💡 fp='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-猛猛跳carry_child_land3.max' (str)
764        lf = entry.get("local_file")  # 💡 lf=None (NoneType)
765        depot = ""  # 💡 depot='' (str)
766        local = ""  # 💡 local='' (str)
767        if isinstance(fp, str) and fp.strip():
768            n = fp.strip().replace("\\", "/")  # 💡 n='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-猛猛跳carry_child_land3.max' (str)
769            if n.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
770                depot = n
771            elif n.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/"):
772                local = n  # 💡 local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-猛猛跳carry_child_land3.max' (str)
773                depot = self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(n)  # → 调用 _local_to_depot_hangzhou()  # 💡 depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-猛猛跳carry_child_land3.max' (str)
774        if isinstance(lf, str) and lf.strip():
775            n2 = lf.strip().replace("\\", "/")
776            if n2.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
777                if not depot:
778                    depot = n2
779            elif n2.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/"):
780                if not local:
781                    local = n2
782                if not depot:
783                    depot = self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(n2)
784            elif not local:
785                local = n2
786        if depot.startswith("//hangzhou/") and not local:
787            local = "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/" + depot[len("//hangzhou/") :]
788        elif local.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/") and not depot:
789            depot = self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(local)
790        return depot or "", local or ""  # [[EXPAND:ret_expand_1f5696ade9f0_8033:返回值·('//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/…·共196字符·点击展开]]

2887    def _local_to_depot_hangzhou(self, local_path: str) -> str:  # 💡 local_path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-猛猛跳carry_child_land3.max'
2888        """D:/PTrack/hangzhou/... → //hangzhou/...，供无 upload_list 时 scan_progress 与 upload.txt 风格一致。"""
2889        norm = local_path.replace('\\', '/')  # 💡 norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-猛猛跳carry_child_land3.max' (str)
2890        prefix = 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/'  # 💡 prefix='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/' (str)
2891        if norm.startswith(prefix):
2892            return '//hangzhou/' + norm[len(prefix):]  # 返回值 (第2892行) '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-猛猛跳carry_child_land3.max'
2893        return norm
2894

2887    def _local_to_depot_hangzhou(self, local_path: str) -> str:  # 💡 local_path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-小跳carry_child_land1.max'
2888        """D:/PTrack/hangzhou/... → //hangzhou/...，供无 upload_list 时 scan_progress 与 upload.txt 风格一致。"""
2889        norm = local_path.replace('\\', '/')  # 💡 norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-小跳carry_child_land1.max' (str)
2890        prefix = 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/'  # 💡 prefix='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/' (str)
2891        if norm.startswith(prefix):
2892            return '//hangzhou/' + norm[len(prefix):]  # 返回值 (第2892行) '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-小跳carry_child_land1.max'
2893        return norm
2894

2889        norm = local_path.replace('\\', '/')  # 💡 norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-下蹲蓄力carry_child_squat.max' (str)
2890        prefix = 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/'  # 💡 prefix='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/' (str)
2891        if norm.startswith(prefix):
2892            return '//hangzhou/' + norm[len(prefix):]  # 返回值 (第2892行) '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-下蹲蓄力carry_child_squat.max'

792    @staticmethod  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254984559664_8352:变量·depot_path·depot_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 depot_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max', root_local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', root_depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'
depot_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max', root_local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', root_depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'
793    def _sync_report_depot_under_upload_dir(
794        depot_path: str,
795        root_local: str,
796        root_depot: str,
797    ) -> bool:
798        """失败重试路径是否属于当前 upload_dir 根（本地或 depot 前缀一致）。"""
799        if not depot_path.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
800            return False
801        suffix = depot_path[len("//hangzhou/") :]  # 💡 suffix='H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max' (str)
802        loc = "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/" + suffix  # 💡 loc='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max' (str)
803        rl = root_local.replace("\\", "/").rstrip("/")  # 💡 rl='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
804        rd = (root_depot or "").replace("\\", "/").rstrip("/")  # 💡 rd='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
805        if rl and (loc == rl or loc.startswith(rl + "/")):
806            return True
807        if rd and (depot_path == rd or depot_path.startswith(rd + "/")):
808            return True
809        return False  # 返回值 (第809行) False
810
