# >>深度5 路径1-1-3-2-9 #128 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:792 in _sync_report_depot_under_upload_dir() ← :3334 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[69.01ms]

792    @staticmethod  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254984559152_8616:变量·depot_path·depot_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 depot_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-小跳carry_child_land1.max', root_local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', root_depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'
depot_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-小跳carry_child_land1.max', root_local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', root_depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'
793    def _sync_report_depot_under_upload_dir(
794        depot_path: str,
795        root_local: str,
796        root_depot: str,
797    ) -> bool:
798        """失败重试路径是否属于当前 upload_dir 根（本地或 depot 前缀一致）。"""
799        if not depot_path.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
800            return False
801        suffix = depot_path[len("//hangzhou/") :]  # 💡 suffix='H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-小跳carry_child_land1.max' (str)
802        loc = "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/" + suffix  # 💡 loc='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-小跳carry_child_land1.max' (str)
803        rl = root_local.replace("\\", "/").rstrip("/")  # 💡 rl='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
804        rd = (root_depot or "").replace("\\", "/").rstrip("/")  # 💡 rd='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
805        if rl and (loc == rl or loc.startswith(rl + "/")):
806            return True
807        if rd and (depot_path == rd or depot_path.startswith(rd + "/")):
808            return True
809        return False  # 返回值 (第809行) False
810

# >>深度5 路径1-1-3-2-10 #129 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:792 in _sync_report_depot_under_upload_dir() ← :3334 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

792    @staticmethod  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254984559664_8649:变量·depot_path·depot_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 depot_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-下蹲蓄力carry_child_squat.max', root_local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', root_depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'
depot_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-下蹲蓄力carry_child_squat.max', root_local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', root_depot='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'
793    def _sync_report_depot_under_upload_dir(
794        depot_path: str,
795        root_local: str,
796        root_depot: str,
797    ) -> bool:
798        """失败重试路径是否属于当前 upload_dir 根（本地或 depot 前缀一致）。"""
799        if not depot_path.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
800            return False
801        suffix = depot_path[len("//hangzhou/") :]  # 💡 suffix='H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-下蹲蓄力carry_child_squat.max' (str)
802        loc = "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/" + suffix  # 💡 loc='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背萝莉-下蹲蓄力carry_child_squat.max' (str)
803        rl = root_local.replace("\\", "/").rstrip("/")  # 💡 rl='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
804        rd = (root_depot or "").replace("\\", "/").rstrip("/")  # 💡 rd='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
805        if rl and (loc == rl or loc.startswith(rl + "/")):
806            return True
807        if rd and (depot_path == rd or depot_path.startswith(rd + "/")):
808            return True
809        return False  # 返回值 (第809行) False
810

# >>深度5 路径1-1-3-2-11 #130 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1596 in is_ignore_file() ← :3338 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1596    @staticmethod  # 💡 file_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max'
1597    def is_ignore_file(file_path):
1598        for black_name_end in ['.p4vignore', '.get_date.dat']:
1599            if file_path.endswith(black_name_end):
1600                return True
1601        return False  # 返回值 (第1601行) False
1602

# >>深度5 路径1-1-3-2-12 #131 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:3363 in <listcomp>() ← :3363 ⏱️[1.00ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

3363    def _run_verify_sync_report_against_muse(self, *, max_concurrent: int) -> Dict[str, Any]:  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 .0=<list_iterator object at 0x000001CDEC89FFD0>  # 返回值 (第3363行) ['//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max']
3364        """读取 sync_report.json，对当前 upload_dir 范围内条目调用 Muse 核实并重写 json。"""
3365        if not getattr(self, "save_sync_report", False):
3366            lprint('[Muse验证] save_sync_report=False，无法写入报告', level='WARNING')
3367            return RunSummary(mode="verify", ok=False, reason="save_sync_report_off").to_dict()
3368        json_path = getattr(self, "_sync_report_json", "") or ""
3369        if not json_path:
3370            lprint('[Muse验证] 未初始化 sync_report json', level='WARNING')
3371            return RunSummary(mode="verify", ok=False, reason="no_report_file").to_dict()
3372
3373        entries = self._snapshot_json_entries()
3374        if not entries:
3375            lprint('[Muse验证] 无条目可验证（json 空或解析失败）')
3376            return RunSummary(
3377                mode="verify",  # → 调用 _resolve_asset_cache_category_path()
3378                reason="empty_report",
3379                extra={"scoped": 0, "appended": 0},
3380            ).to_dict()
3381        snapshot_file_samples: List[str] = []
3382        for entry in entries:
3383            depot, local = self._sync_report_entry_depot_local(entry)
3384            sample_path = depot or local
3385            if sample_path:
3386                snapshot_file_samples.append(sample_path)  # → 调用 _load_or_rebuild_name_path_cache()
3387            if len(snapshot_file_samples) >= 10:
3388                break
3389
3390        ul = self.upload_dir.replace("\\", "/").rstrip("/")
3391        if ul.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
3392            root_local = ul.replace("//hangzhou/", "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/")
3393            root_depot = ul
3394        else:
3395            root_local = ul
3396            root_depot = (
3397                self._local_to_depot_hangzhou(ul) if ul.startswith("D:/PTrack/hangzhou/") else ""
3398            )
3399
3400        # 验证模式下 --limit N 限制“核对条数”。必须在扫描 sync_report 前解析，
3401        # 这样冒烟验证（例如 limit=1）命中足够条目后可以立即停止，避免 trace 全量记录 5 万条过滤过程。
3402        try:
3403            limit_n = self.limit
3404            if limit_n is not None:
3405                limit_n = int(limit_n)
3406        except Exception:
3407            limit_n = None
3408        if limit_n is not None and limit_n <= 0:
3409            lprint(f'[Muse验证][limit] limit={limit_n}，本次不执行核对')
3410            return RunSummary(
3411                mode="verify",
3412                reason="limit_zero",
3413                extra={
3414                    "scoped": 0,
3415                    "appended": 0,
3416                    "exists": 0,
3417                    "missing": 0,
3418                    "errors": 0,
3419                },
3420            ).to_dict()
3421
3422        # 可选：只验证某个 mapping_preset（source | category_root）
3423        verify_preset = str(self.args_data.get("verify_mapping_preset") or "").strip()
3424        work: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []  # → 调用 get_name_category()
3425        scanned_entry_count = 0  # → 调用 _parse_sync_report_hint_category_lists()
3426        limit_stopped_scan = False
3427        for entry in entries:
3428            scanned_entry_count += 1
3429            preset_key = str(entry.get("mapping_preset") or "").strip()  # → 调用 find_muse_assets()
3430            if verify_preset and preset_key != verify_preset:
3431                continue
3432            depot, local = self._sync_report_entry_depot_local(entry)
3433            if not depot.startswith("//hangzhou/"):
3434                continue
3435            if not P4ToMuse._sync_report_depot_under_upload_dir(depot, root_local, root_depot):
3436                continue
3437            if self.sync_ext and not depot.endswith(self.sync_ext):
3438                continue
3439            if self.is_ignore_file(depot):
3440                continue
3441            work.append({
3442                "depot_fp": depot,
3443                "local_fp": local or "",
3444                "prev_action": entry.get("action"),
3445                "mapping_preset": preset_key,
3446                "muse_path": entry.get("muse_path") or "",
3447                "category": entry.get("category") or "",
3448            })
3449            if limit_n is not None and len(work) >= limit_n:
3450                limit_stopped_scan = True
3451                break
3452
3453        lprint(
3454            '[Muse验证]',
3455            ('快照条目数', len(entries)),
3456            ('已扫描快照条目数', scanned_entry_count),
3457            ('本次收集待核', len(work)),
3458            ('limit', limit_n),
3459            ('limit提前停止扫描', limit_stopped_scan),
3460            ('verify_mapping_preset', verify_preset or None),
3461            ('json', json_path),
3462        )
3463        scoped_work_count = len(work)
3464        scoped_file_samples = [
3465            str(item.get("depot_fp") or item.get("local_fp") or "")
3466            for item in work[:10]
3467        ]
3468        if limit_n is not None:
3469            lprint(
3470                "[Muse验证][limit]",
3471                ("limit", limit_n),
3472                ("本次收集待核", len(work)),
3473                ("已扫描快照条目数", scanned_entry_count),
3474                ("提前停止扫描", limit_stopped_scan),
3475            )
3476
3477        self._cached_assets_map = {}
3478        target_category_path = self._resolve_asset_cache_category_path()
3479        if target_category_path:
3480            try:
3481                _t0 = time.perf_counter()
3482                category_ref_chain = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
3483                    target_category_path, recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True
3484                )
3485                if category_ref_chain:
3486                    category_id = category_ref_chain[-1].id
3487                    self._cached_assets_map = self._load_or_rebuild_name_path_cache(category_id)
3488                    _t1 = time.perf_counter()
3489                    lprint(
3490                        "[Muse验证][耗时]",
3491                        ("phase", "preheat_cache"),
3492                        ("elapsed_s", round(_t1 - _t0, 3)),
3493                        ("target_category_path", target_category_path),  # → 调用 run_batch_async()
3494                        ("category_id", category_id),
3495                        ("cached_assets_map_size", len(self._cached_assets_map or {})),
3496                    )
3497                else:
3498                    lprint(
3499                        "[Muse验证][预热缓存失败]",
3500                        ("target_category_path", target_category_path),
3501                        ("error", "未找到目标分类节点"),
3502                        level="CRITICAL",
3503                    )
3504                    raise RuntimeError("Muse verify target category node not found")
3505            except Exception as e:
3506                traceback.print_exc()
3507                lprint(
3508                    "[Muse验证][预热缓存失败]",
3509                    ("target_category_path", target_category_path),
3510                    ("error", str(e)),
3511                    level=lprint.critical,
3512                )
3513                raise
3514
3515        category_service = self.muse_helper.category_service
3516        max_workers = int(max(1, int(max_concurrent or 5)))
3517        exists_n = 0
3518        missing_n = 0
3519        err_n = 0
3520        appended = 0
3521
3522        def _verify_one(item: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
3523            fp = str(item.get("depot_fp") or "")
3524            try:
3525                asset_name, category_list = self.get_name_category(fp)
3526                hint_lists = P4ToMuse._parse_sync_report_hint_category_lists(
3527                    muse_path=item.get("muse_path"),
3528                    category=item.get("category"),
3529                )
3530                existed = self.find_muse_assets(
3531                    asset_name,
3532                    category_list,
3533                    hint_category_lists=hint_lists,
3534                )
3535                exists = bool(existed)
3536                aid: Any = None
3537                if existed:
3538                    rec = existed[0]
3539                    if isinstance(rec, dict):
3540                        # 缓存/服务返回的 dict 多数使用 "id"；兼容旧字段 "asset_id"
3541                        aid = rec.get("asset_id") or rec.get("id")
3542                    else:
3543                        aid = getattr(rec, "asset_id", None)
3544                return {
3545                    "ok": True,
3546                    "depot_fp": fp,
3547                    "local_fp": item.get("local_fp"),
3548                    "exists": exists,
3549                    "asset_id": aid,
3550                    "prev_action": item.get("prev_action"),
3551                    "mapping_preset": item.get("mapping_preset"),
3552                    "muse_path": item.get("muse_path"),
3553                    "category": item.get("category"),  # → 调用 _append_report_entry()
3554                }
3555            except Exception as e:
3556                traceback.print_exc()
3557                lprint(
3558                    "[Muse验证][单条校验失败]",
3559                    ("depot_fp", fp),
3560                    ("local_fp", item.get("local_fp")),
3561                    ("prev_action", item.get("prev_action")),
3562                    ("mapping_preset", item.get("mapping_preset")),
3563                    ("muse_path", item.get("muse_path")),
3564                    ("category", item.get("category")),
3565                    ("error", str(e)),
3566                    level="CRITICAL",
3567                )
3568                raise
3569
3570        verify_pbar = None
3571        try:
3572            verify_pbar = tqdm(
3573                total=len(work),
3574                desc="Muse验证",
3575                unit="条",
3576                dynamic_ncols=False,
3577                mininterval=0.3,
3578                file=sys.stderr,
3579                leave=True,  # → 调用 _maybe_materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot()
3580            )
3581        except Exception:
3582            verify_pbar = None
3583  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
3584        def _on_vprog(_completed: int, _total: int, _result: dict) -> None:
3585            if verify_pbar is not None:
3586                try:
3587                    verify_pbar.update(1)
3588                except Exception:
3589                    pass
3590
3591        results: List[Any] = []
3592        if work:
3593            _t0 = time.perf_counter()
3594            results = category_service.run_batch_async(
3595                items=work,
3596                process_func=_verify_one,
3597                on_progress=_on_vprog,
3598                max_workers=max_workers,
3599            ) or []
3600            _t1 = time.perf_counter()
3601            lprint(
3602                "[Muse验证][耗时]",
3603                ("phase", "run_batch_async_verify"),
3604                ("elapsed_s", round(_t1 - _t0, 3)),
3605                ("work_n", len(work)),
3606                ("max_workers", max_workers),
3607                ("results_n", len(results)),
3608            )
3609
3610        if verify_pbar is not None:
3611            try:
3612                verify_pbar.close()
3613            except Exception:
3614                pass
3615
3616        _ts = time.time()
3617        for row in results:
3618            if not isinstance(row, dict):
3619                continue
3620            if row.get("success") is False and "item" in row:
3621                it = row.get("item") or {}
3622                err_n += 1
3623                fp = str(it.get("depot_fp") or "")
3624                loc = str(it.get("local_fp") or "")
3625                self._append_report_entry({
3626                    "action": "failed",
3627                    "file_path": fp,
3628                    "local_file": loc or None,
3629                    "error": "muse_verify: {}".format(row.get("error") or "batch_failed"),
3630                    "prev_report_action": it.get("prev_action"),
3631                    "source": "muse_verify",
3632                    "ts": _ts,
3633                })
3634                appended += 1
3635                continue
3636            fp = str(row.get("depot_fp") or "")
3637            loc = str(row.get("local_fp") or "")
3638            prev = row.get("prev_action")
3639            if not row.get("ok"):
3640                err_n += 1
3641                self._append_report_entry({
3642                    "action": "failed",
3643                    "file_path": fp,
3644                    "local_file": loc or None,
3645                    "error": "muse_verify: {}".format(row.get("error") or "unknown"),
3646                    "prev_report_action": prev,  # → 调用 to_dict()
3647                    "source": "muse_verify",
3648                    "ts": _ts,
3649                })
3650                appended += 1
3651                continue
3652            if row.get("exists"):  # → 调用 _run_verify_sync_report_against_muse()
3653                exists_n += 1
3654                self._append_report_entry({
3655                    # 需求：发现已上传/已存在也按 created 记入 sync_report（便于视作“已完成”）
3656                    "action": "created",
3657                    "file_path": fp,
3658                    "local_file": loc or None,
3659                    "reason": "muse_verified_exists",
3660                    "asset_id": row.get("asset_id"),
3661                    "prev_report_action": prev,
3662                    "source": "muse_verify",
3663                    "ts": _ts,
3664                })
3665                appended += 1
3666            else:
3667                missing_n += 1
3668                self._append_report_entry({
3669                    "action": "failed",
3670                    "file_path": fp,
3671                    "local_file": loc or None,
3672                    "error": "muse_verify: asset not found in Muse",
3673                    "prev_report_action": prev,
3674                    "source": "muse_verify",
3675                    "ts": _ts,
3676                })
3677                appended += 1
3678
3679        try:
3680            self._maybe_materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot(force=True)
3681        except Exception:
3682            traceback.print_exc()
3683
3684        checked_file_samples = [
3685            str(item.get("depot_fp") or item.get("local_fp") or "")
3686            for item in work[:10]
3687        ]
3688        if len(work) == 0:
3689            overall_result = "未执行"
3690        elif err_n or missing_n:
3691            overall_result = "有问题"
3692        else:
3693            overall_result = "通过"
3694        lprint(
3695            "[Muse验证][检查汇总]",
3696            ("整体结果", overall_result),
3697            ("本次收集候选文件数", scoped_work_count),
3698            ("本次实际检查文件数", len(work)),
3699            ("返回结果数", len(results)),
3700            ("Muse存在", exists_n),
3701            ("Muse不存在", missing_n),
3702            ("异常", err_n),
3703            ("写入json修正数", appended),
3704            ("已扫描快照条目数", scanned_entry_count),
3705            ("limit提前停止扫描", limit_stopped_scan),
3706            ("快照文件样本", snapshot_file_samples),
3707            ("本次收集候选文件样本", scoped_file_samples),
3708            ("实际检查文件样本", checked_file_samples),
3709            ("样本说明", "实际检查受 limit 限制；开启 limit 时不会全量扫描 sync_report"),
3710        )
3711        summary = (
3712            "Muse验证完成：本次收集 {} 条，检查 {} 条，扫描快照 {} 条，写入 json {} 条修正"
3713            "（Muse存在 {}，不存在 {}，异常 {}，整体结果 {}，limit提前停止扫描 {}）".format(
3714                scoped_work_count,
3715                len(work),
3716                scanned_entry_count,
3717                appended,
3718                exists_n,
3719                missing_n,
3720                err_n,
3721                overall_result,
3722                limit_stopped_scan,
3723            )
3724        )
3725        lprint("[Muse验证]", summary)
3726        checked_count = len(work)
3727        return RunSummary(
3728            mode="verify",
3729            ok=overall_result == "通过",
3730            checked=checked_count,
3731            processed=checked_count,
3732            failed=err_n + missing_n,
3733            limit_consumed=checked_count,
3734            extra={
3735                "scoped": scoped_work_count,
3736                "appended": appended,
3737                "exists": exists_n,
3738                "missing": missing_n,
3739                "errors": err_n,
3740                "overall_result": overall_result,
3741                "checked_file_samples": checked_file_samples,
3742                "scoped_file_samples": scoped_file_samples,
3743                "snapshot_file_samples": snapshot_file_samples,
3744                "scanned_entry_count": scanned_entry_count,
3745                "limit_stopped_scan": limit_stopped_scan,
3746            },
3747        ).to_dict()
3748

# >>深度5 路径1-1-3-2-13 #132 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1005 in _resolve_asset_cache_category_path() ← :3377 ⏱️[1.00ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1005    def _resolve_asset_cache_category_path(self) -> List[str]:
1006        if self.muse_category_path:
1007            return [p.strip() for p in self.muse_category_path.split('/') if p.strip()]
1008        if self.config_common_category_root:
1009            return list(self.config_common_category_root)  # 返回值 (第1009行) ['动作资源']
1010        return [str(p).strip() for p in (self.category_root or []) if str(p).strip()]
1011

# >>深度6 路径1-1-3-2-13-1 #133 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/muse_helper/services/category_service.py:1028 in get_category_refs_by_path() ← <@beartype(anim_upload_muse_tool.muse_helper.services.category_service.CategoryService.get_category_refs_by_path) at 0x1cdeb811ee0>:97 ⏱️[36.6607s] 🔥 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1028    @beartype  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254963866064_9101:变量·self·self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.muse_helper.services.c…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.muse_helper.services.category_service.CategoryService object at 0x000001CDED06F1D0>, category_path=['动作资源'], recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True, self.cache_dir='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', self.enable_file_cache=True, self.enable_memory_cache=True, self.muse_client=<muse_python_api.main.MuseClient object at 0x000001CDECA45810>, self.organization_id='h42', self.asset_type='simpleaction', self.max_concurrent=10, self.timeout=60.0
self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.muse_helper.services.category_service.CategoryService object at 0x000001CDED06F1D0>, category_path=['动作资源'], recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True, self.cache_dir='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', self.enable_file_cache=True, self.enable_memory_cache=True, self.muse_client=<muse_python_api.main.MuseClient object at 0x000001CDECA45810>, self.organization_id='h42', self.asset_type='simpleaction', self.max_concurrent=10, self.timeout=60.0
1029    def get_category_refs_by_path(
1030        self,
1031        category_path: List[str],
1032        recursive: bool = False,
1033        full_chain: bool = False,
1034        use_cache: bool = True,
1035    ) -> List[CategoryRef]:
1036        """
1037        根据分类路径获取分类引用（CategoryRef）
1038
1039        Args:
1040            category_path: 分类路径列表
1041            recursive: 是否递归获取子分类
1042            full_chain: 仅当 recursive=False 时有效。为 True 时返回从根到叶的 **完整 ID 链**
1043                （Muse publish/receive 的 categories 字段需要此格式）；为 False 时仅返回
1044                **叶子节点 ID**（与旧行为一致，用于列表/搜索等）。
1045            use_cache: 是否使用缓存（内存缓存 + 文件缓存）
1046
1047        Returns:
1048            分类引用列表（CategoryRef）
1049        """
1050        try:
1051            category_list = self._get_category_list(use_cache=use_cache)  # → 调用 _get_category_list()  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254987974816_9126:变量·category_list·list·1641806字符·category_list=list (category_list), 1641806 字符 [BI…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 category_list=list (category_list), 1641806 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000005 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=1641806 sha256=f1c734a1dca4]
category_list=list (category_list), 1641806 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000005 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=1641806 sha256=f1c734a1dca4]
1052            if category_list is None:
1053                return []
1054
1055            result: List[CategoryRef] = []
1056            if full_chain:
1057                if not self._find_category_ref_chain(category_list, category_path, 0, result):  # → 调用 _find_category_ref_chain()
1058                    result.clear()
1059            else:
1060                self._find_category_refs(category_list, category_path, 0, result, recursive)
1061
1062            return result
1063
1064        except Exception as e:
1065            traceback.print_exc()
1066            lprint("[分类引用]", ("结果", "获取失败"), ("错误", e), level='ERROR')
1067            return []
1068

# >>深度7 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-1 #134 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/muse_helper/services/category_service.py:1419 in _get_category_list() ← :1051 ⏱️[465.36ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1419    def _get_category_list(self, use_cache: bool = True) -> Optional[List[MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel]]:  # 💡 use_cache=True
1420        """
1421        获取当前组织的分类列表，校验树结构，失败返回 None。
1422
1423        约束：
1424        - 统一走 get_category_tree_cache，避免落入 get_category_tree 的无缓存路径；
1425        - use_cache 仅控制“是否允许命中内存缓存”，不改变接口入口。
1426        """
1427        cache_result = self.get_category_tree_cache(
1428            use_cache=use_cache,
1429            use_file_cache=bool(self.enable_file_cache),
1430            save_to_file=self.enable_file_cache,
1431        )
1432        tree = cache_result.tree  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254988974512_9163:变量·tree·MuseCategoryTreePayloadModel·1641891字符·tree=MuseCategoryTreePayloadModel (tree), 1641891 …·点击展开]]
💡 变量 tree=MuseCategoryTreePayloadModel (tree), 1641891 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000006 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=1641891 sha256=c1edda71f0c9]
tree=MuseCategoryTreePayloadModel (tree), 1641891 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000006 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=1641891 sha256=c1edda71f0c9]
1433        if not tree or not tree.categories:
1434            lprint("[分类树]", ("结果", "为空"), ("原因", "API 返回空数据"), level='WARNING')
1435            return None
1436        return cast(List[MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel], list(tree.categories))  # [[EXPAND:ret_expand_0ad220ca0269_9167:返回值·(第1436行) [MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel(id=22220065564…·共271字符·点击展开]]
返回值 (第1436行) [MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel(id=222200655642629, name='四足（蹄类）', value=222200655642629, depth=...
(第1436行) [MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel(id=222200655642629, name='四足（蹄类）', value=222200655642629, depth=0, destroy=False, name_multil={'en_US': 'tetrapods', 'zh_CN': '四足（蹄类）... [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000007 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=50023 sha256=bfec8f039aa0]
1437

parent_id=483380754448385, asset_type='simpleaction', weight=0, children=[], created_at='2026-04-22 02:09:59', created_by='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', updated_at='2026-04-22 02:09:59', updated_by='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', asset_count=45), MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel(id=483381446049793, name='成女
1070        self,
1071        tree: List[MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel],
1072        path: List[str],
1073        depth: int,
1074        result: List[CategoryRef],
1075    ) -> bool:
1076        """从根到叶依次匹配 path，将路径上每一级 CategoryRef 追加到 result。"""
1077        if depth >= len(path):
1078            return False
1079        target_name = path[depth]
1080        for category in tree:
1081            category_name = category.name or ""  # 💡 category_name='四足（蹄类）' (str)
1082            category_id = category.id  # 💡 category_id=222200655642629 (int)
1083            children = category.children or []  # 💡 children=[] (list)
1084            if category_name != target_name:
1085                continue
1086            if category_id is not None:
1087                # full_chain=True：尽量在每一级都携带完整 id_chain（从根到当前）
1088                cid = int(str(category_id).strip())
1089                prefix_chain = result[-1].id_chain if result else []
1090                prefix_segments = result[-1].path_segments if result else ()
1091                result.append(
1092                    CategoryRef(
1093                        id_chain=[*prefix_chain, cid],
1094                        display_name=category_name,
1095                        path_segments=(*prefix_segments, category_name),
1096                    )
1097                )
1098            if depth == len(path) - 1:
1099                return True  # 返回值 (第1099行) True
1100            if children and self._find_category_ref_chain(children, path, depth + 1, result):  # → 调用 _find_category_ref_chain()
1101                return True
1102            if result:
1103                result.pop()
1104        return False
1105

# >>深度7 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3 #136 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1383 in _load_or_rebuild_name_path_cache() ← :3386 ⏱️[2.5878s] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1383    def _load_or_rebuild_name_path_cache(self, category_id):  # 💡 category_id=482174690918401
1384        cache_file = self._get_primary_cache_file()  # → 调用 _get_primary_cache_file()
1385        # 兼容旧缓存文件名（迁移期间）
1386        tpls = self.muse_helper.get_cache_name_templates()  # → 调用 get_cache_name_templates()  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254984501040_9234:变量·tpls·dict·149字符·{'index': '{org_id}_muse_asset_index_cache.json', …·点击展开]]
💡 变量 tpls=dict (tpls), 149 字符
{'index': '{org_id}_muse_asset_index_cache.json', 'raw': '{org_id}_all_muse_asset_raw_cache.json', 'legacy_index': 'muse_assets_cache_{org_id}.json'}
1387        legacy_cache_file = os.path.join(
1388            self._get_cache_dir(),  # → 调用 _get_cache_dir()
1389            tpls['legacy_index'].format(org_id=self._get_org_id_str()),  # → 调用 _get_org_id_str()
1390        )
1391        if (not os.path.exists(cache_file)) and os.path.exists(legacy_cache_file):
1392            cache_file = legacy_cache_file
1393        should_rebuild_cache = True  # 💡 should_rebuild_cache=True (bool)
1394        loaded_map = {}  # 💡 loaded_map={} (dict)
1395        if os.path.exists(cache_file):
1396            lprint(f'[批量查询] 发现缓存文件，直接读取: {cache_file}')
1397            try:
1398                with open(cache_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1399                    loaded_cache = json.load(f)
1400            except Exception as e:
1401                loaded_cache = {}
1402                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存读取失败，将自动重建缓存: {e}')
1403            if isinstance(loaded_cache, dict):
1404                loaded_map = loaded_cache  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254987974816_9258:变量·loaded_map·dict·9404395字符·loaded_map=dict (loaded_map), 9404395 字符 [BIG_VALU…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 loaded_map=dict (loaded_map), 9404395 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000008 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=9404395 sha256=1353bcbdd9c4]
loaded_map=dict (loaded_map), 9404395 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000008 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=9404395 sha256=1353bcbdd9c4]
1405            total_assets = sum(len(paths) for paths in loaded_map.values())  # → 调用 <genexpr>()  # 💡 total_assets=25346 (int)
1406            if total_assets > 0:
1407                should_rebuild_cache = False  # 💡 should_rebuild_cache=False (bool)
1408                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存读取完成，共 {total_assets} 个资产（{len(loaded_map)} 个唯一名称）')
1409            else:
1410                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存为空，触发重建: {cache_file}')
1411        if should_rebuild_cache:
1412            category_assets_map = self._fetch_category_assets_map([category_id])
1413            loaded_map, empty_category_count = self._build_name_path_cache_from_category_assets(category_assets_map)
1414            if empty_category_count > 0:
1415                lprint(f'[警告] 共有 {empty_category_count} 个资产的 category_names 为空')
1416            if self.save_index_cache:
1417                os.makedirs(self._get_cache_dir(), exist_ok=True)
1418                with open(cache_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1419                    json.dump(loaded_map, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
1420                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存数据已保存到: {cache_file}')
1421        return loaded_map  # [[EXPAND:ret_expand_6b32c4877ac9_9279:返回值·(第1421行) {'jumpcrash03_b': {'482174690918401 / 483…·共271字符·点击展开]]
返回值 (第1421行) {'jumpcrash03_b': {'482174690918401 / 483152808509441 / 483152808509442 / 483541410643969 /...

# >>深度8 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-1 #137 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1293 in _get_primary_cache_file() ← :1384 ⏱️[212.45ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1293    def _get_primary_cache_file(self) -> str:
1294        tpls = self.muse_helper.get_cache_name_templates()  # → 调用 get_cache_name_templates()
1295        filename = tpls['index'].format(org_id=self._get_org_id_str())  # → 调用 _get_org_id_str()  # 💡 filename='h42' (str)
1296        return os.path.join(self._get_cache_dir(), filename)  # → 调用 _get_cache_dir()
1297

# >>深度9 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-1-1 #138 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/muse_helper/main.py:534 in get_cache_name_templates() ← p4_to_muse_new.py:1294 ⏱️[116.19ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

534    def get_cache_name_templates(self) -> Dict[str, str]:
535        """读取缓存命名模板。"""
536        data = self.get_helper_config()  # → 调用 get_helper_config()
537        cache_cfg = (data.get('cache') or {})
538        naming_cfg = (cache_cfg.get('naming') or {})
539        index_tpl = naming_cfg.get('index_cache_filename')
540        raw_tpl = naming_cfg.get('raw_cache_filename')
541        legacy_tpl = naming_cfg.get('legacy_index_cache_filename')
542        if not index_tpl or not raw_tpl:
543            raise ValueError('cache.naming.index_cache_filename and raw_cache_filename are required')
544        return {
545            'index': index_tpl,
546            'raw': raw_tpl,
547            'legacy_index': legacy_tpl or 'muse_assets_cache_{org_id}.json',
548        }
549

# >>深度10 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-1-1-1 #139 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/muse_helper/main.py:523 in get_helper_config() ← :536 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

523    def get_helper_config(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
524        """读取 muse_helper/config/config.yaml 配置。"""
525        import yaml
526        cfg_path = os.path.normpath(
527            os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), 'config', 'config.yaml')
528        )
529        if not os.path.exists(cfg_path):
530            raise ValueError(f'helper config not found: {cfg_path}')
531        with open(cfg_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
532            return yaml.safe_load(f) or {}
533

# >>深度10 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-1-1-2 #140 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1285 in _get_org_id_str() ← :1295 ⏱️[998.74μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1285    def _get_org_id_str(self) -> str:
1286        org_id = str(self.muse_lib or '').strip()  # 💡 org_id='h42' (str)
1287        if not org_id or org_id == 'unknown':
1288            raise ValueError(
1289                'muse_lib is required and must be resolved before reading/writing report files'
1290            )
1291        return org_id  # 返回值 (第1291行) 'h42'
1292

# >>深度10 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-1-1-3 #141 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1151 in _get_cache_dir() ← :1296 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[6.5715s]

1151    def _get_cache_dir(self) -> str:
1152        if not self.cache_dir:
1153            raise ValueError('cache_dir is required')
1154        return self.cache_dir  # 返回值 (第1154行) 'D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache'
1155

# >>深度9 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-1-2 #142 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/muse_helper/main.py:534 in get_cache_name_templates() ← p4_to_muse_new.py:1386 ⏱️[77.53ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[287.13ms]

534    def get_cache_name_templates(self) -> Dict[str, str]:
535        """读取缓存命名模板。"""
536        data = self.get_helper_config()  # → 调用 get_helper_config()
537        cache_cfg = (data.get('cache') or {})
538        naming_cfg = (cache_cfg.get('naming') or {})
539        index_tpl = naming_cfg.get('index_cache_filename')
540        raw_tpl = naming_cfg.get('raw_cache_filename')
541        legacy_tpl = naming_cfg.get('legacy_index_cache_filename')
542        if not index_tpl or not raw_tpl:
543            raise ValueError('cache.naming.index_cache_filename and raw_cache_filename are required')
544        return {
545            'index': index_tpl,
546            'raw': raw_tpl,
547            'legacy_index': legacy_tpl or 'muse_assets_cache_{org_id}.json',
548        }
549

# >>深度10 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-1-2-1 #143 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/muse_helper/main.py:523 in get_helper_config() ← :536 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

523    def get_helper_config(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
524        """读取 muse_helper/config/config.yaml 配置。"""
525        import yaml
526        cfg_path = os.path.normpath(
527            os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), 'config', 'config.yaml')
528        )
529        if not os.path.exists(cfg_path):
530            raise ValueError(f'helper config not found: {cfg_path}')
531        with open(cfg_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
532            return yaml.safe_load(f) or {}
533

1285    def _get_org_id_str(self) -> str:
1286        org_id = str(self.muse_lib or '').strip()  # 💡 org_id='h42' (str)
1287        if not org_id or org_id == 'unknown':
1288            raise ValueError(
1289                'muse_lib is required and must be resolved before reading/writing report files'
1290            )
1291        return org_id  # 返回值 (第1291行) 'h42'

# >>深度8 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-4 #146 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1405 in <genexpr>() ← :1405 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[174.50ms]

1405    def _load_or_rebuild_name_path_cache(self, category_id):  # → 调用 <genexpr>()  # 💡 .0=<dict_valueiterator object at 0x000001CDA940C900>  # 返回值 (第1405行) 2
1406        cache_file = self._get_primary_cache_file()
1407        # 兼容旧缓存文件名（迁移期间）
1408        tpls = self.muse_helper.get_cache_name_templates()
1409        legacy_cache_file = os.path.join(
1410            self._get_cache_dir(),
1411            tpls['legacy_index'].format(org_id=self._get_org_id_str()),
1412        )
1413        if (not os.path.exists(cache_file)) and os.path.exists(legacy_cache_file):
1414            cache_file = legacy_cache_file
1415        should_rebuild_cache = True
1416        loaded_map = {}
1417        if os.path.exists(cache_file):
1418            lprint(f'[批量查询] 发现缓存文件，直接读取: {cache_file}')
1419            try:
1420                with open(cache_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1421                    loaded_cache = json.load(f)
1422            except Exception as e:
1423                loaded_cache = {}
1424                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存读取失败，将自动重建缓存: {e}')
1425            if isinstance(loaded_cache, dict):
1426                loaded_map = loaded_cache
1427            total_assets = sum(len(paths) for paths in loaded_map.values())
1428            if total_assets > 0:
1429                should_rebuild_cache = False
1430                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存读取完成，共 {total_assets} 个资产（{len(loaded_map)} 个唯一名称）')
1431            else:
1432                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存为空，触发重建: {cache_file}')
1433        if should_rebuild_cache:
1434            category_assets_map = self._fetch_category_assets_map([category_id])
1435            loaded_map, empty_category_count = self._build_name_path_cache_from_category_assets(category_assets_map)
1436            if empty_category_count > 0:
1437                lprint(f'[警告] 共有 {empty_category_count} 个资产的 category_names 为空')
1438            if self.save_index_cache:
1439                os.makedirs(self._get_cache_dir(), exist_ok=True)
1440                with open(cache_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1441                    json.dump(loaded_map, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
1442                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存数据已保存到: {cache_file}')
1443        return loaded_map
1444

1432                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存为空，触发重建: {cache_file}')
1433        if should_rebuild_cache:
1434            category_assets_map = self._fetch_category_assets_map([category_id])
1435            loaded_map, empty_category_count = self._build_name_path_cache_from_category_assets(category_assets_map)
1436            if empty_category_count > 0:
1437                lprint(f'[警告] 共有 {empty_category_count} 个资产的 category_names 为空')
1438            if self.save_index_cache:
1439                os.makedirs(self._get_cache_dir(), exist_ok=True)
1440                with open(cache_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1441                    json.dump(loaded_map, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
1442                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存数据已保存到: {cache_file}')
1443        return loaded_map
1444

'大轻功']}}, '482174690918401 / 483152808509441 / 483155566460929 / 483155578585089 / 483280766238721 / 483280774627331': {'id': '69e7023e899fe27bb27ad882', 'name': 'jumpcrash03', 'category_names': [], 'category_id_path': ['482174690918401', '483152808509441', '483155566460929', '483155578585089', '483280766238721', '483280774627331'], 'common': {'custom_tags': ['轻功动画', '大轻功']}}}
1406        cache_file = self._get_primary_cache_file()
1407        # 兼容旧缓存文件名（迁移期间）
1408        tpls = self.muse_helper.get_cache_name_templates()
1409        legacy_cache_file = os.path.join(
1410            self._get_cache_dir(),
1411            tpls['legacy_index'].format(org_id=self._get_org_id_str()),
1412        )
1413        if (not os.path.exists(cache_file)) and os.path.exists(legacy_cache_file):
1414            cache_file = legacy_cache_file
1415        should_rebuild_cache = True
1416        loaded_map = {}
1417        if os.path.exists(cache_file):
1418            lprint(f'[批量查询] 发现缓存文件，直接读取: {cache_file}')
1419            try:
1420                with open(cache_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1421                    loaded_cache = json.load(f)
1422            except Exception as e:
1423                loaded_cache = {}
1424                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存读取失败，将自动重建缓存: {e}')
1425            if isinstance(loaded_cache, dict):
1426                loaded_map = loaded_cache
1427            total_assets = sum(len(paths) for paths in loaded_map.values())
1428            if total_assets > 0:
1429                should_rebuild_cache = False
1430                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存读取完成，共 {total_assets} 个资产（{len(loaded_map)} 个唯一名称）')
1431            else:
1432                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存为空，触发重建: {cache_file}')
1433        if should_rebuild_cache:
1434            category_assets_map = self._fetch_category_assets_map([category_id])
1435            loaded_map, empty_category_count = self._build_name_path_cache_from_category_assets(category_assets_map)
1436            if empty_category_count > 0:
1437                lprint(f'[警告] 共有 {empty_category_count} 个资产的 category_names 为空')
1438            if self.save_index_cache:
1439                os.makedirs(self._get_cache_dir(), exist_ok=True)
1440                with open(cache_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1441                    json.dump(loaded_map, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
1442                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存数据已保存到: {cache_file}')
1443        return loaded_map
1444

.0=<dict_valueiterator object at 0x000001CDA940C900>, paths={'482174690918401 / 483152808509441 / 483540064862209 / 483540068466689 / 483540072988673 / 483540215267330': {'id': '69e981497969e8381103b2e3', 'name': 'man_biaobai_2', 'category_names': [], 'category_id_path': ['482174690918401', '483152808509441', '483540064862209', '483540068466689', '483540072988673', '483540215267330'], 'common': {'custom_tags': ['动补表情动画', '男性']}}}
1406        cache_file = self._get_primary_cache_file()
1407        # 兼容旧缓存文件名（迁移期间）
1408        tpls = self.muse_helper.get_cache_name_templates()
1409        legacy_cache_file = os.path.join(
1410            self._get_cache_dir(),
1411            tpls['legacy_index'].format(org_id=self._get_org_id_str()),
1412        )
1413        if (not os.path.exists(cache_file)) and os.path.exists(legacy_cache_file):
1414            cache_file = legacy_cache_file
1415        should_rebuild_cache = True
1416        loaded_map = {}
1417        if os.path.exists(cache_file):
1418            lprint(f'[批量查询] 发现缓存文件，直接读取: {cache_file}')
1419            try:
1420                with open(cache_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1421                    loaded_cache = json.load(f)
1422            except Exception as e:
1423                loaded_cache = {}
1424                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存读取失败，将自动重建缓存: {e}')
1425            if isinstance(loaded_cache, dict):
1426                loaded_map = loaded_cache
1427            total_assets = sum(len(paths) for paths in loaded_map.values())
1428            if total_assets > 0:
1429                should_rebuild_cache = False
1430                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存读取完成，共 {total_assets} 个资产（{len(loaded_map)} 个唯一名称）')
1431            else:
1432                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存为空，触发重建: {cache_file}')
1433        if should_rebuild_cache:
1434            category_assets_map = self._fetch_category_assets_map([category_id])
1435            loaded_map, empty_category_count = self._build_name_path_cache_from_category_assets(category_assets_map)
1436            if empty_category_count > 0:
1437                lprint(f'[警告] 共有 {empty_category_count} 个资产的 category_names 为空')
1438            if self.save_index_cache:
1439                os.makedirs(self._get_cache_dir(), exist_ok=True)
1440                with open(cache_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1441                    json.dump(loaded_map, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
1442                lprint(f'[批量查询] 缓存数据已保存到: {cache_file}')
1443        return loaded_map
1444

self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.muse_helper.services.category_service.CategoryService object at 0x000001CDED06F1D0>, items=[{'depot_fp': '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'local_fp': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'prev_action': 'rebuilt', 'mapping_preset': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑 | 动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑', 'muse_path': '动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男', 'category': '动作资源 / 坐骑 / 主角_坐骑 / 晴雪仙气坐骑 / 成男'}], process_func=<function P4ToMuse._run_verify_sync_report_against_muse.<locals>._verify_one at 0x000001CDECB2A020>, on_progress=<function P4ToMuse._run_verify_sync_report_against_muse.<locals>._on_vprog at 0x000001CDC54A8220>, max_workers=10, timeout=None, self.cache_dir='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', self.enable_file_cache=True, self.enable_memory_cache=True, self.muse_client=<muse_python_api.main.MuseClient object at 0x000001CDECA45810>, self.organization_id='h42', self.asset_type='simpleaction', self.max_concurrent=10, self.timeout=60.0
849    def run_batch_async(
850        self,
851        items: List[Any],
852        process_func: Callable[[Any], Any],
853        on_progress: Optional[Callable[[int, int, Any], None]] = None,
854        max_workers: Optional[int] = None,
855        timeout: Optional[float] = None,
856    ) -> List[Any]:
857        """
858        异步批量处理（通用方法）
859        
860        Args:
861            items: 待处理项列表
862            process_func: 单项处理函数
863            on_progress: 进度回调 (completed, total, result)
864            max_workers: 最大并发数（None 则使用实例默认值）
865            timeout: 单个任务超时时间（秒，None 则使用实例默认值）
866        
867        Returns:
868            处理结果列表
869        """
870        if not items:
871            return []
872        
873        loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()  # 💡 loop=<ProactorEventLoop running=False closed=False debug=False> (ProactorEventLoop)
874        asyncio.set_event_loop(loop)
875        
876        try:
877            results = loop.run_until_complete(
878                self._run_all_async(items, process_func, on_progress, max_workers, timeout)
879            )
880        finally:
881            loop.close()
882        
883        return results  # [[EXPAND:ret_expand_64575c9f6ed9_9907:返回值·[{'ok': True, 'depot_fp': '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式…·共443字符·点击展开]]
返回值 (第883行) [{'ok': True, 'depot_fp': '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车... len=1]
[{'ok': True, 'depot_fp': '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'local_fp': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'exists': True, 'asset_id': '69e879c1ac658e1b48b0fd99', 'prev_action': 'rebuilt', 'mapping_preset': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑 | 动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑', 'muse_path': '动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男', 'category': '动作资源 / 坐骑 / 主角_坐骑 / 晴雪仙气坐骑 / 成男'}]

889        on_progress: Optional[Callable[[int, int, Any], None]],
890        max_workers: Optional[int] = None,
891        timeout: Optional[float] = None,
892    ) -> List[Any]:
893        """异步执行所有任务"""
894        # 使用传入的 max_workers，如果为 None 则使用实例默认值
895        concurrent_limit = max_workers if max_workers is not None else self.max_concurrent  # 💡 concurrent_limit=10 (int)
896        effective_timeout = timeout if timeout is not None else self.timeout
897        semaphore = asyncio.Semaphore(concurrent_limit)
898        completed_count = 0
899        total_count = len(items)
900        
901        async def _one(item: Any) -> Any:
902            """单个任务的异步包装器"""
903            nonlocal completed_count
904            
905            if self._cancelled:
906                return self._build_batch_error_result(
907                    item,
908                    status="cancelled",
909                    error_message="用户取消",
910                )
911            
912            async with semaphore:
913                try:
914                    result = await asyncio.wait_for(
915                        asyncio.get_event_loop().run_in_executor(
916                            None, process_func, item
917                        ),
918                        timeout=effective_timeout
919                    )
920                except asyncio.TimeoutError:
921                    self._handle_service_exception(
922                        Exception("asyncio.TimeoutError"),
923                        context=f"run_batch_async.timeout timeout_s={effective_timeout}",
924                    )
925                    result = self._build_batch_error_result(
926                        item,
927                        status="timeout",
928                        error_message=f'超时（{effective_timeout}秒）',
929                    )
930                except Exception as e:
931                    self._handle_service_exception(
932                        e,
933                        context="run_batch_async.process_func",
934                    )
935                    result = self._build_batch_error_result(
936                        item,
937                        status="failed",
938                        error_message=str(e),
939                    )
940            
941            completed_count += 1
942            
943            if on_progress:
944                try:
945                    on_progress(completed_count, total_count, result)  # → 调用 _on_vprog()
946                except Exception:
947                    self._handle_service_exception(
948                        Exception("on_progress callback failed"),
949                        context="run_batch_async.on_progress",
950                    )
951                    pass
952            
953            return result
954        
955        async_tasks = [_one(item) for item in items]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 async_tasks='[<coroutine object BaseService._run_all_async.<locals>._one at 0x000001CDEDE7A34... len=1]' (str)
956        results = await asyncio.gather(*async_tasks, return_exceptions=False)
957        
958        return results
959

# >>深度13 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-1 #161 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1972 in get_name_category() ← :3424 ⏱️[256.17ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1972    def get_name_category(self, file_path):  # 💡 file_path='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max'
1973        # 统一使用 init_muse 中加载的配置参数，不再根据文件路径重新加载配置
1974        # 这样可以确保所有文件都使用 bat 传入的 UPLOAD_PATH 对应的统一规则
1975
1976        file_path_no_ext = os.path.splitext(file_path)[0].replace('\\', '/')  # 💡 file_path_no_ext='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男' (str)
1977        relative_path = self._strip_config_source_prefix(file_path_no_ext)  # → 调用 _strip_config_source_prefix()  # 💡 relative_path='晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男' (str)
1978        file_path_items = [part for part in relative_path.split('/') if part]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 file_path_items=['晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男', '主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男'] (list)
1979        if not file_path_items:
1980            file_path_items = [os.path.basename(file_path_no_ext)]
1981        asset_name = file_path_items[-1]  # 💡 asset_name='主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男' (str)
1982        if len(file_path_items) > self.asset_name_index:
1983            asset_name = file_path_items[self.asset_name_index]
1984        elif len(file_path_items) < self.asset_name_max:
1985            if self.default_asset_name:
1986                asset_name = self.default_asset_name
1987            else:
1988                asset_name = file_path_items[self.category_end-1]
1989
1990        # category_end 为 -1 时，自动推导为 asset_name_index（分类取资产名之前的所有层级）
1991        effective_category_end = self.category_end  # 💡 effective_category_end=-1 (int)
1992        if effective_category_end == -1 and self.asset_name_index != 0:
1993            effective_category_end = self.asset_name_index
1994
1995        category_list = file_path_items[self.category_start:effective_category_end]  # 💡 category_list=['晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男'] (list)
1996
1997        # 优先使用 muse_category_path 参数，如果没有则使用 YAML 配置的 category_root
1998        if self.muse_category_path:
1999            category_root = [p.strip() for p in self.muse_category_path.split('/')]
2000            category_list = self._merge_category_root_dedup(category_root, category_list)
2001        elif self.category_root:
2002            category_list = self._merge_category_root_dedup(self.category_root, category_list)  # → 调用 _merge_category_root_dedup()  # 💡 category_list=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男'] (list)
2003
2004        return asset_name, category_list  # 返回值 (第2004行) ('主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男', ['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男'])
2005

# >>深度14 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-1-1 #162 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1877 in _strip_config_source_prefix() ← :1977 ⏱️[97.13ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1877    def _strip_config_source_prefix(self, full_path_no_ext: str) -> str:  # 💡 full_path_no_ext='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男'
1878        """将本地/远端源路径前缀收口，返回相对业务路径（不含扩展名）。"""
1879        normalized = full_path_no_ext.replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')  # 💡 normalized='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男' (str)
1880        candidates: List[str] = []  # 💡 candidates=[] (list)
1881        seen: set[str] = set()  # 💡 seen=set() (set)
1882
1883        def _add_base(p: str) -> None:
1884            for v in P4ToMuse._hangzhou_depot_local_variants(p):  # → 调用 _hangzhou_depot_local_variants()
1885                vx = v.rstrip('/')
1886                if vx and vx not in seen:
1887                    seen.add(vx)
1888                    candidates.append(vx)
1889
1890        if getattr(self, 'path_source_prefix', ''):
1891            _add_base(str(self.path_source_prefix))  # → 调用 _add_base()
1892        if self.upload_dir:
1893            _add_base(str(self.upload_dir))  # → 调用 _add_base()
1894
1895        # 更长前缀优先，避免短根前缀误切
1896        candidates.sort(key=len, reverse=True)
1897
1898        for pfx in candidates:
1899            if not pfx:
1900                continue
1901            if normalized == pfx:
1902                return ''
1903            if normalized.startswith(pfx + '/'):
1904                return normalized[len(pfx) + 1:]  # 返回值 (第1904行) '晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男'
1905        return normalized.lstrip('/')
1906

1883        def _add_base(p: str) -> None:  # 💡 p='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', candidates=[], seen=set()
1884            for v in P4ToMuse._hangzhou_depot_local_variants(p):  # → 调用 _hangzhou_depot_local_variants()  # 返回值 (第1884行) None
1885                vx = v.rstrip('/')  # 💡 vx='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
1886                if vx and vx not in seen:
1887                    seen.add(vx)
1888                    candidates.append(vx)
1889

# >>深度16 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-1-1-1-1 #164 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1857 in _hangzhou_depot_local_variants() ← :1884 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1857    @staticmethod  # 💡 path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'
1858    def _hangzhou_depot_local_variants(path: str) -> List[str]:
1859        """同一路径的 //hangzhou/... 与 D:/PTrack/hangzhou/... 变体（用于前缀剥离）。
1860
1861        sync_report / verify 常为 depot 路径，而 upload_dir 多为本地盘符路径；若不同时纳入候选，
1862        _strip_config_source_prefix 无法剥掉 upload 根，导致 category_list 混入 hangzhou、项目名等，
1863        get_category_refs_by_path 在 Muse 分类树上匹配失败。
1864        """
1865        norm = str(path).replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')  # 💡 norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
1866        if not norm:
1867            return []
1868        out: List[str] = [norm]  # 💡 out=['D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'] (list)
1869        hz_depot = '//hangzhou/'  # 💡 hz_depot='//hangzhou/' (str)
1870        hz_local = 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/'  # 💡 hz_local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/' (str)
1871        if norm.startswith(hz_depot):
1872            out.append(hz_local + norm[len(hz_depot):])
1873        elif norm.startswith(hz_local):
1874            out.append(hz_depot + norm[len(hz_local):])
1875        return out  # 返回值 (第1875行) ['D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑']
1876

# >>深度15 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-1-1-2 #165 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1883 in _add_base() ← :1893 ⏱️[26.03ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1862        _strip_config_source_prefix 无法剥掉 upload 根，导致 category_list 混入 hangzhou、项目名等，
1863        get_category_refs_by_path 在 Muse 分类树上匹配失败。
1864        """

1867            return []

1869        hz_depot = '//hangzhou/'  # 💡 hz_depot='//hangzhou/' (str)

# >>深度14 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-1-2 #167 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1978 in <listcomp>() ← :1978 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1978    def get_name_category(self, file_path):  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 .0=<list_iterator object at 0x000001CDEC959AB0>  # 返回值 (第1978行) ['晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男', '主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男']
1979        # 统一使用 init_muse 中加载的配置参数，不再根据文件路径重新加载配置
1980        # 这样可以确保所有文件都使用 bat 传入的 UPLOAD_PATH 对应的统一规则
1981
1982        file_path_no_ext = os.path.splitext(file_path)[0].replace('\\', '/')
1983        relative_path = self._strip_config_source_prefix(file_path_no_ext)
1984        file_path_items = [part for part in relative_path.split('/') if part]
1985        if not file_path_items:
1986            file_path_items = [os.path.basename(file_path_no_ext)]
1987        asset_name = file_path_items[-1]
1988        if len(file_path_items) > self.asset_name_index:
1989            asset_name = file_path_items[self.asset_name_index]
1990        elif len(file_path_items) < self.asset_name_max:
1991            if self.default_asset_name:
1992                asset_name = self.default_asset_name
1993            else:
1994                asset_name = file_path_items[self.category_end-1]
1995
1996        # category_end 为 -1 时，自动推导为 asset_name_index（分类取资产名之前的所有层级）
1997        effective_category_end = self.category_end
1998        if effective_category_end == -1 and self.asset_name_index != 0:
1999            effective_category_end = self.asset_name_index
2000
2001        category_list = file_path_items[self.category_start:effective_category_end]
2002  # → 调用 _merge_category_root_dedup()
2003        # 优先使用 muse_category_path 参数，如果没有则使用 YAML 配置的 category_root
2004        if self.muse_category_path:
2005            category_root = [p.strip() for p in self.muse_category_path.split('/')]
2006            category_list = self._merge_category_root_dedup(category_root, category_list)
2007        elif self.category_root:
2008            category_list = self._merge_category_root_dedup(self.category_root, category_list)
2009
2010        return asset_name, category_list
2011

# >>深度14 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-1-3 #168 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1949 in _merge_category_root_dedup() ← :2002 ⏱️[33.47ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[4.5822s]

1949    @staticmethod  # 💡 category_root=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑'], category_list=['晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男']
1950    def _merge_category_root_dedup(
1951        category_root: Sequence[str],
1952        category_list: Sequence[str],
1953    ) -> List[str]:
1954        """
1955        合并分类前缀与相对路径分类，并去掉边界处重复的最长后缀/前缀。
1956        """
1957        root_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_root if str(p).strip()]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1958        list_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_list if str(p).strip()]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1959        if not root_parts:
1960            return list_parts
1961        if not list_parts:
1962            return root_parts
1963
1964        max_overlap = min(len(root_parts), len(list_parts))
1965        overlap = 0
1966        for size in range(max_overlap, 0, -1):
1967            if root_parts[-size:] == list_parts[:size]:
1968                overlap = size
1969                break
1970        return root_parts + list_parts[overlap:]
1971

# >>深度15 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-1-3-1 #169 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1957 in <listcomp>() ← :1957 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1957    def _merge_category_root_dedup(  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 .0=<list_iterator object at 0x000001CDEC959AB0>  # 返回值 (第1957行) ['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑']
1958        category_root: Sequence[str],  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1959        category_list: Sequence[str],
1960    ) -> List[str]:
1961        """
1962        合并分类前缀与相对路径分类，并去掉边界处重复的最长后缀/前缀。
1963        """
1964        root_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_root if str(p).strip()]
1965        list_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_list if str(p).strip()]
1966        if not root_parts:
1967            return list_parts
1968        if not list_parts:
1969            return root_parts
1970
1971        max_overlap = min(len(root_parts), len(list_parts))
1972        overlap = 0
1973        for size in range(max_overlap, 0, -1):
1974            if root_parts[-size:] == list_parts[:size]:
1975                overlap = size
1976                break
1977        return root_parts + list_parts[overlap:]  # → 调用 _strip_config_source_prefix()
1978  # → 调用 <listcomp>()

# >>深度15 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-1-3-2 #170 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1958 in <listcomp>() ← :1958 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1958    def _merge_category_root_dedup(  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 .0=<list_iterator object at 0x000001CDEC959AB0>  # 返回值 (第1958行) ['晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男']
1959        category_root: Sequence[str],
1960        category_list: Sequence[str],
1961    ) -> List[str]:
1962        """
1963        合并分类前缀与相对路径分类，并去掉边界处重复的最长后缀/前缀。
1964        """
1965        root_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_root if str(p).strip()]
1966        list_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_list if str(p).strip()]
1967        if not root_parts:
1968            return list_parts
1969        if not list_parts:
1970            return root_parts
1971
1972        max_overlap = min(len(root_parts), len(list_parts))
1973        overlap = 0
1974        for size in range(max_overlap, 0, -1):
1975            if root_parts[-size:] == list_parts[:size]:
1976                overlap = size
1977                break  # → 调用 _strip_config_source_prefix()
1978        return root_parts + list_parts[overlap:]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()

# >>深度13 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-2 #171 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1662 in _parse_sync_report_hint_category_lists() ← :3425 ⏱️[4.8661s] ⚡ [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1662    @staticmethod  # 💡 muse_path='动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男', category='动作资源 / 坐骑 / 主角_坐骑 / 晴雪仙气坐骑 / 成男'
1663    def _parse_sync_report_hint_category_lists(
1664        *,
1665        muse_path: Any = None,
1666        category: Any = None,
1667    ) -> List[List[str]]:
1668        """从 sync_report 条目字段解析候选分类路径（用于对齐缓存里的 category_id_path）。"""
1669        out: List[List[str]] = []  # 💡 out=[] (list)
1670
1671        def _split_slash(s: str) -> List[str]:
1672            parts = [p.strip() for p in str(s).replace("\\", "/").split("/")]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1673            return [p for p in parts if p]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1674
1675        def _split_pipe_slash(s: str) -> List[str]:
1676            # sync_report 的 category 字段常见为 "a / b / c"
1677            parts = [p.strip() for p in str(s).replace("\\", "/").split("/")]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1678            merged: List[str] = []
1679            for p in parts:
1680                if not p:
1681                    continue
1682                sub = [x.strip() for x in p.split(" / ") if x.strip()]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1683                if len(sub) > 1:
1684                    merged.extend(sub)
1685                else:
1686                    merged.append(p.strip())
1687            return [p for p in merged if p]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1688
1689        mp = muse_path  # 💡 mp='动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男' (str)
1690        if isinstance(mp, str) and mp.strip():
1691            seg = _split_slash(mp)  # → 调用 _split_slash()  # 💡 seg=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男'] (list)
1692            if seg:
1693                out.append(seg)
1694
1695        cat = category  # 💡 cat='动作资源 / 坐骑 / 主角_坐骑 / 晴雪仙气坐骑 / 成男' (str)
1696        if isinstance(cat, str) and cat.strip():
1697            seg2 = _split_pipe_slash(cat)  # → 调用 _split_pipe_slash()
1698            if seg2:
1699                out.append(seg2)
1700
1701        # 去重（保序）
1702        seen: set[Tuple[str, ...]] = set()
1703        deduped: List[List[str]] = []
1704        for row in out:
1705            key = tuple(row)
1706            if key in seen:
1707                continue
1708            seen.add(key)
1709            deduped.append(row)
1710        return deduped
1711

# >>深度14 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-2-1 #172 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1671 in _split_slash() ← :1691 ⏱️[44.44ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1671        def _split_slash(s: str) -> List[str]:  # 💡 s='动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男'
1672            parts = [p.strip() for p in str(s).replace("\\", "/").split("/")]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 parts=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男'] (list)

# >>深度14 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-2-2 #175 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1675 in _split_pipe_slash() ← :1697 ⏱️[5.2907s] ⚡ [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[4.3666s]

1675        def _split_pipe_slash(s: str) -> List[str]:  # 💡 s='动作资源 / 坐骑 / 主角_坐骑 / 晴雪仙气坐骑 / 成男'
1676            # sync_report 的 category 字段常见为 "a / b / c"
1677            parts = [p.strip() for p in str(s).replace("\\", "/").split("/")]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 parts=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男'] (list)
1678            merged: List[str] = []
1679            for p in parts:
1680                if not p:
1681                    continue
1682                sub = [x.strip() for x in p.split(" / ") if x.strip()]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 sub=['成男'] (list)
1683                if len(sub) > 1:
1684                    merged.extend(sub)
1685                else:
1686                    merged.append(p.strip())
1687            return [p for p in merged if p]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1688

# >>深度15 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-2-2-6 #183 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1712 in find_muse_assets() ← :3429 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[251.85ms]

1712    def find_muse_assets(  # 💡 asset_name='主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男', category_list=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男']
1713        self,
1714        asset_name,
1715        category_list,
1716        *,
1717        hint_category_lists: Optional[Sequence[Sequence[str]]] = None,
1718    ):
1719        """仅使用预热后的批量缓存做精确分类匹配，禁止回退到 search_assets。"""
1720        category_path_str = ' / '.join(category_list)  # 💡 category_path_str='动作资源 / 坐骑 / 主角_坐骑 / 晴雪仙气坐骑 / 成男' (str)
1721        _local_cat_types = tuple(type(x).__name__ for x in category_list)  # → 调用 <genexpr>()  # 💡 _local_cat_types=None (NoneType)
1722        lprint(
1723            f'[分类比对] find_muse_assets 入参 asset_name={asset_name!r} '
1724            f'本地 category_list 元素类型={_local_cat_types} 值={category_list!r} path_str={category_path_str!r}'
1725        )
1726
1727        # 注意：_cached_assets_map 可能非常大；默认不要整表 dump 到日志里。
1728        if os.environ.get("P4_TO_MUSE_DEBUG_DUMP_ASSET_CACHE", "").strip() in ("1", "true", "TRUE", "yes", "YES"):
1729            lprint(self._cached_assets_map)
1730        cached_raw: Optional[object] = getattr(self, '_cached_assets_map', None)
1731        if not isinstance(cached_raw, dict):
1732            lprint(
1733                "[Muse资产判定][缓存未初始化]",
1734                ("asset_name", asset_name),
1735                ("category_path", category_path_str),
1736                ("cached_assets_map_type", type(cached_raw).__name__ if cached_raw is not None else "NoneType"),
1737                ("error", "find_muse_assets 只允许使用批量缓存，已禁止 search_assets 回退"),
1738                level="CRITICAL",
1739            )
1740            raise RuntimeError("Muse assets batch cache is not initialized")
1741
1742        cached_map: MuseAssetsCacheMap = cast(MuseAssetsCacheMap, cached_raw)
1743        if asset_name not in cached_map:
1744            lprint(
1745                "[缓存未命中-同名资产不存在]",
1746                ("asset_name", asset_name),
1747                ("category_path", category_path_str),
1748            )
1749            return []
1750
1751        asset_paths_dict: MuseCachedPathsDict = cached_map[asset_name]
1752
1753        def _try_match_with_category_list(cl: Sequence[str]) -> Optional[CachedMuseAssetRecord]:
1754            ps = ' / '.join([str(x) for x in cl if str(x).strip()])  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1755            if ps and ps in asset_paths_dict:
1756                hit = asset_paths_dict[ps]
1757                lprint(f'[缓存命中] {asset_name} ({ps})')
1758                self._debug_log('H_CACHE', 'cache exact path hit', {'asset_name': str(asset_name), 'path': str(ps)})
1759                return hit
1760
1761            # 缓存键多为 Muse 返回的 ID 路径串；本地 lookup 是中文 path_str，必须用分类树解析出的 ID 路径对齐
1762            category_refs_for_cache: List[CategoryRef] = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
1763                list(cl),
1764                recursive=False,
1765                full_chain=True,
1766                use_cache=True,
1767            )
1768            if not category_refs_for_cache:
1769                return None
1770            local_id_strs: List[str] = [str(ref.leaf_id) for ref in category_refs_for_cache]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1771            id_key_str: str = " / ".join(local_id_strs)
1772            if id_key_str in asset_paths_dict:
1773                hit2 = asset_paths_dict[id_key_str]
1774                lprint(
1775                    f'[缓存命中-ID键] {asset_name} 本地中文路径={ps!r} '
1776                    f'id_key={id_key_str!r}'
1777                )
1778                self._debug_log('H_CACHE', 'cache id key hit', {  # → 调用 _debug_log()
1779                    'asset_name': str(asset_name),
1780                    'path': str(ps),
1781                    'id_key': str(id_key_str),
1782                })
1783                return hit2
1784            for _cached_key, asset_data in asset_paths_dict.items():
1785                stored_ids: List[str] = list(asset_data.get('category_id_path') or [])
1786                if stored_ids and stored_ids == local_id_strs:
1787                    lprint(
1788                        f'[缓存命中-category_id_path] {asset_name} '
1789                        f'local_id_path={local_id_strs!r}'
1790                    )
1791                    return asset_data
1792                legacy_names: List[str] = list(asset_data.get('category_names') or [])
1793                if legacy_names and not stored_ids:
1794                    if [str(x) for x in legacy_names] == local_id_strs:
1795                        lprint(
1796                            f'[缓存命中-旧缓存名即ID] {asset_name} '
1797                            f'local_id_path={local_id_strs!r} cached_key={_cached_key!r}'
1798                        )
1799                        return asset_data
1800            return None
1801
1802        try:
1803            hit0 = _try_match_with_category_list(list(category_list))  # → 调用 _try_match_with_category_list()
1804            if hit0 is not None:
1805                return [hit0]
1806
1807            hints = list(hint_category_lists or [])
1808            for alt in hints:
1809                if not alt:
1810                    continue
1811                alt_ps = ' / '.join([str(x) for x in alt if str(x).strip()])
1812                if alt_ps == category_path_str:
1813                    continue
1814                hit_alt = _try_match_with_category_list(list(alt))
1815                if hit_alt is not None:
1816                    lprint(
1817                        "[Muse资产判定][缓存命中-使用sync_report提示路径]",
1818                        ("asset_name", asset_name),
1819                        ("primary_path", category_path_str),
1820                        ("hint_path", alt_ps),
1821                        level="WARNING",
1822                        force_print=True,
1823                        max_prints_per_line=50,
1824                    )
1825                    return [hit_alt]
1826        except Exception as e:
1827            traceback.print_exc()
1828            lprint(
1829                "[Muse资产判定][缓存分类对齐失败]",
1830                ("asset_name", asset_name),
1831                ("category_path", category_path_str),
1832                ("error", str(e)),
1833                level="CRITICAL",
1834            )
1835            raise
1836
1837        lprint(
1838            f'[缓存未命中] {asset_name} ({category_path_str}): '
1839            f'缓存中有 {len(asset_paths_dict)} 条同名记录，分类均不匹配'
1840        )
1841        lprint(
1842            f'  本地 category_list 元素类型={_local_cat_types} 值={category_list!r}',
1843            max_prints_per_line=6,
1844        )
1845        lprint(f'  查找路径: "{category_path_str}"')
1846        if hints:
1847            lprint(
1848                "[Muse资产判定][提示路径也未命中]",
1849                ("hint_paths", [' / '.join([str(x) for x in h if str(x).strip()]) for h in hints if h]),
1850                level="WARNING",
1851                force_print=True,
1852                max_prints_per_line=20,
1853            )
1854        lprint(f'  缓存路径: {list(asset_paths_dict.keys())}')
1855        return []
1856

# >>深度16 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-2-2-6-1 #184 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1721 in <genexpr>() ← :1721 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[96.42ms]

1738            lprint(self._cached_assets_map)

1743                ("asset_name", asset_name),
