1745                ("cached_assets_map_type", type(cached_raw).__name__ if cached_raw is not None else "NoneType"),
1746                ("error", "find_muse_assets 只允许使用批量缓存，已禁止 search_assets 回退"),
1747                level="CRITICAL",
1748            )
1749            raise RuntimeError("Muse assets batch cache is not initialized")
1750
1751        cached_map: MuseAssetsCacheMap = cast(MuseAssetsCacheMap, cached_raw)
1752        if asset_name not in cached_map:
1753            lprint(
1754                "[缓存未命中-同名资产不存在]",  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1755                ("asset_name", asset_name),
1756                ("category_path", category_path_str),
1757            )
1758            return []
1759
1760        asset_paths_dict: MuseCachedPathsDict = cached_map[asset_name]
1761
1762        def _try_match_with_category_list(cl: Sequence[str]) -> Optional[CachedMuseAssetRecord]:
1763            ps = ' / '.join([str(x) for x in cl if str(x).strip()])
1764            if ps and ps in asset_paths_dict:
1765                hit = asset_paths_dict[ps]
1766                lprint(f'[缓存命中] {asset_name} ({ps})')
1767                self._debug_log('H_CACHE', 'cache exact path hit', {'asset_name': str(asset_name), 'path': str(ps)})
1768                return hit
1769
1770            # 缓存键多为 Muse 返回的 ID 路径串；本地 lookup 是中文 path_str，必须用分类树解析出的 ID 路径对齐  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1771            category_refs_for_cache: List[CategoryRef] = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
1772                list(cl),
1773                recursive=False,
1774                full_chain=True,
1775                use_cache=True,
1776            )
1777            if not category_refs_for_cache:
1778                return None  # → 调用 _debug_log()
1779            local_id_strs: List[str] = [str(ref.leaf_id) for ref in category_refs_for_cache]
1780            id_key_str: str = " / ".join(local_id_strs)
1781            if id_key_str in asset_paths_dict:
1782                hit2 = asset_paths_dict[id_key_str]
1783                lprint(
1784                    f'[缓存命中-ID键] {asset_name} 本地中文路径={ps!r} '
1785                    f'id_key={id_key_str!r}'
1786                )
1787                self._debug_log('H_CACHE', 'cache id key hit', {
1788                    'asset_name': str(asset_name),
1789                    'path': str(ps),
1790                    'id_key': str(id_key_str),
1791                })
1792                return hit2
1793            for _cached_key, asset_data in asset_paths_dict.items():
1794                stored_ids: List[str] = list(asset_data.get('category_id_path') or [])
1795                if stored_ids and stored_ids == local_id_strs:
1796                    lprint(
1797                        f'[缓存命中-category_id_path] {asset_name} '
1798                        f'local_id_path={local_id_strs!r}'
1799                    )
1800                    return asset_data
1801                legacy_names: List[str] = list(asset_data.get('category_names') or [])
1802                if legacy_names and not stored_ids:
1803                    if [str(x) for x in legacy_names] == local_id_strs:  # → 调用 _try_match_with_category_list()
1804                        lprint(
1805                            f'[缓存命中-旧缓存名即ID] {asset_name} '
1806                            f'local_id_path={local_id_strs!r} cached_key={_cached_key!r}'
1807                        )
1808                        return asset_data
1809            return None
1810
1811        try:
1812            hit0 = _try_match_with_category_list(list(category_list))
1813            if hit0 is not None:
1814                return [hit0]
1815
1816            hints = list(hint_category_lists or [])
1817            for alt in hints:
1818                if not alt:
1819                    continue
1820                alt_ps = ' / '.join([str(x) for x in alt if str(x).strip()])
1821                if alt_ps == category_path_str:
1822                    continue
1823                hit_alt = _try_match_with_category_list(list(alt))
1824                if hit_alt is not None:
1825                    lprint(
1826                        "[Muse资产判定][缓存命中-使用sync_report提示路径]",
1827                        ("asset_name", asset_name),
1828                        ("primary_path", category_path_str),
1829                        ("hint_path", alt_ps),
1830                        level="WARNING",
1831                        force_print=True,
1832                        max_prints_per_line=50,
1833                    )
1834                    return [hit_alt]
1835        except Exception as e:
1836            traceback.print_exc()
1837            lprint(
1838                "[Muse资产判定][缓存分类对齐失败]",
1839                ("asset_name", asset_name),
1840                ("category_path", category_path_str),
1841                ("error", str(e)),
1842                level="CRITICAL",
1843            )
1844            raise
1845
1846        lprint(
1847            f'[缓存未命中] {asset_name} ({category_path_str}): '
1848            f'缓存中有 {len(asset_paths_dict)} 条同名记录，分类均不匹配'
1849        )
1850        lprint(
1851            f'  本地 category_list 元素类型={_local_cat_types} 值={category_list!r}',
1852            max_prints_per_line=6,
1853        )
1854        lprint(f'  查找路径: "{category_path_str}"')
1855        if hints:
1856            lprint(
1857                "[Muse资产判定][提示路径也未命中]",
1858                ("hint_paths", [' / '.join([str(x) for x in h if str(x).strip()]) for h in hints if h]),
1859                level="WARNING",
1860                force_print=True,
1861                max_prints_per_line=20,
1862            )
1863        lprint(f'  缓存路径: {list(asset_paths_dict.keys())}')
1864        return []
1865

# >>深度16 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-2-2-6-2 #185 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1721 in <genexpr>() ← :1721 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1721    def find_muse_assets(  # → 调用 <genexpr>()  # 💡 .0=<list_iterator object at 0x000001CDEC9589A0>, x='动作资源'  # 返回值 (第1721行) 'str'

1727    ):
1728        """仅使用预热后的批量缓存做精确分类匹配，禁止回退到 search_assets。"""

1731        lprint(
1732            f'[分类比对] find_muse_assets 入参 asset_name={asset_name!r} '

1738            lprint(self._cached_assets_map)
1739        cached_raw: Optional[object] = getattr(self, '_cached_assets_map', None)
1740        if not isinstance(cached_raw, dict):
1741            lprint(
1742                "[Muse资产判定][缓存未初始化]",
1743                ("asset_name", asset_name),
1744                ("category_path", category_path_str),
1745                ("cached_assets_map_type", type(cached_raw).__name__ if cached_raw is not None else "NoneType"),
1746                ("error", "find_muse_assets 只允许使用批量缓存，已禁止 search_assets 回退"),
1747                level="CRITICAL",
1748            )
1749            raise RuntimeError("Muse assets batch cache is not initialized")

1751        cached_map: MuseAssetsCacheMap = cast(MuseAssetsCacheMap, cached_raw)

1756                ("category_path", category_path_str),
1757            )
1758            return []
1759
1760        asset_paths_dict: MuseCachedPathsDict = cached_map[asset_name]
1761
1762        def _try_match_with_category_list(cl: Sequence[str]) -> Optional[CachedMuseAssetRecord]:

1786                )

1790                    'id_key': str(id_key_str),
1791                })
1792                return hit2

1796                    lprint(

1799                    )
1800                    return asset_data

1743                ("asset_name", asset_name),

1745                ("cached_assets_map_type", type(cached_raw).__name__ if cached_raw is not None else "NoneType"),
1746                ("error", "find_muse_assets 只允许使用批量缓存，已禁止 search_assets 回退"),
1747                level="CRITICAL",
1748            )
1749            raise RuntimeError("Muse assets batch cache is not initialized")
1750
1751        cached_map: MuseAssetsCacheMap = cast(MuseAssetsCacheMap, cached_raw)
1752        if asset_name not in cached_map:
1753            lprint(
1754                "[缓存未命中-同名资产不存在]",  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1755                ("asset_name", asset_name),
1756                ("category_path", category_path_str),
1757            )
1758            return []
1759
1760        asset_paths_dict: MuseCachedPathsDict = cached_map[asset_name]
1761
1762        def _try_match_with_category_list(cl: Sequence[str]) -> Optional[CachedMuseAssetRecord]:
1763            ps = ' / '.join([str(x) for x in cl if str(x).strip()])
1764            if ps and ps in asset_paths_dict:
1765                hit = asset_paths_dict[ps]
1766                lprint(f'[缓存命中] {asset_name} ({ps})')
1767                self._debug_log('H_CACHE', 'cache exact path hit', {'asset_name': str(asset_name), 'path': str(ps)})
1768                return hit
1769
1770            # 缓存键多为 Muse 返回的 ID 路径串；本地 lookup 是中文 path_str，必须用分类树解析出的 ID 路径对齐  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1771            category_refs_for_cache: List[CategoryRef] = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
1772                list(cl),
1773                recursive=False,
1774                full_chain=True,
1775                use_cache=True,
1776            )
1777            if not category_refs_for_cache:
1778                return None  # → 调用 _debug_log()
1779            local_id_strs: List[str] = [str(ref.leaf_id) for ref in category_refs_for_cache]
1780            id_key_str: str = " / ".join(local_id_strs)
1781            if id_key_str in asset_paths_dict:
1782                hit2 = asset_paths_dict[id_key_str]
1783                lprint(
1784                    f'[缓存命中-ID键] {asset_name} 本地中文路径={ps!r} '
1785                    f'id_key={id_key_str!r}'
1786                )
1787                self._debug_log('H_CACHE', 'cache id key hit', {
1788                    'asset_name': str(asset_name),
1789                    'path': str(ps),
1790                    'id_key': str(id_key_str),
1791                })
1792                return hit2
1793            for _cached_key, asset_data in asset_paths_dict.items():
1794                stored_ids: List[str] = list(asset_data.get('category_id_path') or [])
1795                if stored_ids and stored_ids == local_id_strs:
1796                    lprint(
1797                        f'[缓存命中-category_id_path] {asset_name} '
1798                        f'local_id_path={local_id_strs!r}'
1799                    )
1800                    return asset_data
1801                legacy_names: List[str] = list(asset_data.get('category_names') or [])
1802                if legacy_names and not stored_ids:
1803                    if [str(x) for x in legacy_names] == local_id_strs:  # → 调用 _try_match_with_category_list()
1804                        lprint(
1805                            f'[缓存命中-旧缓存名即ID] {asset_name} '
1806                            f'local_id_path={local_id_strs!r} cached_key={_cached_key!r}'
1807                        )
1808                        return asset_data
1809            return None
1810
1811        try:
1812            hit0 = _try_match_with_category_list(list(category_list))
1813            if hit0 is not None:
1814                return [hit0]
1815
1816            hints = list(hint_category_lists or [])
1817            for alt in hints:
1818                if not alt:
1819                    continue
1820                alt_ps = ' / '.join([str(x) for x in alt if str(x).strip()])
1821                if alt_ps == category_path_str:
1822                    continue
1823                hit_alt = _try_match_with_category_list(list(alt))
1824                if hit_alt is not None:
1825                    lprint(
1826                        "[Muse资产判定][缓存命中-使用sync_report提示路径]",
1827                        ("asset_name", asset_name),
1828                        ("primary_path", category_path_str),
1829                        ("hint_path", alt_ps),
1830                        level="WARNING",
1831                        force_print=True,
1832                        max_prints_per_line=50,
1833                    )
1834                    return [hit_alt]
1835        except Exception as e:
1836            traceback.print_exc()
1837            lprint(
1838                "[Muse资产判定][缓存分类对齐失败]",
1839                ("asset_name", asset_name),
1840                ("category_path", category_path_str),
1841                ("error", str(e)),
1842                level="CRITICAL",
1843            )
1844            raise
1845
1846        lprint(
1847            f'[缓存未命中] {asset_name} ({category_path_str}): '
1848            f'缓存中有 {len(asset_paths_dict)} 条同名记录，分类均不匹配'
1849        )
1850        lprint(
1851            f'  本地 category_list 元素类型={_local_cat_types} 值={category_list!r}',
1852            max_prints_per_line=6,
1853        )
1854        lprint(f'  查找路径: "{category_path_str}"')
1855        if hints:
1856            lprint(
1857                "[Muse资产判定][提示路径也未命中]",
1858                ("hint_paths", [' / '.join([str(x) for x in h if str(x).strip()]) for h in hints if h]),
1859                level="WARNING",
1860                force_print=True,
1861                max_prints_per_line=20,
1862            )
1863        lprint(f'  缓存路径: {list(asset_paths_dict.keys())}')
1864        return []
1865

1028    @beartype  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254966698560_11955:变量·self·self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.muse_helper.services.c…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.muse_helper.services.category_service.CategoryService object at 0x000001CDED06F1D0>, category_path=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男'], recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True, self.cache_dir='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', self.enable_file_cache=True, self.enable_memory_cache=True, self.muse_client=<muse_python_api.main.MuseClient object at 0x000001CDECA45810>, self.organization_id='h42', self.asset_type='simpleaction', self.max_concurrent=10, self.timeout=60.0
self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.muse_helper.services.category_service.CategoryService object at 0x000001CDED06F1D0>, category_path=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男'], recursive=False, full_chain=True, use_cache=True, self.cache_dir='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', self.enable_file_cache=True, self.enable_memory_cache=True, self.muse_client=<muse_python_api.main.MuseClient object at 0x000001CDECA45810>, self.organization_id='h42', self.asset_type='simpleaction', self.max_concurrent=10, self.timeout=60.0
1029    def get_category_refs_by_path(
1030        self,
1031        category_path: List[str],
1032        recursive: bool = False,
1033        full_chain: bool = False,
1034        use_cache: bool = True,
1035    ) -> List[CategoryRef]:
1036        """
1037        根据分类路径获取分类引用（CategoryRef）
1038
1039        Args:
1040            category_path: 分类路径列表
1041            recursive: 是否递归获取子分类
1042            full_chain: 仅当 recursive=False 时有效。为 True 时返回从根到叶的 **完整 ID 链**
1043                （Muse publish/receive 的 categories 字段需要此格式）；为 False 时仅返回
1044                **叶子节点 ID**（与旧行为一致，用于列表/搜索等）。
1045            use_cache: 是否使用缓存（内存缓存 + 文件缓存）
1046
1047        Returns:
1048            分类引用列表（CategoryRef）
1049        """
1050        try:
1051            category_list = self._get_category_list(use_cache=use_cache)  # → 调用 _get_category_list()  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254987974080_11980:变量·category_list·list·1641806字符·category_list=list (category_list), 1641806 字符 [BI…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 category_list=list (category_list), 1641806 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000010 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=1641806 sha256=f1c734a1dca4]
category_list=list (category_list), 1641806 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000010 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=1641806 sha256=f1c734a1dca4]
1052            if category_list is None:
1053                return []
1054
1055            result: List[CategoryRef] = []  # 💡 result=[] (list)
1056            if full_chain:
1057                if not self._find_category_ref_chain(category_list, category_path, 0, result):  # → 调用 _find_category_ref_chain()
1058                    result.clear()
1059            else:
1060                self._find_category_refs(category_list, category_path, 0, result, recursive)
1061
1062            return result  # [[EXPAND:ret_expand_d289f89376eb_11993:返回值·[CategoryRef(id_chain=[482174690918401›, id=482174…·共777字符·点击展开]]
返回值 (第1062行) [CategoryRef(id_chain=[482174690918401], id=482174690918401, display_name='动作资源'... len=5]
[CategoryRef(id_chain=[482174690918401], id=482174690918401, display_name='动作资源', path_segments=('动作资源',)), CategoryRef(id_chain=[482174690918401, 482174795513857], id=482174795513857, display_name='坐骑', path_segments=('动作资源', '坐骑')), CategoryRef(id_chain=[482174690918401, 482174795513857, 482179145269249], id=482179145269249, display_name='主角_坐骑', path_segments=('动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑')), CategoryRef(id_chain=[482174690918401, 482174795513857, 482179145269249, 483380743766017], id=483380743766017, display_name='晴雪仙气坐骑', path_segments=('动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑')), CategoryRef(id_chain=[482174690918401, 482174795513857, 482179145269249, 483380743766017, 483381599404033], id=483381599404033, display_name='成男', path_segments=('动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男'))]
1063
1064        except Exception as e:
1065            traceback.print_exc()
1066            lprint("[分类引用]", ("结果", "获取失败"), ("错误", e), level='ERROR')
1067            return []

# >>深度17 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-2-6-1-1-1 #193 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/muse_helper/services/category_service.py:1419 in _get_category_list() ← :1051 ⏱️[237.01ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1419    def _get_category_list(self, use_cache: bool = True) -> Optional[List[MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel]]:  # 💡 use_cache=True
1420        """
1421        获取当前组织的分类列表，校验树结构，失败返回 None。
1422
1423        约束：
1424        - 统一走 get_category_tree_cache，避免落入 get_category_tree 的无缓存路径；
1425        - use_cache 仅控制“是否允许命中内存缓存”，不改变接口入口。
1426        """
1427        cache_result = self.get_category_tree_cache(
1428            use_cache=use_cache,
1429            use_file_cache=bool(self.enable_file_cache),
1430            save_to_file=self.enable_file_cache,
1431        )
1432        tree = cache_result.tree
1433        if not tree or not tree.categories:
1434            lprint("[分类树]", ("结果", "为空"), ("原因", "API 返回空数据"), level='WARNING')
1435            return None
1436        return cast(List[MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel], list(tree.categories))  # [[EXPAND:ret_expand_6055cd76168a_12024:返回值·(第1436行) [MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel(id=22220065564…·共271字符·点击展开]]

updated_by='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', asset_count=45), MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel(id=483381446049793, name='成女
1070        self,
1071        tree: List[MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel],
1072        path: List[str],
1073        depth: int,
1074        result: List[CategoryRef],
1075    ) -> bool:
1076        """从根到叶依次匹配 path，将路径上每一级 CategoryRef 追加到 result。"""
1077        if depth >= len(path):
1078            return False
1079        target_name = path[depth]
1080        for category in tree:
1081            category_name = category.name or ""
1082            category_id = category.id  # 💡 category_id=482179145269249 (int)  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254988602352_12053:变量·category·MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel·157577字符·category=MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel (category), 157…·点击展开]]

1084            if category_name != target_name:
1085                continue
1086            if category_id is not None:
1087                # full_chain=True：尽量在每一级都携带完整 id_chain（从根到当前）
1088                cid = int(str(category_id).strip())  # 💡 cid=482179145269249 (int)
1089                prefix_chain = result[-1].id_chain if result else []  # 💡 prefix_chain=[482174690918401, 482174795513857] (list)
1090                prefix_segments = result[-1].path_segments if result else ()  # 💡 prefix_segments=('动作资源', '坐骑') (tuple)
1091                result.append(
1092                    CategoryRef(
1093                        id_chain=[*prefix_chain, cid],
1094                        display_name=category_name,
1095                        path_segments=(*prefix_segments, category_name),
1096                    )
1097                )
1098            if depth == len(path) - 1:
1099                return True
1100            if children and self._find_category_ref_chain(children, path, depth + 1, result):  # → 调用 _find_category_ref_chain()
1101                return True  # 返回值 (第1101行) True
1102            if result:
1103                result.pop()
1104        return False
1105

name='萝莉', value=483381628764161, depth=4, destroy=False, name_multil={'zh_CN': '萝莉'}, parent_id=483380754448385, asset_type='simpleaction', weight=0, children=[], created_at='2026-04-22 02:12:02', name='大熊整理', value=483381710422017, depth=4, destroy=False, name_multil={'zh_CN': '大熊整理'}, parent_id=483380754448385, asset_type='simpleaction', weight=0, children=[], created_at='2026-04-22 02:12:41', created_by='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', updated_at='2026-04-22 02:12:41', updated_by='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', asset_count=14)], created_at='2026-04-22 02:05:05', created_by='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', updated_at='2026-04-22 02:15:07', updated_by='wb.fengqingqing@m
1070        self,
1071        tree: List[MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel],
1072        path: List[str],
1073        depth: int,
1074        result: List[CategoryRef],
1075    ) -> bool:
1076        """从根到叶依次匹配 path，将路径上每一级 CategoryRef 追加到 result。"""
1077        if depth >= len(path):
1078            return False
1079        target_name = path[depth]
1080        for category in tree:
1081            category_name = category.name or ""  # 💡 category_name='坐骑' (str)
1082            category_id = category.id  # 💡 category_id=482174795513857 (int)
1083            children = category.children or []
1084            if category_name != target_name:
1085                continue
1086            if category_id is not None:
1087                # full_chain=True：尽量在每一级都携带完整 id_chain（从根到当前）
1088                cid = int(str(category_id).strip())
1089                prefix_chain = result[-1].id_chain if result else []  # 💡 prefix_chain=[482174690918401] (list)
1090                prefix_segments = result[-1].path_segments if result else ()  # 💡 prefix_segments=('动作资源',) (tuple)
1091                result.append(
1092                    CategoryRef(
1093                        id_chain=[*prefix_chain, cid],
1094                        display_name=category_name,
1095                        path_segments=(*prefix_segments, category_name),
1096                    )
1097                )
1098            if depth == len(path) - 1:
1099                return True
1100            if children and self._find_category_ref_chain(children, path, depth + 1, result):  # → 调用 _find_category_ref_chain()
1101                return True  # 返回值 (第1101行) True
1102            if result:
1103                result.pop()
1104        return False
1105

# >>深度19 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-2-6-1-1-1-2-1 #196 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/muse_helper/services/category_service.py:1069 in _find_category_ref_chain() ← :1100 ⏱️[1.3395s] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[215.58ms]

MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel(id=483380754448386, name='鸱吻鱼双人坐骑（浩漾天潮）', value=483380754448386, depth=3, destroy=False, name_multil={'zh_CN': '鸱吻鱼双人坐骑（浩漾天潮）'}, parent_id=4
1070        self,
1071        tree: List[MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel],
1072        path: List[str],
1073        depth: int,
1074        result: List[CategoryRef],
1075    ) -> bool:
1076        """从根到叶依次匹配 path，将路径上每一级 CategoryRef 追加到 result。"""
1077        if depth >= len(path):
1078            return False
1079        target_name = path[depth]
1080        for category in tree:
1081            category_name = category.name or ""
1082            category_id = category.id  # 💡 category_id=482179145269249 (int)  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254988602352_12161:变量·category·MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel·157577字符·category=MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel (category), 157…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 category=MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel (category), 157577 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000014 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=157577 sha256=c15fd592fe0c]
category=MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel (category), 157577 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000014 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=157577 sha256=c15fd592fe0c]
1083            children = category.children or []  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254989043376_12164:变量·children·list·157174字符·children=list (children), 157174 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 children=list (children), 157174 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000015 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=157174 sha256=a28b2f661d12]
children=list (children), 157174 字符 [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000015 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=157174 sha256=a28b2f661d12]
1084            if category_name != target_name:
1085                continue
1086            if category_id is not None:
1087                # full_chain=True：尽量在每一级都携带完整 id_chain（从根到当前）
1088                cid = int(str(category_id).strip())  # 💡 cid=482179145269249 (int)
1089                prefix_chain = result[-1].id_chain if result else []  # 💡 prefix_chain=[482174690918401, 482174795513857] (list)
1090                prefix_segments = result[-1].path_segments if result else ()  # 💡 prefix_segments=('动作资源', '坐骑') (tuple)
1091                result.append(
1092                    CategoryRef(
1093                        id_chain=[*prefix_chain, cid],
1094                        display_name=category_name,
1095                        path_segments=(*prefix_segments, category_name),
1096                    )
1097                )
1098            if depth == len(path) - 1:
1099                return True
1100            if children and self._find_category_ref_chain(children, path, depth + 1, result):  # → 调用 _find_category_ref_chain()
1101                return True  # 返回值 (第1101行) True
1102            if result:
1103                result.pop()
1104        return False
1105

MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel(id=483380754448386, name='鸱吻鱼双人坐骑（浩漾天潮）', value=483380754448386, depth=3, destroy=False, name_multil={'zh_CN': '鸱吻鱼双人坐骑（浩漾天潮）'}, parent_id=482179145269249, asset_type='simpleaction', weight=0, children=[MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel(id=483381546844161, name='成男', value=483381546844161, depth=4, destroy=False, name_multil={'zh_CN': '成男'}, parent_id=4833807
1070        self,
1071        tree: List[MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel],
1072        path: List[str],
1073        depth: int,
1074        result: List[CategoryRef],
1075    ) -> bool:
1076        """从根到叶依次匹配 path，将路径上每一级 CategoryRef 追加到 result。"""
1077        if depth >= len(path):
1078            return False
1079        target_name = path[depth]
1080        for category in tree:
1081            category_name = category.name or ""  # 💡 category_name='风迎香' (str)
1082            category_id = category.id  # 💡 category_id=483380737343489 (int)
1083            children = category.children or []  # 💡 children=[] (list)
1084            if category_name != target_name:
1085                continue
1086            if category_id is not None:
1087                # full_chain=True：尽量在每一级都携带完整 id_chain（从根到当前）
1088                cid = int(str(category_id).strip())
1089                prefix_chain = result[-1].id_chain if result else []
1090                prefix_segments = result[-1].path_segments if result else ()
1091                result.append(
1092                    CategoryRef(
1093                        id_chain=[*prefix_chain, cid],
1094                        display_name=category_name,
1095                        path_segments=(*prefix_segments, category_name),
1096                    )
1097                )
1098            if depth == len(path) - 1:
1099                return True
1100            if children and self._find_category_ref_chain(children, path, depth + 1, result):  # → 调用 _find_category_ref_chain()
1101                return True  # 返回值 (第1101行) True
1102            if result:
1103                result.pop()
1104        return False
1105

display_name='坐骑', path_segments=('动作资源', '坐骑')), CategoryRef(id_chain=[482174690918401, 482174795513857, 482179145269249], id=482179145269249, display_name='主角_坐骑', path_segments=('动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑')), CategoryRef(id_chain=[482174690918401, 482174795513857, 482179145269249, 483380743766017], id=483380743766017, display_name='晴雪仙气坐骑', path_segments=('动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑'))]
1070        self,
1071        tree: List[MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel],
1072        path: List[str],
1073        depth: int,
1074        result: List[CategoryRef],
1075    ) -> bool:
1076        """从根到叶依次匹配 path，将路径上每一级 CategoryRef 追加到 result。"""
1077        if depth >= len(path):
1078            return False
1079        target_name = path[depth]
1080        for category in tree:
1081            category_name = category.name or ""
1082            category_id = category.id  # 💡 category_id=483381379399681 (int)  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254988885040_12270:变量·category·MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel·397字符·MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel(id=483381379399681, name…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 category=MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel (category), 397 字符
MuseCategoryTreeNodeModel(id=483381379399681, name='正太', value=483381379399681, depth=4, destroy=False, name_multil={'zh_CN': '正太'}, parent_id=483380743766017, asset_type='simpleaction', weight=0, children=[], created_at='2026-04-22 02:10:03', created_by='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', updated_at='2026-04-22 02:10:03', updated_by='wb.fengqingqing@mesg.corp.netease.com', asset_count=33)
1083            children = category.children or []  # 💡 children=[] (list)
1084            if category_name != target_name:
1085                continue
1086            if category_id is not None:
1087                # full_chain=True：尽量在每一级都携带完整 id_chain（从根到当前）
1088                cid = int(str(category_id).strip())
1089                prefix_chain = result[-1].id_chain if result else []
1090                prefix_segments = result[-1].path_segments if result else ()
1091                result.append(
1092                    CategoryRef(
1093                        id_chain=[*prefix_chain, cid],
1094                        display_name=category_name,
1095                        path_segments=(*prefix_segments, category_name),
1096                    )
1097                )
1098            if depth == len(path) - 1:
1099                return True  # 返回值 (第1099行) True
1100            if children and self._find_category_ref_chain(children, path, depth + 1, result):  # → 调用 _find_category_ref_chain()
1101                return True
1102            if result:
1103                result.pop()
1104        return False
1105

# >>深度15 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-1-1-2-1-2-6-2 #199 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1770 in <listcomp>() ← :1770 ⏱️[96.42ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:41720] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1770        def _try_match_with_category_list(cl: Sequence[str]) -> Optional[CachedMuseAssetRecord]:  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 .0=<list_iterator object at 0x000001CDEC95A770>  # 返回值 (第1770行) ['482174690918401', '482174795513857', '482179145269249', '483380743766017', '483381599404033']
1771            ps = ' / '.join([str(x) for x in cl if str(x).strip()])
1772            if ps and ps in asset_paths_dict:
1773                hit = asset_paths_dict[ps]
1774                lprint(f'[缓存命中] {asset_name} ({ps})')
1775                self._debug_log('H_CACHE', 'cache exact path hit', {'asset_name': str(asset_name), 'path': str(ps)})
1776                return hit
1777
1778            # 缓存键多为 Muse 返回的 ID 路径串；本地 lookup 是中文 path_str，必须用分类树解析出的 ID 路径对齐  # → 调用 _debug_log()
1779            category_refs_for_cache: List[CategoryRef] = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_refs_by_path(
1780                list(cl),
1781                recursive=False,
1782                full_chain=True,
1783                use_cache=True,
1784            )
1785            if not category_refs_for_cache:
1786                return None
1787            local_id_strs: List[str] = [str(ref.leaf_id) for ref in category_refs_for_cache]
1788            id_key_str: str = " / ".join(local_id_strs)
1789            if id_key_str in asset_paths_dict:
1790                hit2 = asset_paths_dict[id_key_str]
1791                lprint(
1792                    f'[缓存命中-ID键] {asset_name} 本地中文路径={ps!r} '
1793                    f'id_key={id_key_str!r}'
1794                )
1795                self._debug_log('H_CACHE', 'cache id key hit', {
1796                    'asset_name': str(asset_name),
1797                    'path': str(ps),
1798                    'id_key': str(id_key_str),
1799                })
1800                return hit2
1801            for _cached_key, asset_data in asset_paths_dict.items():
1802                stored_ids: List[str] = list(asset_data.get('category_id_path') or [])
1803                if stored_ids and stored_ids == local_id_strs:  # → 调用 _try_match_with_category_list()
1804                    lprint(
1805                        f'[缓存命中-category_id_path] {asset_name} '
1806                        f'local_id_path={local_id_strs!r}'
1807                    )
1808                    return asset_data
1809                legacy_names: List[str] = list(asset_data.get('category_names') or [])
1810                if legacy_names and not stored_ids:
1811                    if [str(x) for x in legacy_names] == local_id_strs:
1812                        lprint(
1813                            f'[缓存命中-旧缓存名即ID] {asset_name} '
1814                            f'local_id_path={local_id_strs!r} cached_key={_cached_key!r}'
1815                        )
1816                        return asset_data
1817            return None
1818

self=<anim_upload_muse_tool.muse_helper.services.category_service.CategoryService object at 0x000001CDED06F1D0>, items=[{'depot_fp': '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'local_fp': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'prev_action': 'rebuilt', 'mapping_preset': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑 | 动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑', 'muse_path': '动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男', 'category': '动作资源 / 坐骑 / 主角_坐骑 / 晴雪仙气坐骑 / 成男'}], process_func=<function P4ToMuse._run_verify_sync_report_against_muse.<locals>._verify_one at 0x000001CDECB2A020>, on_progress=<function P4ToMuse._run_verify_sync_report_against_muse.<locals>._on_vprog at 0x000001CDC54A8220>, max_workers=10, timeout=None, self.cache_dir='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache', self.enable_file_cache=True, self.enable_memory_cache=True, self.muse_client=<muse_python_api.main.MuseClient object at 0x000001CDECA45810>, self.organization_id='h42', self.asset_type='simpleaction', self.max_concurrent=10, self.timeout=60.0, concurrent_limit=10
886        self,
887        items: List[Any],
888        process_func: Callable[[Any], Any],
889        on_progress: Optional[Callable[[int, int, Any], None]],
890        max_workers: Optional[int] = None,
891        timeout: Optional[float] = None,
892    ) -> List[Any]:
893        """异步执行所有任务"""
894        # 使用传入的 max_workers，如果为 None 则使用实例默认值
895        concurrent_limit = max_workers if max_workers is not None else self.max_concurrent
896        effective_timeout = timeout if timeout is not None else self.timeout
897        semaphore = asyncio.Semaphore(concurrent_limit)
898        completed_count = 0
899        total_count = len(items)
900        
901        async def _one(item: Any) -> Any:
902            """单个任务的异步包装器"""
903            nonlocal completed_count
904            
905            if self._cancelled:
906                return self._build_batch_error_result(
907                    item,
908                    status="cancelled",
909                    error_message="用户取消",
910                )
911            
912            async with semaphore:
913                try:
914                    result = await asyncio.wait_for(
915                        asyncio.get_event_loop().run_in_executor(
916                            None, process_func, item
917                        ),
918                        timeout=effective_timeout
919                    )
920                except asyncio.TimeoutError:
921                    self._handle_service_exception(
922                        Exception("asyncio.TimeoutError"),
923                        context=f"run_batch_async.timeout timeout_s={effective_timeout}",
924                    )
925                    result = self._build_batch_error_result(
926                        item,
927                        status="timeout",
928                        error_message=f'超时（{effective_timeout}秒）',
929                    )
930                except Exception as e:
931                    self._handle_service_exception(
932                        e,
933                        context="run_batch_async.process_func",
934                    )
935                    result = self._build_batch_error_result(
936                        item,
937                        status="failed",
938                        error_message=str(e),
939                    )
940            
941            completed_count += 1
942            
943            if on_progress:
944                try:
945                    on_progress(completed_count, total_count, result)  # → 调用 _on_vprog()
946                except Exception:
947                    self._handle_service_exception(
948                        Exception("on_progress callback failed"),
949                        context="run_batch_async.on_progress",
950                    )
951                    pass
952            
953            return result
954        
955        async_tasks = [_one(item) for item in items]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
956        results = await asyncio.gather(*async_tasks, return_exceptions=False)  # 💡 async_tasks=[<coroutine object BaseService._run_all_async.<locals>._one at 0x000001CDEDE7A340>] (list)  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254989155984_12583:变量·results·list·443字符·[{'ok': True, 'depot_fp': '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式…·点击展开]]

entry={'action': 'created', 'file_path': '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'local_file': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'reason': 'muse_verified_exists', 'asset_id': '69e879c1ac658e1b48b0fd99', 'prev_report_action': 'rebuilt', 'source': 'muse_verify', 'ts': 1777448915.4307096}

2350            return

2355            self._sync_report.append(dict(entry))

entry={'action': 'created', 'file_path': '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'local_file': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', 'reason': 'muse_verified_exists', 'asset_id': '69e879c1ac658e1b48b0fd99', 'prev_report_action': 'rebuilt', 'source': 'muse_verify', 'ts': 1777448915.4307096}
2239        """强制保证 entry 含 muse_path；缺失视为致命错误并退出。"""
2240        muse_path = ""  # 💡 muse_path='' (str)

2242        if isinstance(existing_muse_path, str):
2243            normalized_existing_muse_path = existing_muse_path.strip().replace("\\", "/")
2244            if (
2245                normalized_existing_muse_path
2246                and "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/" not in normalized_existing_muse_path
2247                and not normalized_existing_muse_path.startswith("//hangzhou/")
2248            ):
2249                muse_path = normalized_existing_muse_path
2250        fp = entry.get("file_path")  # 💡 fp='//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max' (str)
2251        probe = entry.get("local_file") or fp  # 💡 probe='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max' (str)
2252        if not muse_path:
2253            category_value = entry.get("category")  # 💡 category_value=None (NoneType)
2254            if isinstance(category_value, str) and category_value.strip():
2255                category_sep = " / " if " / " in category_value else "/"
2256                category_parts = [seg.strip() for seg in category_value.split(category_sep) if seg.strip()]
2257                category_muse_path = "/".join(category_parts)
2258                if (
2259                    category_muse_path
2260                    and "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/" not in category_muse_path
2261                    and not category_muse_path.startswith("//hangzhou/")
2262                ):
2263                    muse_path = category_muse_path
2264        if not muse_path and not probe:
2265            lprint(
2266                "[sync_report][致命错误]",
2267                ("原因", "缺少 file_path/local_file，无法推导 muse_path"),
2268                ("ctx", ctx),
2269                ("entry", entry),
2270                level="CRITICAL",
2271                force_print=True,
2272                max_prints_per_line=999,
2273            )
2274            raise SystemExit(2)
2275        if not muse_path:
2276            try:
2277                _asset_name, _cat_list = self.get_name_category(str(probe))  # → 调用 get_name_category()
2278            except Exception as exc:
2279                traceback.print_exc()
2280                lprint(
2281                    "[sync_report][致命错误]",
2282                    ("原因", "get_name_category 推导失败，无法生成 muse_path"),
2283                    ("ctx", ctx),
2284                    ("probe", str(probe)),
2285                    ("error", str(exc)),
2286                    ("entry", entry),
2287                    level="CRITICAL",
2288                    force_print=True,
2289                    max_prints_per_line=999,
2290                )
2291                raise SystemExit(2)
2292            if not _cat_list:
2293                lprint(
2294                    "[sync_report][致命错误]",
2295                    ("原因", "分类推导为空，无法生成 muse_path"),
2296                    ("ctx", ctx),
2297                    ("probe", str(probe)),
2298                    ("entry", entry),
2299                    level="CRITICAL",
2300                    force_print=True,
2301                    max_prints_per_line=999,
2302                )
2303                raise SystemExit(2)
2304            # get_name_category 目前返回的是“目录名段列表”（List[str]），这时直接 join 就是最终 muse_path。
2305            try:
2306                if isinstance(_cat_list, list) and _cat_list and isinstance(_cat_list[0], str):
2307                    muse_path = "/".join([str(x).strip() for x in _cat_list if str(x).strip()])  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 muse_path=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男'] (list)
2308                else:
2309                    # 兼容：若未来返回 CategoryRef 列表/链，则取叶子 ref 反查目录名
2310                    leaf = _cat_list[-1]
2311                    names = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_path_by_CategoryRef(
2312                        leaf, use_cache=True, refresh=False
2313                    )
2314                    muse_path = "/".join([str(x) for x in (names or []) if str(x).strip()])
2315            except Exception as exc:
2316                traceback.print_exc()
2317                lprint(
2318                    "[sync_report][致命错误]",
2319                    ("原因", "生成 muse_path 失败"),
2320                    ("ctx", ctx),
2321                    ("probe", str(probe)),
2322                    ("error", str(exc)),
2323                    ("entry", entry),
2324                    level="CRITICAL",
2325                    force_print=True,
2326                    max_prints_per_line=999,
2327                )
2328                raise SystemExit(2)
2329        if not muse_path:
2330            lprint(
2331                "[sync_report][致命错误]",
2332                ("原因", "muse_path 为空，无法写入 sync_report"),
2333                ("ctx", ctx),
2334                ("probe", str(probe)),
2335                ("entry", entry),
2336                level="CRITICAL",
2337                force_print=True,
2338                max_prints_per_line=999,
2339            )
2340            raise SystemExit(2)
2341        entry["muse_path"] = muse_path
2342        entry.pop("mapping_source", None)
2343        if probe and not str(entry.get("mapping_preset") or "").strip():
2344            mapping_preset = self._resolve_mapping_preset_for_path(str(probe), muse_path)  # → 调用 _resolve_mapping_preset_for_path()  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254988473520_12729:变量·muse_path·muse_path='动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男' (str), mapping…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 muse_path='动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男' (str), mapping_preset='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑 | 动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑' (str)

2346                entry["mapping_preset"] = mapping_preset  # 返回值 (第2346行) None

# >>深度11 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1 #211 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1972 in get_name_category() ← :2277 ⏱️[431.43ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1972    def get_name_category(self, file_path):  # 💡 file_path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max'
1973        # 统一使用 init_muse 中加载的配置参数，不再根据文件路径重新加载配置
1974        # 这样可以确保所有文件都使用 bat 传入的 UPLOAD_PATH 对应的统一规则
1975
1976        file_path_no_ext = os.path.splitext(file_path)[0].replace('\\', '/')  # 💡 file_path_no_ext='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男' (str)
1977        relative_path = self._strip_config_source_prefix(file_path_no_ext)  # → 调用 _strip_config_source_prefix()  # 💡 relative_path='晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男' (str)
1978        file_path_items = [part for part in relative_path.split('/') if part]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 file_path_items=['晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男', '主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男'] (list)
1979        if not file_path_items:
1980            file_path_items = [os.path.basename(file_path_no_ext)]
1981        asset_name = file_path_items[-1]
1982        if len(file_path_items) > self.asset_name_index:
1983            asset_name = file_path_items[self.asset_name_index]
1984        elif len(file_path_items) < self.asset_name_max:
1985            if self.default_asset_name:
1986                asset_name = self.default_asset_name
1987            else:
1988                asset_name = file_path_items[self.category_end-1]
1989
1990        # category_end 为 -1 时，自动推导为 asset_name_index（分类取资产名之前的所有层级）
1991        effective_category_end = self.category_end
1992        if effective_category_end == -1 and self.asset_name_index != 0:
1993            effective_category_end = self.asset_name_index
1994
1995        category_list = file_path_items[self.category_start:effective_category_end]
1996
1997        # 优先使用 muse_category_path 参数，如果没有则使用 YAML 配置的 category_root
1998        if self.muse_category_path:
1999            category_root = [p.strip() for p in self.muse_category_path.split('/')]
2000            category_list = self._merge_category_root_dedup(category_root, category_list)
2001        elif self.category_root:
2002            category_list = self._merge_category_root_dedup(self.category_root, category_list)  # → 调用 _merge_category_root_dedup()  # 💡 category_list=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男'] (list)
2003
2004        return asset_name, category_list
2005

# >>深度12 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1-1 #212 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1877 in _strip_config_source_prefix() ← :1977 ⏱️[102.16ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1877    def _strip_config_source_prefix(self, full_path_no_ext: str) -> str:  # 💡 full_path_no_ext='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男'
1878        """将本地/远端源路径前缀收口，返回相对业务路径（不含扩展名）。"""
1879        normalized = full_path_no_ext.replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')  # 💡 normalized='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男' (str)
1880        candidates: List[str] = []  # 💡 candidates=[] (list)
1881        seen: set[str] = set()  # 💡 seen=set() (set)
1882
1883        def _add_base(p: str) -> None:
1884            for v in P4ToMuse._hangzhou_depot_local_variants(p):  # → 调用 _hangzhou_depot_local_variants()
1885                vx = v.rstrip('/')
1886                if vx and vx not in seen:
1887                    seen.add(vx)
1888                    candidates.append(vx)
1889
1890        if getattr(self, 'path_source_prefix', ''):
1891            _add_base(str(self.path_source_prefix))  # → 调用 _add_base()
1892        if self.upload_dir:
1893            _add_base(str(self.upload_dir))  # → 调用 _add_base()
1894
1895        # 更长前缀优先，避免短根前缀误切
1896        candidates.sort(key=len, reverse=True)
1897
1898        for pfx in candidates:
1899            if not pfx:
1900                continue
1901            if normalized == pfx:
1902                return ''
1903            if normalized.startswith(pfx + '/'):
1904                return normalized[len(pfx) + 1:]  # 返回值 (第1904行) '晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男'
1905        return normalized.lstrip('/')
1906

# >>深度13 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1-1-1 #213 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1883 in _add_base() ← :1891 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1883        def _add_base(p: str) -> None:  # 💡 p='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', candidates=[], seen=set()
1884            for v in P4ToMuse._hangzhou_depot_local_variants(p):  # → 调用 _hangzhou_depot_local_variants()  # 返回值 (第1884行) None
1885                vx = v.rstrip('/')  # 💡 vx='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
1886                if vx and vx not in seen:

1888                    candidates.append(vx)

# >>深度14 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1-1-1-1 #214 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1857 in _hangzhou_depot_local_variants() ← :1884 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[24.7530s]

1857    @staticmethod  # 💡 path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'
1858    def _hangzhou_depot_local_variants(path: str) -> List[str]:
1859        """同一路径的 //hangzhou/... 与 D:/PTrack/hangzhou/... 变体（用于前缀剥离）。
1860
1861        sync_report / verify 常为 depot 路径，而 upload_dir 多为本地盘符路径；若不同时纳入候选，
1862        _strip_config_source_prefix 无法剥掉 upload 根，导致 category_list 混入 hangzhou、项目名等，
1863        get_category_refs_by_path 在 Muse 分类树上匹配失败。
1864        """
1865        norm = str(path).replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')  # 💡 norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
1866        if not norm:
1867            return []
1868        out: List[str] = [norm]  # 💡 out=['D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'] (list)
1869        hz_depot = '//hangzhou/'  # 💡 hz_depot='//hangzhou/' (str)
1870        hz_local = 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/'  # 💡 hz_local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/' (str)
1871        if norm.startswith(hz_depot):
1872            out.append(hz_local + norm[len(hz_depot):])
1873        elif norm.startswith(hz_local):
1874            out.append(hz_depot + norm[len(hz_local):])
1875        return out  # 返回值 (第1875行) ['D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑']
1876

1857    @staticmethod  # 💡 path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'

1860
1861        sync_report / verify 常为 depot 路径，而 upload_dir 多为本地盘符路径；若不同时纳入候选，
1862        _strip_config_source_prefix 无法剥掉 upload 根，导致 category_list 混入 hangzhou、项目名等，
1863        get_category_refs_by_path 在 Muse 分类树上匹配失败。
1864        """
1865        norm = str(path).replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')  # 💡 norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
1866        if not norm:
1867            return []
1868        out: List[str] = [norm]  # 💡 out=['D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'] (list)
1869        hz_depot = '//hangzhou/'  # 💡 hz_depot='//hangzhou/' (str)

1873        elif norm.startswith(hz_local):
1874            out.append(hz_depot + norm[len(hz_local):])
1875        return out  # 返回值 (第1875行) ['D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑']
1876

# >>深度12 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1-2 #217 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1978 in <listcomp>() ← :1978 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[7.9840s]

1978    def get_name_category(self, file_path):  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 .0=<list_iterator object at 0x000001CDEB43E0B0>  # 返回值 (第1978行) ['晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男', '主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男']
1979        # 统一使用 init_muse 中加载的配置参数，不再根据文件路径重新加载配置
1980        # 这样可以确保所有文件都使用 bat 传入的 UPLOAD_PATH 对应的统一规则
1981
1982        file_path_no_ext = os.path.splitext(file_path)[0].replace('\\', '/')
1983        relative_path = self._strip_config_source_prefix(file_path_no_ext)
1984        file_path_items = [part for part in relative_path.split('/') if part]
1985        if not file_path_items:
1986            file_path_items = [os.path.basename(file_path_no_ext)]
1987        asset_name = file_path_items[-1]
1988        if len(file_path_items) > self.asset_name_index:
1989            asset_name = file_path_items[self.asset_name_index]
1990        elif len(file_path_items) < self.asset_name_max:
1991            if self.default_asset_name:
1992                asset_name = self.default_asset_name
1993            else:
1994                asset_name = file_path_items[self.category_end-1]
1995
1996        # category_end 为 -1 时，自动推导为 asset_name_index（分类取资产名之前的所有层级）
1997        effective_category_end = self.category_end
1998        if effective_category_end == -1 and self.asset_name_index != 0:
1999            effective_category_end = self.asset_name_index
2000
2001        category_list = file_path_items[self.category_start:effective_category_end]
2002  # → 调用 _merge_category_root_dedup()
2003        # 优先使用 muse_category_path 参数，如果没有则使用 YAML 配置的 category_root
2004        if self.muse_category_path:
2005            category_root = [p.strip() for p in self.muse_category_path.split('/')]
2006            category_list = self._merge_category_root_dedup(category_root, category_list)
2007        elif self.category_root:
2008            category_list = self._merge_category_root_dedup(self.category_root, category_list)
2009
2010        return asset_name, category_list
2011

# >>深度12 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1-3 #218 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1949 in _merge_category_root_dedup() ← :2002 ⏱️[46.55ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[3.8473s]

1949    @staticmethod  # 💡 category_root=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑'], category_list=['晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男']
1950    def _merge_category_root_dedup(
1951        category_root: Sequence[str],
1952        category_list: Sequence[str],
1953    ) -> List[str]:
1954        """
1955        合并分类前缀与相对路径分类，并去掉边界处重复的最长后缀/前缀。
1956        """
1957        root_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_root if str(p).strip()]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 root_parts=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑'] (list)
1958        list_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_list if str(p).strip()]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1959        if not root_parts:
1960            return list_parts
1961        if not list_parts:
1962            return root_parts
1963
1964        max_overlap = min(len(root_parts), len(list_parts))
1965        overlap = 0
1966        for size in range(max_overlap, 0, -1):
1967            if root_parts[-size:] == list_parts[:size]:
1968                overlap = size
1969                break
1970        return root_parts + list_parts[overlap:]
1971

# >>深度12 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1-4 #219 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1957 in <listcomp>() ← :1957 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[3.6131s]

1957    def _merge_category_root_dedup(  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 .0=<list_iterator object at 0x000001CDEB43E0B0>  # 返回值 (第1957行) ['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑']
1958        category_root: Sequence[str],  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
1959        category_list: Sequence[str],
1960    ) -> List[str]:
1961        """
1962        合并分类前缀与相对路径分类，并去掉边界处重复的最长后缀/前缀。
1963        """
1964        root_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_root if str(p).strip()]
1965        list_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_list if str(p).strip()]
1966        if not root_parts:
1967            return list_parts
1968        if not list_parts:
1969            return root_parts
1970
1971        max_overlap = min(len(root_parts), len(list_parts))
1972        overlap = 0
1973        for size in range(max_overlap, 0, -1):
1974            if root_parts[-size:] == list_parts[:size]:
1975                overlap = size
1976                break
1977        return root_parts + list_parts[overlap:]  # → 调用 _strip_config_source_prefix()
1978  # → 调用 <listcomp>()

# >>深度13 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1-4-1 #220 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1958 in <listcomp>() ← :1958 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1958    def _merge_category_root_dedup(  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 .0=<list_iterator object at 0x000001CDEB43E0B0>  # 返回值 (第1958行) ['晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男']
1959        category_root: Sequence[str],
1960        category_list: Sequence[str],
1961    ) -> List[str]:
1962        """
1963        合并分类前缀与相对路径分类，并去掉边界处重复的最长后缀/前缀。
1964        """
1965        root_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_root if str(p).strip()]
1966        list_parts = [str(p).strip() for p in category_list if str(p).strip()]
1967        if not root_parts:
1968            return list_parts
1969        if not list_parts:
1970            return root_parts
1971
1972        max_overlap = min(len(root_parts), len(list_parts))
1973        overlap = 0
1974        for size in range(max_overlap, 0, -1):
1975            if root_parts[-size:] == list_parts[:size]:
1976                overlap = size
1977                break  # → 调用 _strip_config_source_prefix()
1978        return root_parts + list_parts[overlap:]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()

# >>深度14 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1-4-1-1 #221 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:2307 in <listcomp>() ← :2307 ⏱️[666.62μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

2307    def _ensure_sync_report_entry_muse_path_or_die(self, entry: Dict[str, Any], *, ctx: str) -> None:  # → 调用 <listcomp>()  # 💡 .0=<list_iterator object at 0x000001CDEC89FDF0>  # 返回值 (第2307行) ['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑', '晴雪仙气坐骑', '成男']
2308        """强制保证 entry 含 muse_path；缺失视为致命错误并退出。"""
2309        muse_path = ""
2310        existing_muse_path = entry.get("muse_path")
2311        if isinstance(existing_muse_path, str):
2312            normalized_existing_muse_path = existing_muse_path.strip().replace("\\", "/")
2313            if (
2314                normalized_existing_muse_path
2315                and "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/" not in normalized_existing_muse_path
2316                and not normalized_existing_muse_path.startswith("//hangzhou/")
2317            ):
2318                muse_path = normalized_existing_muse_path
2319        fp = entry.get("file_path")
2320        probe = entry.get("local_file") or fp
2321        if not muse_path:
2322            category_value = entry.get("category")
2323            if isinstance(category_value, str) and category_value.strip():
2324                category_sep = " / " if " / " in category_value else "/"
2325                category_parts = [seg.strip() for seg in category_value.split(category_sep) if seg.strip()]
2326                category_muse_path = "/".join(category_parts)
2327                if (
2328                    category_muse_path
2329                    and "D:/PTrack/hangzhou/" not in category_muse_path
2330                    and not category_muse_path.startswith("//hangzhou/")
2331                ):
2332                    muse_path = category_muse_path
2333        if not muse_path and not probe:
2334            lprint(
2335                "[sync_report][致命错误]",
2336                ("原因", "缺少 file_path/local_file，无法推导 muse_path"),
2337                ("ctx", ctx),
2338                ("entry", entry),
2339                level="CRITICAL",
2340                force_print=True,
2341                max_prints_per_line=999,
2342            )
2343            raise SystemExit(2)
2344        if not muse_path:  # → 调用 _resolve_mapping_preset_for_path()
2345            try:
2346                _asset_name, _cat_list = self.get_name_category(str(probe))
2347            except Exception as exc:
2348                traceback.print_exc()
2349                lprint(
2350                    "[sync_report][致命错误]",
2351                    ("原因", "get_name_category 推导失败，无法生成 muse_path"),
2352                    ("ctx", ctx),
2353                    ("probe", str(probe)),  # → 调用 _ensure_sync_report_entry_muse_path_or_die()
2354                    ("error", str(exc)),
2355                    ("entry", entry),
2356                    level="CRITICAL",
2357                    force_print=True,
2358                    max_prints_per_line=999,
2359                )
2360                raise SystemExit(2)
2361            if not _cat_list:
2362                lprint(
2363                    "[sync_report][致命错误]",
2364                    ("原因", "分类推导为空，无法生成 muse_path"),
2365                    ("ctx", ctx),
2366                    ("probe", str(probe)),
2367                    ("entry", entry),
2368                    level="CRITICAL",
2369                    force_print=True,
2370                    max_prints_per_line=999,
2371                )
2372                raise SystemExit(2)
2373            # get_name_category 目前返回的是“目录名段列表”（List[str]），这时直接 join 就是最终 muse_path。
2374            try:
2375                if isinstance(_cat_list, list) and _cat_list and isinstance(_cat_list[0], str):
2376                    muse_path = "/".join([str(x).strip() for x in _cat_list if str(x).strip()])
2377                else:
2378                    # 兼容：若未来返回 CategoryRef 列表/链，则取叶子 ref 反查目录名
2379                    leaf = _cat_list[-1]
2380                    names = self.muse_helper.category_service.get_category_path_by_CategoryRef(
2381                        leaf, use_cache=True, refresh=False
2382                    )
2383                    muse_path = "/".join([str(x) for x in (names or []) if str(x).strip()])
2384            except Exception as exc:
2385                traceback.print_exc()
2386                lprint(
2387                    "[sync_report][致命错误]",
2388                    ("原因", "生成 muse_path 失败"),
2389                    ("ctx", ctx),
2390                    ("probe", str(probe)),
2391                    ("error", str(exc)),
2392                    ("entry", entry),
2393                    level="CRITICAL",
2394                    force_print=True,
2395                    max_prints_per_line=999,
2396                )
2397                raise SystemExit(2)
2398        if not muse_path:
2399            lprint(
2400                "[sync_report][致命错误]",
2401                ("原因", "muse_path 为空，无法写入 sync_report"),
2402                ("ctx", ctx),
2403                ("probe", str(probe)),
2404                ("entry", entry),
2405                level="CRITICAL",
2406                force_print=True,
2407                max_prints_per_line=999,
2408            )
2409            raise SystemExit(2)
2410        entry["muse_path"] = muse_path
2411        entry.pop("mapping_source", None)
2412        if probe and not str(entry.get("mapping_preset") or "").strip():
2413            mapping_preset = self._resolve_mapping_preset_for_path(str(probe), muse_path)
2414            if mapping_preset:
2415                entry["mapping_preset"] = mapping_preset
2416

# >>深度14 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1-4-1-2 #222 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1907 in _resolve_mapping_preset_for_path() ← :2344 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[32.75ms]

1907    def _resolve_mapping_preset_for_path(self, path: str, muse_path: str = '') -> str:  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254988540016_13166:变量·path·path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', muse_path='动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男'
path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', muse_path='动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男'
1908        """根据文件路径与 muse_path 匹配 YAML 预设，返回 ``source | category_root``。"""
1909        normalized = str(path or '').replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')  # 💡 normalized='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max' (str)
1910        if not normalized:
1911            return ''
1912        normalized_muse_path = str(muse_path or '').replace('\\', '/').strip('/')  # 💡 normalized_muse_path='动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男' (str)
1913        cache_key = (normalized, normalized_muse_path)  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254988474528_13178:变量·cache_key·cache_key=('D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 cache_key=('D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', '动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男') (tuple)
cache_key=('D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男/主驾上车_qxzq_up_成男.max', '动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑/晴雪仙气坐骑/成男') (tuple)
1914        cache = getattr(self, "_mapping_preset_cache", None)  # 💡 cache={} (dict)
1915        if isinstance(cache, dict) and cache_key in cache:
1916            return str(cache.get(cache_key) or "")
1917        best_preset = ''  # 💡 best_preset='' (str)
1918        best_score = -1  # 💡 best_score=-1 (int)
1919        for entry in getattr(self, '_local_config_mappings', []) or []:
1920            source = str(entry.get('source') or '').replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')  # 💡 source='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
1921            if not source:
1922                continue
1923            category_root_parts = self._split_category_root_segments(entry.get('category_root'))  # 💡 category_root_parts=['动作资源', '坐骑', '主角_坐骑'] (list)
1924            category_root_text = '/'.join(category_root_parts)  # 💡 category_root_text='动作资源/坐骑/主角_坐骑' (str)
1925            for candidate in P4ToMuse._hangzhou_depot_local_variants(source):  # → 调用 _hangzhou_depot_local_variants()
1926                candidate_norm = str(candidate).replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')  # 💡 candidate_norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
1927                if not candidate_norm:
1928                    continue
1929                if normalized == candidate_norm or normalized.startswith(candidate_norm + '/'):
1930                    score = len(candidate_norm)
1931                    if (
1932                        normalized_muse_path
1933                        and category_root_text
1934                        and (
1935                            normalized_muse_path == category_root_text
1936                            or normalized_muse_path.startswith(category_root_text + '/')
1937                        )
1938                    ):
1939                        score += 100000 + len(category_root_text)
1940                    preset = source if not category_root_text else f'{source} | {category_root_text}'
1941                    if score > best_score:
1942                        best_preset = preset
1943                        best_score = score
1944                    break
1945        if isinstance(cache, dict):
1946            cache[cache_key] = best_preset
1947        return best_preset
1948

# >>深度15 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1-4-1-2-1 #223 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1857 in _hangzhou_depot_local_variants() ← :1925 ⏱️[~0μs] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828] 代码块⏱️[~0μs]

1857    @staticmethod  # 💡 path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'
1858    def _hangzhou_depot_local_variants(path: str) -> List[str]:
1859        """同一路径的 //hangzhou/... 与 D:/PTrack/hangzhou/... 变体（用于前缀剥离）。
1860
1861        sync_report / verify 常为 depot 路径，而 upload_dir 多为本地盘符路径；若不同时纳入候选，
1862        _strip_config_source_prefix 无法剥掉 upload 根，导致 category_list 混入 hangzhou、项目名等，
1863        get_category_refs_by_path 在 Muse 分类树上匹配失败。
1864        """
1865        norm = str(path).replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')  # 💡 norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑' (str)
1866        if not norm:
1867            return []
1868        out: List[str] = [norm]  # 💡 out=['D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑'] (list)
1869        hz_depot = '//hangzhou/'  # 💡 hz_depot='//hangzhou/' (str)
1870        hz_local = 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/'  # 💡 hz_local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/' (str)
1871        if norm.startswith(hz_depot):
1872            out.append(hz_local + norm[len(hz_depot):])
1873        elif norm.startswith(hz_local):
1874            out.append(hz_depot + norm[len(hz_local):])
1875        return out  # 返回值 (第1875行) ['D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑', '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_坐骑']
1876

# >>深度15 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-2-1-1-4-1-2-2 #224 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:1857 in _hangzhou_depot_local_variants() ← :1925 ⏱️[1.00ms] [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828]

1857    @staticmethod  # 💡 path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_宠物'
1858    def _hangzhou_depot_local_variants(path: str) -> List[str]:
1859        """同一路径的 //hangzhou/... 与 D:/PTrack/hangzhou/... 变体（用于前缀剥离）。
1860
1861        sync_report / verify 常为 depot 路径，而 upload_dir 多为本地盘符路径；若不同时纳入候选，
1862        _strip_config_source_prefix 无法剥掉 upload 根，导致 category_list 混入 hangzhou、项目名等，
1863        get_category_refs_by_path 在 Muse 分类树上匹配失败。
1864        """
1865        norm = str(path).replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')  # 💡 norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_宠物' (str)
1866        if not norm:
1867            return []

1857    @staticmethod  # 💡 path='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/特效动画'
1858    def _hangzhou_depot_local_variants(path: str) -> List[str]:
1859        """同一路径的 //hangzhou/... 与 D:/PTrack/hangzhou/... 变体（用于前缀剥离）。
1860
1861        sync_report / verify 常为 depot 路径，而 upload_dir 多为本地盘符路径；若不同时纳入候选，
1862        _strip_config_source_prefix 无法剥掉 upload 根，导致 category_list 混入 hangzhou、项目名等，
1863        get_category_refs_by_path 在 Muse 分类树上匹配失败。
1864        """
1865        norm = str(path).replace('\\', '/').rstrip('/')  # 💡 norm='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/特效动画' (str)
1866        if not norm:
1867            return []

1869        hz_depot = '//hangzhou/'  # 💡 hz_depot='//hangzhou/' (str)
1870        hz_local = 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/'  # 💡 hz_local='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/' (str)
1871        if norm.startswith(hz_depot):
1872            out.append(hz_local + norm[len(hz_depot):])
1873        elif norm.startswith(hz_local):
1874            out.append(hz_depot + norm[len(hz_local):])
1875        return out  # 返回值 (第1875行) ['D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/特效动画', '//hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/特效动画']

# >>深度9 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-3 #229 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:585 in _maybe_materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot() ← :3579 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828]

585    def _maybe_materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot(self, *, force: bool = False) -> bool:
586        """节流 sync_report.json 快照写入；force=True 时无视时间间隔立即写入。"""  # 💡 force=True (bool)
587        if not getattr(self, "save_sync_report", False):
588            return False
589        if force:
590            self.materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot()  # → 调用 materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot()
591            return True
592        interval_s = max(0.0, float(getattr(self, "_sync_report_snapshot_interval_s", 5.0) or 0.0))
593        last_ts = float(getattr(self, "_last_sync_report_snapshot_ts", 0.0) or 0.0)
594        now_ts = time.time()
595        if last_ts and interval_s > 0 and (now_ts - last_ts) < interval_s:
596            return False
597        self.materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot()
598        return True
599

# >>深度10 路径1-1-3-2-13-1-3-13-3-1 #230 c:/users/wb.fengqingqing/packages/anim_upload_muse_tool/999.0.0/src/anim_upload_muse_tool/p4_to_muse_new/p4_to_muse_new.py:548 in materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot() ← :590 [PID:11024 主进程 TID:39828]

548    def materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot(self) -> None:
549        """合并已有 sync_report.json 与本次内存结果，去重后写入 sync_report.json。"""
550        if not getattr(self, "save_sync_report", False):
551            return
552        json_path = getattr(self, "_sync_report_json", "") or ""  # 💡 json_path='D:\\TD_Depot\\Wuzu_dev\\mywork\\muse_work\\.cache\\h42_sync_report.json' (str)
553        if not json_path:
554            return
555        with self._report_lock:
556            entries_raw: List[dict] = []  # 💡 entries_raw=[] (list)
557            if os.path.exists(json_path):
558                entries_raw.extend(self._snapshot_json_entries())
559            entries_raw.extend([dict(e) for e in self._sync_report if isinstance(e, dict)])  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
560            deduped = self._dedupe_sync_report_entries_last_wins(entries_raw)  # → 调用 _dedupe_sync_report_entries_last_wins()
561            # 用户诉求（强制）：快照里每条 entry 必须有 muse_path；缺失视为致命错误退出。
562            # for e in deduped:
563            #     if isinstance(e, dict):
564            #         has_muse_path = P4ToMuse._sync_report_entry_has_valid_muse_path(e)
565            #         has_mapping_preset = bool(str(e.get("mapping_preset") or "").strip())
566            #         if not has_muse_path or not has_mapping_preset:
567            #             self._ensure_sync_report_entry_muse_path_or_die(
568            #                 e,
569            #                 ctx="materialize_sync_report_json_snapshot",
570            #             )
571
572            snapshot_entries = self._sync_report_entries_to_snapshot_map(deduped)  # → 调用 _sync_report_entries_to_snapshot_map()
573            tmp_path = json_path + ".tmp"
574            self._write_sync_report_json_snapshot_stream(
575                tmp_path=tmp_path,
576                source_path=json_path,
577                generated_at=time.time(),
578                entry_count=len(deduped),
579                snapshot_entries=snapshot_entries,
580            )
581            os.replace(tmp_path, json_path)
582            self._sync_report = []
583            self._last_sync_report_snapshot_ts = time.time()
584

448    def _dedupe_sync_report_entries_last_wins(entries: List[dict]) -> List[dict]:
449        """同一 canonical 键保留最后一次出现的记录；输出顺序为键首次出现顺序。"""
450        merged: Dict[str, dict] = {}  # 💡 merged={} (dict)
451        ordered_keys: List[str] = []
452        anon_i = 0
453        for e in entries:
454            k = P4ToMuse._sync_report_entry_canonical_key(e)  # 💡 k='D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max' (str)  # 💡 [[EXPAND:var_expand_2254984408944_13560:变量·e·dict·424字符·{'action': 'rebuilt', 'asset_name': '正太背正太-背起carry…·点击展开]]
💡 变量 e=dict (e), 424 字符
{'action': 'rebuilt', 'asset_name': '正太背正太-背起carry_child_up', 'category': '动作资源 / 主角通用 / 玩法动作 / 主角_活动 / 2025江湖四季 / 江湖四季冬季玩法 / 正太', 'file_path': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太/正太背正太-背起carry_child_up.max', 'asset_id': None, 'new_tags': [], 'muse_path': '动作资源/主角通用/玩法动作/主角_活动/2025江湖四季/江湖四季冬季玩法/正太', 'mapping_preset': 'D:/PTrack/hangzhou/H42项目美术资源/正式资源/03角色动画/主角_活动 | 动作资源/主角通用/玩法动作/主角_活动'}
455            if not k:
456                k = "__anon__{}".format(anon_i)
457                anon_i += 1
458            if k not in merged:
459                ordered_keys.append(k)
460            merged[k] = e
461        return [merged[k] for k in ordered_keys]  # → 调用 <listcomp>()
462

返回值 (第461行) [{'action': 'rebuilt', 'asset_name': '正太背正太-背起carry_child_up', 'category': '动作资源 / 主角通用 / 玩法...
(第461行) [{'action': 'rebuilt', 'asset_name': '正太背正太-背起carry_child_up', 'category': '动作资源 / 主角通用 / 玩法动作 / 主角_活动 / 2025江湖四季 / 江湖四季冬季玩法 / 正太', 'file_path': 'D:/PTrack/hang... [BIG_VALUE_REF id=bigvar_000016 file=upload_test_big_varible.json chars=50024 sha256=5ea1f522459b]
462        """同一 canonical 键保留最后一次出现的记录；输出顺序为键首次出现顺序。"""
463        merged: Dict[str, dict] = {}
464        ordered_keys: List[str] = []
465        anon_i = 0
466        for e in entries:
467            k = P4ToMuse._sync_report_entry_canonical_key(e)
468            if not k:
469                k = "__anon__{}".format(anon_i)
470                anon_i += 1
471            if k not in merged:
472                ordered_keys.append(k)
473            merged[k] = e
474        return [merged[k] for k in ordered_keys]
475

'成男背正太-猛猛跳carry_child_jump3', '
464    def _sync_report_entries_to_snapshot_map(entries: Sequence[Mapping[str, Any]]) -> Dict[str, dict]:
465        """将条目列表转为 ``mapping_preset -> canonical_path -> entry`` 的快照对象。"""
466        snapshot_entries: Dict[str, dict] = {}
467        anon_i = 0
468        for entry in entries:
469            if not isinstance(entry, dict):
470                continue
471            preset_key = str(entry.get("mapping_preset") or "").strip() or "__ungrouped__"
472            file_key = P4ToMuse._sync_report_entry_canonical_key(entry)
473            if not file_key:
474                file_key = "__anon__{}".format(anon_i)
475                anon_i += 1
476            bucket = snapshot_entries.setdefault(preset_key, {})
477            bucket[file_key] = dict(entry)
478        return snapshot_entries
479

130    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:

132            "mode": self.mode,

146        data.update(self.extra)

95    def _as_int(value: object) -> int:
96        if value is None:
97            return 0
98        if isinstance(value, (int, float)):
99            return max(0, int(value))
100        text = str(value).strip()
101        if text.startswith('+'):
102            text = text[1:]
103        if text.isdigit():
104            return max(0, int(text))
105        return 0
106

📖 文件格式说明

本文件采用 Markdown + JSON 索引 混合格式，支持人类阅读和程序解析。

👤 人类阅读

  • 📄 直接查看 Markdown 内容（调用树、详细追踪）
  • 🔧 使用任何 Markdown 编辑器或查看器
  • 🤖 AI 可以理解完整上下文

💻 程序解析

1️⃣ 提取 JSON 索引

import re, json

# 读取文件
with open("trace.md", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    content = f.read()

# 提取 JSON 索引
match = re.search(r'<<<JSON_INDEX>>>\s*```json\s*\n(.*?)\n```', content, re.DOTALL)
if match:
    data = json.loads(match.group(1))
    print(f"版本: {data['version']}")
    print(f"总调用: {data['metadata']['total_calls']}")
    print(f"最大深度: {data['metadata']['max_depth']}")

2️⃣ JSON 索引结构（规则驱动格式）

{
  "version": "2.0",
  "format_version": "2026.03",
  "rules": {
    // 基础配置
    "id_pattern": "call-{seq}",
    "depth_range": [1, 5],
    "slow_threshold": 500,

    // 解析规则
    "parsing": {
      "call_pattern": "callBy\\(深度(\\d+)\\s+路径([\\d\\-]+)\\s+#(\\d+)\\)",
      "func_pattern": "in\\s+(\\w+)\\(\\)",
      "return_pattern": "⬅️\\s*返回值\\s*\\([^)]+\\)\\s*(.+?)(?:\\s*[═\\n]|$)"
    },

    // 组件命名规则
    "components": {
      "call_elements": {
        "call": "lprint-trace-call",
        "code_block": "lprint-trace-code-block"
      },
      "interactive_elements": {
        "ai_button": "ask-ai-code-btn",
        "back_button": "back-to-tree-code-btn"
      }
    },

    // 功能开关
    "features": {
      "enable_params_extraction": true,
      "enable_return_expansion": true
    }
  },
  "metadata": {
    "total_calls": 23,
    "max_depth": 5,
    "generated_at": "2026-03-28T15:20:00Z"
  }
}

3️⃣ 前端解析器使用

// 初始化解析器
const parser = new TraceDataParser(window.traceJsonData.rules);

// 查找元素
const callElement = parser.findElement('call', { seq: '2' });
const treeContainer = parser.findComponent('tree_view', 'container');

// 提取数据
const callInfo = parser.extractCallInfo(callElement);
const params = parser.extractParams(codeContent);
const returnValue = parser.extractReturnValue(codeContent);

// 创建组件
const returnBlock = parser.createReturnBlock('2', returnValue, params);
const aiButton = parser.createAIButton(callBlock);

4️⃣ 组件查找示例

// 使用组件名称查找
const allCalls = parser.findAllComponents('call_elements', 'call');
const expandButtons = parser.findAllComponents('interactive_elements', 'expand_toggle');

// 生成CSS类名
const callClass = parser.generateCssClass('trace', 'call', 'slow');
// 结果: "lprint-trace-call lprint-trace-call--slow"

// 生成元素ID
const returnId = parser.generateId('return', { call_id: '2' });
// 结果: "return-2"

🎯 主要特性

  • 🏗️ 规则驱动: 所有解析规则集中配置
  • 🎨 组件化: 统一的组件命名和查找
  • 🔧 可扩展: 易于添加新的解析规则
  • 📱 响应式: 支持功能开关和样式配置
  • 🔄 向后兼容: 保持与旧版本的兼容性

📚 版本信息

  • 当前版本: 2.0
  • 格式版本: 2026.03
  • 解析器版本: 2.1.0
  • 生成时间: 自动记录
